Evil existence of the void who drank human blood and committed phratry murder. To be subjected to suffering from hunger and cold for eternity.
重犯无生侯的囚室，复仇与愤怒的呓语穿过长梦，渗透进现实。
The cell of the criminal, Void Existence. The sleep talking full of vengeance and anger seeped into reality through the long dreams.
步离巢父，行则战至，祸乱诸界，判绝足禁闭，不得受生。
The Borisin Brood Lord, with him came war and a scourge upon all worlds. His sentence is to be eternally detained and imprisoned, never to be reborn.
重犯呼雷的囚室，哪怕是石头的孔洞和缝隙里，也残存着难以消除的血腥味。
The cell of the criminal, Hoolay. From the cracks and holes in the stones, a lingering stench of blood remains, its presence nigh impossible to remove.
化外歌民，贪图不死，窃取机要，施真空浮牢，五感尽夺。
A balladian who sought immortality and stole important secrets. To be confined to a vacuum-sealed floating prison and robbed of their senses.
重犯瞽目王酋的囚室，由于完全真空化的处理，就连最微小的振动也感受不到。
The cell of the criminal, Blind Chieftain. Due to being subjected to a complete vacuum, not even the smallest of vibration can be felt.
是空空如也的房间，还是罪无可恕的囚犯？你无从知晓。故事，嘶吼，石门隔绝了一切，只留下冰冷的沉默。
Is it an empty room, or does it house an unpardonable prisoner? There's no way for you to find out as the stone door isolates it from everything, leaving only a cold silence behind.
但即便石门也无法掩盖另一侧漾动的水声...仿佛某位控驭水体的神明曾被镇压在此。
But even a door of stone cannot conceal the sound of water sloshing on the other side... It is as if a god that reigned over water is sealed here.
据说守在门口的石狮子往往雌雄成对——雌狮脚下是幼狮，雄狮脚下是绣球。可这里的石狮子脚下全都是绣球。恐怕是地衡司开需求单时填错了吧。

It's said that the pair of stone lions guarding the entrance are often of opposite genders. The female lion has a cub at her feet, while the male lion has an embroidered ball at his feet. Yet, all the stone lions here have an embroidered ball at their feet. It could be that the Realm-Keeping Commission had made a mistake in filling out the request form.
在仙舟联盟，任何看似不起眼的东西，都可能蕴含银河中最顶尖的科技，这尊石狮子也不例外。它的武功比你更高，但绝不会轻易出手。

Anything that looks insignificant in the Xianzhou Alliance may be the product of the most advanced technology in the cosmos — this stone lion is one of them. It is a better martial artist than you, but it won't touch you without a valid reason.
你摸了摸它爪中的绣球，它瞪了你一眼。你可能会以为这是错觉，但这不是。
You touch the embroidered ball under its paws, and it shoots you a glare. You might think you're imagining things, but you aren't.
每一尊石狮子都有不同的性格：有些敦厚老实、有些暴躁易怒、有些爱开玩笑。不过，你很难了解它们的性格——毕竟它们都很酷，不爱聊天。

Every stone lion has a different personality — some are good-natured, some are irritable, and some have a good sense of humor. Yet, it's hard to get to know them well, considering they are aloof and hate small talk.
请配合进行安检流程。
Please cooperate with security inspection.
请确保身上无金属物品。
Ensure you're not carrying any metal.
感觉被针对了呢…
Why do I feel targeted...?
功夫加唱跳有没有搞头？
What about martial arts with singing and dancing?
没搞头。
Nah.
年纪轻轻就一把年纪了。
You're so young, but your heart's so old!
这广告歌都已经几百年了。
The jingle for this ad is a few centuries old.
版权早进入公共领域了吧？
Its rights should be in the public domain already.
我查了，作曲是个仙舟人。
Well, the composer is a Xianzhou native...
换言之，他还活着呢……
In other words, he's still alive...
请讲讲你的武术哲学！
Please tell me about your martial philosophy!
像水一样，我的朋友！
My friend, it's to be like water!
具体来说是什么意思？
What do you mean?
亦舒亦急，可湍可缓。
It can be swift or slow, rapid or meandering.
听不懂但我大受震撼！
I don't get it, but it sounds impressive!
难道幽囚狱里面也能收快递？你不禁对鹤运物流的业务之广感到惊诧。要是住在这里，有快递，通网络，每天什么也不用做，幽囚狱还能被称为监狱吗？

Is it even possible to receive deliveries inside the Shackling Prison? You can't help but marvel at the wide delivery network of the Heron Express. If there are courier deliveries and internet in the Shackling Prison, and prisoners don't have to do anything every day, is the Shackling Prison really a prison?
快递包装采用了鹤运物流最先进的防腐保鲜技术，确保刑期五百年以内的客户刑满释放时，仍然可以感受到跨越时间的售后服务。

To preserve and maintain the freshness of its contents, the delivery packaging utilizes the cutting-edge technology of the Heron Express. This ensures that customers set to be released within the next <unbreak>500</unbreak> years can still experience the after-sales service that transcends time.
在囚犯出狱以前，他们的快递都只能老老实实地待在这里。但是，他们在牢里到底是怎么下单的？
Until the prisoners are released, their packages will be left here. But how exactly do they place their orders from inside the prison?
你曾经在太卜司见过这些玉兆单元，但是没有见过这种*锁链形态*…呃，在仙舟，犯了错的玉兆也会被锁在幽囚狱里吗？
You've seen Jade Abacus Units at the Divination Commission, but not these chain-shaped ones... Um, in Xianzhou, are jade abaci that have made mistakes also incarcerated in the Shackling Prison?
犯罪嫌疑玉兆：天穹系列玉兆单元。重大罪行：算错了。
Suspect Abacus: Sky Dome Series Jade Abacus Unit. Major Crime: Wrong calculation.
鉴于你已经在仙舟上见过能飞的剑、写诗的伞和作祟的火，对于坐牢的玉也已经见怪不怪了…谁知道它会不会突然长出两条腿跑掉？

Given that you've already seen flying swords, an umbrella that writes poetry, and flames that cause mischief, seeing a piece of jade put in jail doesn't surprise you anymore... Who knows whether it'll grow a pair of legs and escape one day.
你注意到鳞渊境的幽囚狱整体潜伏在古海之下，是不断向下延展的柱状结构。冥差们在这块屏幕前管理着不同囚室、不同囚犯的实时信息。

You notice the Scalegorge Waterscape's Shackling Prison is fully submerged under the ancient sea, as a column structure that extends endlessly into the depths. Spiritfarers monitor and manage real-time information of prison cells and prisoners on this screen.
从犯人的心跳频率到囚室内的空气密度，系统对古海底部的管控细致入微。重刑犯的拘束容不得一点偏差，任何错漏，都将酿成一场无妄之灾。

From the heartbeats of the prisoners to the density of air within the cells, the system's control over the bottom of the ancient sea is meticulous down to the finest detail. There cannot be the slightest mishap with regard to the captivity of criminals who have committed serious offenses, for the slightest error could result in an unforeseen calamity.
你注意到屏幕上的内容几乎是毫无变动，对狱卒们来说，毫无变动就是最好的。
You notice that the display on the screen almost never changes. For the prison guards, no change is probably the best-case scenario.
兼备照明功能的玉兆单元，能够将运算中产生的废热转化为光能向外释放。你似乎理解了，无论是什么样的世界，人们总喜欢在这种科技产品上看到RGB的灯光。

A Jade Abacus Unit that also has built-in lighting. It can convert the waste heat generated during calculation into light energy and release it. You seem to come to the understanding that no matter what world it is, people love to see RGB lighting on tech products.
瞧这漂亮的琥珀色光泽，眼前的玉兆单元没准儿是克里珀的粉丝。可照这么说，绿色的玉兆岂不都是药师的粉丝？你顿悟了扣帽子的精髓。

Judging from the amber luster, this Jade Abacus Unit might be a fan of Qlipoth. Does this mean that a green jade abacus is a fan of Yaoshi? You have suddenly learned the art of putting labels on others.
承担大规模运算的中枢性玉兆单元，高密度的特殊晶体材质…既然不在太卜司，而是在幽囚狱上班，超强的运算性能多半是被浪费了吧……

A core Jade Abacus Unit made from a special high-density crystal that is used to perform large-scale calculations... Utilizing it in the Shackling Prison rather than the Divination Commission is probably a waste of its powerful calculation capabilities...
饱经风霜的石门，自幽囚狱建成之刻便屹立于此。波月古海之下，所有的秘密它都了如指掌，可石头不会说话，只能把它们都烂在肚子里。

A weathered stone door that has stood here since the construction of the Shackling Prison. It knows all the secrets under the Lunarescent Depths, but regardless, nobody else will find out, for stone cannot speak.
根据司狱所说，曾有无数犯人尝试逃狱来到石门前想要通过这里离开幽囚狱——然而事实上，「石门」只是徒有其表，这门后没有通路，只有坚硬的海底岩石……

According to the Jailer, countless criminals have come to the stone door and attempted to escape the Shackling Prison through it. However, this stone door is merely a facade. The door leads to nowhere but hard rocks at the bottom of the sea...
在全幽囚狱戏份最多的片场之一，石门非常荣幸地错过了所有的出镜机会，所以，它打算用静坐表示自己的抗议，虽然并没人在意。

One of the sets in the Shackling Prison where much of the drama occurs. The stone door is very privileged to have missed all the chances to appear thus far. Therefore, it has decided to sit in silent protest, although no one will notice.
左目洞观过去，罪业查察。右眼凝视现在，赏善罚恶。
The left eye uncovers the past and investigates sin. The right eye gazes into the present, rewarding good and punishing evil.
镇守牢狱的青铜兽面怒目圆睁，俯视押送至此的罪囚。时常会有罪犯在这里吓破了胆，只能被冥差抬进幽囚狱。

The bronze beast that guards the Shackling Prison looks down in rage at the prisoners that have been escorted here. Occasionally, prisoners will be scared witless here and have to be carried into the Shackling Prison by the spiritfarers.
「幽狱大门到底有没有防夹感应呢？」这是你此刻最想知道的问题。
"Does the Shackling Prison gate have anti-pinch protection after all?" This is the question you most want to know right now.
很遗憾，没有。你从令人眩晕的夹缝中逃得一命，获得了有一个有用的冷知识。
Unfortunately, no. You narrowly escaped from the dizzying gap, gaining an unexpectedly useful piece of trivia.
幽狱大门没有防夹感应。但即使这样，也阻止不了你在夹缝中寻求乐趣的闲情雅致。
The Shackling Prison's gate lacks anti-pinch sensors. Nevertheless, this doesn't stop you from seeking leisurely elegance in the gap for fun.

Aerial surveillance system online, visitor information confirmed. {NICKNAME}, logging in... Log-in successful. Visitor is confirmed to not be a member of the Ten-Lords Commission. A portion of prisoner information will be blocked during this investigation.

跳舞的囚犯。

文森特•维塔。
Vincent Weta.
你猜，我想不想猜。
Guess if I want to guess or not.
我是～跳舞的囚犯！
I am~ The dancing convict!
看见这囚犯的精神状态，就算是千年寒冰也忍不住被他的热情感染。
Even the coldest of hearts would be thawed by the warmth of this convict's enthusiastic mentality.
《持续跳舞的人和悬浮的物体》
The Ever-Dancing Man and Floating Objects
让所有的舞步都在内部以美好的形式共存
May all of our dancing steps be united in the form of inner beauty.

A blessing from a Simulated Universe.
怪异的山水画。
A haunted landscape painting.
寒假练习册。
A homework exercise book.
我是～怪异的山水画！
I am~ A haunted landscape painting!
悬浮的画卷里传来阵阵嬉笑，在云烟缭绕的山间，墨客们吟诵出诗谣。
Bursts of laughter come from the floating scroll as clouds roll over the mountains within, and scholars recite poems.
《关于仙舟传统文人山水画在银河当代艺术语境下的处境》

作者对仙舟传统纸本水墨材料与技法的深耕，使其艺术作品在保留了传统审美的前提下展现出独属于此刻的视觉感受和当代纬度

The author's in-depth study of Xianzhou traditional ink, paper materials, and techniques allows this piece to maintain traditional aesthetics, while displaying a unique visual perspective and also the scope of contemporary work.
材质：纸本水墨，不明液体
Materials: Ink and paper, unknown liquid

硅原-Ⅱ的海螺在进化中，逐渐学会了模仿捕食者的样貌。现在，任何食用它们的人都会触犯人道主义保护条例。

木人桩得意地向你招招手，邀你与它比上一场，如果它真有手的话。

I have been blessed with Abundance since birth, which caused my body to grow far larger than the average person's. It was then that I discovered I'm scared of heights...

被封印的半身。
A sealed bust.
我是～碑中的歌者！
I am~ The singer in the stone!
石碑上的歌者狰狞地狂笑着，身体左右摇摆，让你想起了鮟鱇鱼头顶的饵。
The singer on the stone tablet wears a hideous and wild smile. Their body sways side-to-side like the lure on the head of an angler fish.
四角方正的硬质屏幕，因此得名「四方览镜」，不过是民用版。仙舟语言真的很好懂。
The Foursquare Mirror, which is the civilian version, is named after its screen in square shape. The Xianzhou dialect is very easy to understand.
能够遍览四方的硬质屏幕，因此得名「四方览镜」，不过是民用版。仙舟语言真的很难懂。
The Foursquare Mirror, which is the civilian version, is named after its screen that allows its users to view every corner of the world. The Xianzhou dialect is very confusing.
仙舟人称其为「四方览镜」——可它不就是个电子显示屏吗？
People in Xianzhou call it a Foursquare Mirror. Isn't it just an electronic display?
笨重的电子显示屏。除了用于广告轮播或展示重要信息外，还能让整个洞天看起来充满科技感。
It is a bulky electronic display. Besides being used to display advertisements and important announcements, it can make the delve look futuristic.

普通的卷轴，没有记载自过去到未来的一切记录。这意味着阅读其内容毋须支付任何代价——不会瞎，不会发疯，更不会失去生命。
It is an ordinary scroll without any record of the past or the future. You do not have to pay any price for reading it — you won't go blind, lose your mind, or be killed.
你打开卷轴，看到其中的仙舟文字飘逸如画。这很有可能是仙舟民常说的「书法」作品，但是数字化产物。
You open the scroll and find Xianzhou words written in artistic style inside. It is likely to be a work of calligraphy, as the Xianzhou citizens often call it, but it is in digital form.
观看这卷轴无法使你习得任何魔法，更无法增长能力，还是放弃吧。
You won't learn any magic or improve any of your skills by staring at the scroll. Just give up.
貌似卷轴，但实际上是可供悬浮阅读的柔性屏「展阅」，广受仙舟民喜爱。
It looks like a scroll, but it is actually a flexible display that can float in the air. It is popular among the Xianzhou citizens.
你听瓦尔特说起过，银河中的某个哲人国度将鸟笼视为冠冕——但他们究竟是怎么把脑袋塞进去的？
According to Welt, some philosopher country in the cosmos regards the birdcage as their crown. How on earth do they fit their head into the thing?
一座鸟笼，曾经关押着一只向往自由的灵魂。
A soul that yearned for freedom was once kept imprisoned in this birdcage.
鸟笼，看起来不太宜居。这可能正是你在其中找不到鸟的原因。
A birdcage that does not look very comfortable. That might be the reason why you can never find birds inside it.
据说仙舟民以宠物健壮庞然为美，可这笼子看起来实在是太小了。
It is said that Xianzhou citizens prefer large-sized pets that are strong. In light of that, this cage seems way too small.
笼中无鸟，这也许是对自由生命最好的隐喻。就让牢笼空置着吧！
A cage without a bird is probably the best metaphor for a life of freedom. Just let the cage be empty!
关于竞锋舰引擎运作的原理，不同人有过不同的猜想：中子碰撞、反物质、黑洞坍塌、虚数弹…或许，这些你熟悉的技术名词都无法解释它的科技。

Different people have various guesses about how the Skysplitter's engine operates: Neutron collisions, antimatter, collapsing black holes, Imaginary Bombs... Maybe even these familiar technical terms can't even explain its technology.
无论它是何种科技，在幻戏作品中，引擎总是舰船最薄弱的环节。就像是神话中无敌的英雄都有一处致命弱点，无敌的舰船也无法例外。

No matter what kind of technology it runs on, in immersias, the engine is always the weakest part of the ship. Just like how invincible heroes in mythology always have a fatal weakness — invincible ships are no exception.
按照常识来说，正在万丈高空上航行的舰船是不能容许有任何差错的。不过，任谁都会遐想「要是这艘船突然失去动力，云骑军究竟该如何空中大救援？」

Typically speaking, a ship flying at high altitude can't afford to make any mistakes. But, one can't help but think: "If this ship suddenly malfunctions, how exactly would the Cloud Knights mount a rescue?"
赶得早不如赶得巧，要不趁现在想象一下如何？
Well, since you're here already, why not take the opportunity to imagine how things will play out?
尝试想象一下。
Attempt to imagine.
那么请闭上眼睛。
Please close your eyes.
为了方便你的代入，现在要为你构建一个紧张刺激的情景。请你在原地给自己添加一些*颠簸感*，毕竟现在这是失事的竞锋舰——
To make immersion easier, we need to build an exciting scenario. Please add a little turbulence to where you are now. After all, now the Skysplitter is facing a crash.
你是一名地衡司的王牌执事，得知有人打算*炸掉竞锋舰*，你千辛万苦登上竞锋舰后，犯人告诉你，他在竞锋引擎上安装了*定时炸弹*。

You are a highly decorated officer of the Realm-Keeping Commission who has heard that someone is planning to blow up the Skysplitter. After you painstakingly board the ship, the criminal informs you that he has already installed a time bomb in the engine.
一旦竞锋舰的航行速度低于某个数值就会引起爆炸…就在此时，你注意到竞锋舰引擎停止了运行，竞锋舰正在失速……
Once the Skysplitter's speed drops below a certain threshold, it will detonate the bomb... At this point, you notice that the Skysplitter's engine has stopped running, and it's losing speed...
好了，现在请睁开眼睛。
Okay, please open your eyes.
这不会是真的吧？
This can't be real, can it?
请不要问如此破坏气氛的问题，专注于眼前！
Please don't ask such vibe-killing questions, pay attention!
告诉我，我该怎么做！
Please tell me what I should do?
不愧是王牌执事，但是如何做，这需要你自己判断。
No doubt you're a top-class officer. But, regarding how to proceed, you must make your own judgment.
引擎停止运行，竞锋舰速度低于一定程度，定时炸弹就会爆炸；可要是定时炸弹到了一定时间，它也会爆炸，你会怎么做呢？

The engine has stopped functioning, and once the Skysplitter's speed drops below a certain threshold, the time bomb will explode. But it will also explode once it reaches a certain time. What will you do?
先拆掉炸弹，一了百了！
Disarm the bomb first, and solve the problem at its root.
你很冷静，也许这就是一针见血的解法——
You're very calm, so perhaps this is a straightforward solution...
剪蓝色的线。
Cut the blue wire.
剪红色的线。
Cut the red wire.
两条线一起剪。
Cut both wires together.
你蒙对了，定时炸弹恼人的声音停了下来。
You guessed right — the annoying sound of the time bomb has stopped.
可是舰船的失速却愈演愈烈，你开始感觉到重力不在你的脚下——
But the ship's deceleration is intensifying. You begin to feel gravity slipping away from under your feet...
先恢复引擎，保持航速！
Restart the engine, and maintain cruising speed!
你很冷静，要是保持航速，应该还有拆除炸弹的时间！
You're very calm, if you can maintain cruising speed, there should still be time to disarm the bomb!
启动备用能源。
Activate backup power.
瞬间重启引擎。
Immediately restart the engine.
引擎似乎没有按照你预想的情形发展，可恶，还能做些什么吧？
The engine restart did not go according to plan. Darn it, what can you do?
定时炸弹的声音越来越急促，不知是时间快到了，还是临近了最低速度——
The ticking from the time bomb becomes more pressing. Not sure if it's almost out of time or nearing the lowest possible speed...
先冷静一下，有尼古丁吗？
Need to calm down, anyone got a smoke?
不好意思，王牌执事可没有这样的习惯。你只能先吃个棒棒糖平替一下。
Sorry, high-achieving officers can't have such bad habits. You can only have a lollipop to calm down.
据说适当补充糖分，对需要动脑子的人来说很重要——
It's said that replenishing sugar is crucial for people who need to rack their brains.
意外发生了，在混乱之中，突如其来的杂物击中了你的后脑勺，你失去了意识……
The accident happens, and amongst the chaos, a sudden piece of debris strikes the back of your head. You lose consciousness...
很可惜，竞锋舰在天空中被炸成了肮脏的烟火。
Unfortunately, the Skysplitter is blasted into dirty fireworks in the sky.
全剧终。
The end.
想象体验就到此结束了。和平来之不易，请一定好好珍惜。
The imaginary experience ends here. Peace is hard-won, please treasure it.
不要，我要走了！
No, I'm leaving!
行，你随时可以回来。
Sure, you can return anytime.
数控屏显示有关竞锋舰的一切：剩余燃料、进出星槎数据、火力控制、雷达扫描、气象观测、各舱段的闸口通道。这里是竞锋舰的的控制台。

The numerical control screen displays all data regarding the Skysplitter: Remaining fuel, starskiff traffic data, firepower control, radar scans, weather report and access to each zone passage. This is the control console of the Skysplitter.

在你不存在的记忆中，仿佛看到了一位目光坚定的军人——永远沉静，能够看到别人看不到的更远的地方。
In your non-existent memory, you seem to see a soldier with a firm gaze — forever silent, able to see a faraway place that's unseen by others.
你看到战争中必败的结局，伪装必胜的信念，并在绝望的战争中用尽手段去延续文明，现在你掌握了操作台。

You witness the inevitable defeat in the war, yet you maintain an unwavering belief in victory. Employing any and all means possible to extend the lifespan of civilization in this hopeless war, you now hold control of the console.

"Skysplitter, advance four!"

All crew members of the Skysplitter must enter cryostasis. The Skysplitter will also reach fifteen percent of light speed.
进入休眠之前，你似乎听到有人在说「我想为人类文明保留一颗种子。」
Before entering hibernation, you seem to hear someone say that they wish to preserve a seed for human civilization.
立即开火还击！绝不手软！
Open fire immediately and retaliate! Show no mercy!
当然可以，船长。请您输入语音秘钥！
Of course, captain. Please enter your voice password.

话糙理不糙，但是下次设置语音秘钥时，请注意你的语言。

"Sergeant, bring me my dang cannon!"

Firstly, I'm not a Sergeant. Secondly, I've already brought your orbital cannon.
「犯我联盟者，必击而破之！」
"Those who defy the Alliance shall perish!"
很好！此时此刻，你感觉到自己热血沸腾。
Awesome! At this moment, you feel your blood boiling.

开炮——！
Fireeeee!
一瞬间舰炮齐射，在炮弹的烟幕之中，敌我舰队都归于沉默。

「请站稳扶好，禁止嬉戏打闹」。每一条看似废话的规则的背后或许都是真实而惨痛的案例——你不禁想象没有站稳扶好的人后来掉到哪里去了。

"Please stand firm and hold on. No fooling around." A real and painful incident may be concealed behind every seemingly trivial rule — you can't help but imagine where those that didn't stand firm ended up falling.
这与停靠在星槎海码头的星槎相比，似乎是多了些玦轮。混合动力的星槎引起了一轮星槎革命——超远的行程，超低的能耗，遥遥领先。

Compared to the starskiffs docked at Starskiff Haven, this one seems to have a few more jade wheels. The hybrid-powered starskiff has sparked a starskiff revolution — ultra-long haul, ultra-low energy consumption and industry-leading.
曾经有名飞行士驾驶着这样的竞速级星槎，只用<unbreak>12</unbreak>秒差距就完成了灰穹航线。这件壮举也成为了那名飞行士一辈子的谈资。
There used to be a pilot who flew a racing-class starskiff and made the Gray Sky Route in twelve parsecs. This magnificent feat became a lifelong bragging right for the pilot.
人们总说「生活在别处」，但美食往往也在别处。难道仙舟之外的零食会更好吃一些吗？不一定吧，但是它一定会更贵一些。
People always say that "life is elsewhere," but so is good food. Could snacks beyond Xianzhou be tastier? I'm not sure, but they're probably more expensive.
有人赞美食品工业化！它让商店里的所有食物都达到了「可以入口」的标准线。也有人诅咒食品工业化！它让商店里的所有食物都达到了「可以入口」的标准线。

Some laud the industrialization of food! It has allowed all store-sold food to attain the "edible" standard. Others curse the industrialization of food! It has allowed all store-sold food to attain the "edible" standard.
有食客信誓旦旦称，这些来自匹诺康尼的美味小食没有梦的味道。看来，美梦也有保质期。
There are customers who would swear by their mothers that these delicious snacks from Penacony don't taste like dreams. It appears that even dreams have best-by dates.
匹诺康尼的食品厂商为了罗浮本地食客的口味和习惯，特地开发了「陈婆豆腐」口味的爆米花…销量惨淡。
To cater to the tastes and habits of the Luofu's customers, Penacony's food vendors specially developed popcorn in the Granny Chen's Tofu flavor... Its sales were dismal.
希望未来在匹诺康尼的零售商店里，不会出现苏打豆汁儿口味的限量款苏乐达。
The hope is that Penacony's snack stores won't carry limited-edition mung bean soda flavored SoulGlad in the future.
吧台上陈列了不同口味的苏乐达。冰点款、经典款、劲爽款、无气款…唯独没有无糖款。看来苏乐达™也有它的底线，唯有糖浆不可妥协。

SoulGlad of various flavors line the bar top: Subzero, Classic, Power Refresh, Uncarbonated... Only the sugar-free variety is missing. It appears there is a bottom line that SoulGlad™ won't compromise on, especially when it's about syrup.
没有准备冰柜，这是苏乐达在仙舟销量不好的主要原因。
There are no refrigeration appliances prepared — this is the main reason that SoulGlad sales aren't doing well on the Xianzhou.
豆知识，苏乐达™早些年为了抢占仙舟饮料市场，曾用过「好梦气泡饮」的注册名，但显然它不如「苏乐达」朗朗上口。
Trivia: In the earlier years, SoulGlad™ once used the registered name "Sweet Dreams Soda" to try to capture Xianzhou's beverage market, but it was obviously not as catchy as SoulGlad.
你本应该看着这两只机巧鸟产生哲学的思考「鸟为什么会飞？」但你观察了一段时后，改变了思考命题——「这俩傻鸟为什么不会飞？」

Gazing at the two cycranes, you are supposed to philosophically ponder the question: Why do birds fly? But after a period of further observation, you decide to change your inquiry: Why can't these two dumb birds fly?
曾经有人把机械臂拼装星槎的视频放到网上，由于过程因极其解压而大受好评，登上了首页推荐——精确，稳定，可控，简直是心灵按摩。

Someone posted a video of a robot arm attached to a starskiff on social media. The whole DIY process was so de-stressing to viewers that it went viral and was trending on the homepage — precise, stable, controllable, like a massage for the soul.
对于那艘星槎来说，它会觉得这是一种被拿捏的感觉吗？
As for that starskiff, would it have felt like it was being manipulated and toyed with?
在不同文明中，设计自动化工程的设计师都有共同的特性——就是懒。自动化设计的初衷都是为了更好地偷懒，所以换句话说，偷懒是科技进步的重要助力。

In different civilizations, automation designers all share a common trait — indolence. The objective of automotive design is to do less and more efficiently. In other words, laziness is the key driver of the advancement of technology.
竞锋舰虽然吨位较小，但是天才的工造司设计师却在它的身上实现了主流的大吨位配置——大口径主炮，数量众多的速射副炮，看啊！这就是超强火力给云骑军的自信。

The Skysplitter may be smaller in tonnage, but the genius designers at the Artisanship Commission managed to equip it with features that are available on larger ships — a large-caliber main gun and numerous rapid-fire auxiliary guns. Behold! This overwhelming firepower is what gives the Cloud Knights their confidence.
工造司的设计师说「要有炮塔」，于是炮台出现。工造司的设计师说「要有更多的炮塔」，于是更多的炮台出现。工程师说「还不够」，于是你看到了竞锋舰。

The designers at the Artisanship Commission said, "Let there be turrets," and there were. The designers at the Artisanship Commission said, "Let there be more turrets," and there were more. Then the engineers said, "It's not enough," and thus you see the Skysplitter.
数量众多的炮塔，铆接的工艺技术，蒸汽机的审美传统，刚性悬挂…美哉！壮哉！多就是好，大就是美！如果你失败了，那是因为你的炮塔还不够多！

Numerous turrets, riveting craftsmanship, the traditional aesthetics of the steam engines, rigid suspensions... How beautiful! How magnificent! More is superior, and bigger is grander! The only reason for your failure is not enough turrets!
真理就在射程范围之内，这是寰宇皆通的准则。
Truth lies within shot range, this is a universal principle.
一个人的一生中，也许会迷惑，也许会恐惧、会埋怨。但他/她只要扣响舰船上的炮塔，就会从中收获信心与力量，他/她会始终热爱帝弓信仰，他/她会始终热爱多炮塔！

In one's life, there may be confusion, fear or resentment. But as long as they fire the ship's turrets, they will gain confidence and strength. They will always cherish the faith in the Reignbow and love having multiple turrets.
如果你提议在星穹列车的车顶也安装几门巨炮，不知道帕姆会不会同意呢？杨叔应该会投下赞同票吧，对此，你满怀信心！
If you suggest installing several mega cannons on the roof of the Express, you wonder if Pom-Pom will agree. Mr. Yang will probably cast a vote of approval — you're confident about this!
快递箱，备注一栏填写了：「拜托，千万别把货物名称写在上面」。
There is a remark written on the label of the courier package: "Please do not put the name of the goods on this."
你把目光上移，在信息栏里看到了「机巧人偶，陪伴型」。箱子上坑坑洼洼的砸痕证明了收货人的愤怒。

You move your eyes up at the information column and see a phrase that reads, "Ingenium Puppet, designed for companionship" The battered condition of the package indicates that it has been smashed repeatedly by its angry recipient.

It's exactly as I said, I think that someone's hiding here and watching me from the shadows. It's gotten my steel feathers somewhat ruffled, but I can't seem to find anything.
你为什么不找？
Why aren't you looking then?

I can't find anything, that's why I'm asking you. I get the feeling that someone's hiding here and watching me from the shadows — it's gotten me a little anxious.

Just see it as doing a good deed in passing. You can borrow my bird and take a look around. Once you've found that hidden person, please bring me along.
一只快递箱，以不太体面的方式出现在了地面上。原本尖尖的边角瘪了进去。

它没有伤到谁吧？如果它太坚固，那么受伤的也许会是某人；如果它不太坚固，那么受伤的也许会是货物…唉，做快递盒真难。

你见过许多快递盒，但从没一只像眼前这样，它在微微颤抖，犹如雨巷里被遗弃的小狗。「别、别过来！」它好像在对你说话。

You have come across many courier packages, but none of them is like the one before you. It trembles slightly like an abandoned puppy on a rainy day. "D—Don't come closer!" It seems to be talking to you.
「你吃了什么不干净的东西？你为什么在不停打颤？」你无声发问。
"Did you eat things that had gone bad? Why are you trembling?" You ask in your mind.
「没、没什么。」纸盒竭力装作一副若无其事地样子。但颤抖出卖了它内里的恐慌。
"I—I'm okay." The package tries its best to look fine, but its trembling reveals its anxiety.
「一只手机罢了…」快递盒细声解释，向后微微退却。
"It's just a phone..." The package explains in a feeble voice while backing away slightly.
「真的吗？我不信。」也许是炸弹上的钟表，也许是被不幸封进箱子的小动物，也许…某种更隐秘的东西。你的好奇心驱使着你，为了仙舟安危，你必须知道真相。

"Really? I don't think so." Perhaps, what's inside is the clock on a bomb, a poor animal, or something even more mysterious. As your curiosity gets the better of you, you are bent on finding out the truth for the safety of the Xianzhou.
你上前一步，正要摸上纸盒的封条时，它突然爆发出一阵更剧烈的晃动，再也没有任何反应。
You take a step forward. Just as your hand is about to touch the tape on the package, the package starts shaking vigorously before it stops moving.
你被吓了一跳，难熬的心痒瞬间烟消云散。无论里面原本装着什么，它都再也动弹不得了。咱们还是别打开它比较好。
Horrified, your heightened curiosity dissipates all at once. No matter what's inside, it's best that you stay away from the package. No one should ever open it.

怎么会有人不吃不喝不睡觉一直躲在那种地方啊？
Why would someone hide in such a place without food, drink, or sleep?

自从找到那个怪人之后，我的心里舒坦了不少，这是你应得的奖励。看来我这鸟，今晚能睡个好觉了！谢谢你！
I've felt much better since we found that weirdo. Here's your reward. I will sleep soundly tonight! Thank you!
一只精美的纸鸢，位列仙舟孩子最爱玩具排行榜第二，仅次于合金超可动神霄雷府总司驱雷掣电追魔扫秽天君。
A beautiful kite is the second most popular toy among Xianzhou children, just behind the alloy Lightning-Wielding Thunder-Clapping Spirit-Squashing Lord.
精美的纸鸢，最早被用于纪念天舶司阵亡的飞行士。如今，仙舟人已将这种慎终追远的仪式情怀融入到平凡的日常生活中。
Kites were first used to commemorate the fallen pilots of the Sky-Faring Commission. Now, the Xianzhou natives have incorporated the remembrance of the heroes in the past into their daily lives.
有经验的仙舟人会告诉你：当纸鸢飞在天上时，远离它的线——据说在强风加持下，纸鸢线足以将疾驰的星槎一分为二。

An elderly Xianzhou native would advise you to stay away from the thread when a kite is flying in the sky. It is said that the thread will be powerful enough to split a speeding starskiff into two with the help of a blustery wind.
据说罗浮的玩具商已经研发出了遥控纸鸢，但许多纸鸢爱好者将其斥为「亵渎」。

This massive calculation device called a "loom" is extremely safe to use. If anyone gets stuck in it, the device will immediately stop operating. However, you should never try it lightly, as you will have to fork out a hefty sum as compensation.
这是「织机」，一台精密的术算机，用于码头调度。可为什么要将这种精密仪器露天摆放呢？答案很简单：司辰宫里放不下。
The loom is a precise calculation device used to manage the dock. Why is such an important instrument placed in the open? The answer is simple: It's too big to fit inside the Palace of Astrum.

仙舟洞天与外界的唯一门户，化外民须经过天舶司重重盘查方可从此处入境。
It is the only gate that connects the Xianzhou delve to the outside world. Outworlders must go through a stringent check of the Sky-Faring Commission before they can enter the delve.
玉界门无凭无依地悬浮于不远处的天空中，那光线似乎有些刺眼。
Somewhere not far away, the Jade Gate hovers in the sky with nothing to support it. The light it radiates is somewhat glaring.
化外民通常会把玉界门当作入境后见到的第一个仙舟奇观。但绝大多数人根本意识不到，自己正处于这宇宙最为壮美的奇观之一当中。

Outworlders usually consider the Jade Gate as the first spectacular sight they encounter after entering the Xianzhou. However, most of them are unaware that they are in the middle of one of the most magnificent wonders of the universe.
一台物流鸟架。物流机巧鸟以此为节点，共同编织罗浮庞大的物流网络。
It is a Cycrane Stand. An extensive courier net in the Luofu is created by courier cycranes using the nest as a node.
在物流机巧鸟尚未被发明时，罗浮人一直在训练真正的鸟来送货——极高的丢件率促成了物流机巧鸟的诞生。
Before courier cycranes were invented, the Luofu people trained real birds to deliver their goods. The extremely high rate of goods being lost led to the creation of courier cycranes.
据说三只物流机巧鸟就可以拖着星槎上天。曾有人试图求证这一说法，至今下落不明。
It has been put about that three courier cycranes are strong enough to lift a starskiff. Some people have tried to verify the rumor, but they have never been heard of since.
化外民总会将鸟架误认为是用于安保摄像的装置。然而，用于安保摄像的机巧鸟平时都在洞天高空巡航，鲜少落地抛头露面。

Outworlders often mistakenly believe the Courier Nest is a device with a surveillance camera. The truth is, the cycranes that function as surveillance cameras are usually patrolling in the sky and rarely seen on the ground.
「越古博戏，陡增智力——好玩尽在帝垣琼玉！」
"Come and play the ancient game that keeps your mind sharp! Celestial Jade has all the fun games you ever need!"
这副广告上画着一张巨大的帝垣琼玉牌，用它砸人一定很疼吧。
A gigantic celestial jade is drawn on the billboard. It must hurt a great deal to be smashed by it.
「丹鼎药理」四字占据了广告最显眼的位置，证明了它高贵的出身——六御之一的丹鼎司。
The words "Alchemy Pharmacology" occupying the most conspicuous spot on the billboard manifests its distinguished origin — the Alchemy Commission, one of the Six Charioteers.
广告四角写着「百毒不侵」。这会不会涉嫌虚假宣传了？
The phrase, "Immune to All Poisons" is written on the four corners of the billboard. Is this considered false advertising?
广告右侧写着「丹鼎药理，有开必有合」，对侧则是「用药之机，有补必有泻」——虽然完全不知所云，但它足够朗朗上口，应当是一幅成功的广告。

On the right side of the billboard, it reads, "In Alchemy Pharmacology, every opening has a closure." On its opposite side, it reads, "In the knowledge of medicine, everything consumed will be excreted." Although one can never make heads or tails of the phrases, they are memorable, making the advertisement a successful one.
「丹鼎药理，用药之机」小字陈列在广告上方。这广告究竟想表达什么？
"Alchemy Pharmacology is the master of medicine" is written on top of the billboard. What kind of message is this advertisement trying to convey?
「瑞兆玉石，决算千里。」
"The auspicious jade helps you foresee the future."
广告中画着一只极具科技感的玉制手镯——当然，也可能是其他仙舟特产生物复合材料。仙舟科技总能给你带来惊喜。
A futuristic-looking jade bracelet is drawn on the billboard. Of course, it might also be a biological composite unique to the Xianzhou. Xianzhou technology never fails to spring surprises on us.
「牵星锭锚，敢系巨舰于狂渊——工造司监制。」
"The star anchor is strong enough to tie a giant ship to an abyss — produced by the Artisanship Commission."
在仙舟，「工造司监制」就是高质量产品的代名词。这意味着你可以放心购买——如果你真的需要一只炫酷的船锚。
On the Xianzhou, "produced by the Artisanship Commission" is a guarantee of high quality, which means it is safe to buy the cool-looking ship anchor, if you really need one.
「二手旧货，精明生活的选择。」
"Pre-loved goods are the savvy choice."
一幅二手物件交易业务的广告画。尽管仙舟人对旧物没有特殊情感，但二手物件总归是要便宜些的。
It is an advertisement that promotes the business of selling second-hand objects. Used goods are always cheaper, though the Xianzhou natives do not have a passion for vintage.
「红梅芳喜芝兰茂，琴瑟和弦奏笙箫——来红梅佳缘，寻神仙伴侣。」
"A life lived in love will never be dull. Come to Bonds of Love to find your perfect match!"
罗浮上似乎还有名为「并蒂姻缘」的同类型公司，仙舟的婚恋交友市场竞争想必十分激烈吧。
There seems to be a similar dating agency named "Made in Heaven." The competition among dating agencies in Xianzhou must be stiff.
「鹤运速递，啥都能寄。」——鹤运物流宣传广告。
"Heron Express — We Mail Anything." It is an advertisement for Heron Express.
「鹤运物流，想寄就寄，随时随地都能寄。」——化外民{NICKNAME}。
"Heron Express — Mail anything you want anytime, anywhere." — {NICKNAME}, an Outworlder.
「铫煎黄蕊，一品沫饽。」
"Brew the leaves and enjoy the perfect liquid of amber."
宣夜大道上最知名的茶馆，汇聚了全罗浮最懂茶的客人。
It is the most famous teahouse on Starwatcher Avenue. Guests who are well-versed in tea knowledge in the Luofu gather there.
「雅舍欲迎，轻雨浥尘。」客栈的本名似乎也消隐在了广告词中——仙舟美学真是博大精深。
"This humble abode welcomes you, while a drizzle douses dust." The name of the inn is hidden in the message. The beauty of the Xianzhou language is impressive.
浥尘客栈原名「游云逆旅」，但老板觉得这名字无法体现出一间客栈应有的人文关怀，就此更名。
The Petrichor Inn was originally named the Cloud-Striding Hotel for Travelers Near and Far. Thinking that the name did not reflect the culture of the inn, the owner decided to change the name.
产自仙舟朱明的极品断纹瓷，流露出一种自然的美。
The exquisite porcelain with a cracked pattern was created in the Xianzhou Zhuming. It is beautiful in the natural sense.
巨大的瓷罐，说不定能把你整个装进去。
The giant porcelain jar might be large enough to fit your entire body.
每个人都曾好奇过这种用作摆设的高大瓷器内部装了什么，但俗话也说「好奇心害死猫」，所以还是算了吧。
It is hard not to be curious about what is stored inside the tall porcelain used as decoration. However, as the saying goes, "Curiosity killed the cat." Let's forget about it.
这尊瓷器看起来像是巨大的冰块——没准里面也封着反物质军团的虚卒呢。
This porcelain resembles a huge block of ice. Perhaps, some Voidrangers of the Antimatter Legion are frozen inside.
宇宙中充满了紧锁的门，仙舟罗浮自然也不例外。
The universe is full of locked gates, and the Xianzhou Luofu is no exception.
紧闭的门总能激起人探索的欲望，可惜它似乎不打算放你进去一探究竟。
People are always drawn to exploring the world behind the locked gates, but the gates have no desire of letting you in.
大门深锁，十分符合人们对小说中刑事案件现场的想象。
A locked gate is a must-have element of a crime scene pictured by most people.
每一扇门都有属于它自己的秘密，人也不外如是。
Just like humans, every gate has its own secret.
帝垣琼玉是仙舟联盟独有的棋牌游戏，据说已有上万年历史。
Celestial Jade is a board game unique to the Xianzhou Alliance. It is said to have been around for more than ten thousand years.
每座仙舟的帝垣琼玉规则各有不同，但顶级赛事大多以曜青为准——据说在帝垣琼玉传入塔拉萨后，也在那里诞生了全新的规则。

The game has different rules on different Xianzhou ships, but the rules in the Yaoqing are applied in most professional competitions. It is said that when the game was introduced in Thalassa, new rules were also created there.
这是玩「帝垣琼玉」用的牌桌。据说某位年轻卜者经常造访此处，但最近频率有所下降——仙舟科技在发展，她现在用玉兆也能打牌了。

This is the table used to play Celestial Jade. A certain young diviner is said to be a regular visitor of this place, but her visits have become less frequent lately. Following the technological advancement on Xianzhou, she can now play the game using a jade abacus.
联盟最强的牌手大多来自虚陵——他们将意识上传金人，几乎不与活物打交道。因此，他们会在脑内与自己斗牌，既砥砺了牌技，又排遣了寂寞。

Most of the top players of the alliance come from the Xuling. They transfer their consciousness to aurumatons and hardly interact with living creatures. With that, they can play against themselves in their minds to hone their skills and kill time.
这朵花本因仙舟曜青进行星槎种子研究时偶然得之，现却已成为风靡银河的热销产品，为联盟吸收了大量外汇——花的一生真是不可预料。

This flower, which is an unexpected product from a starskiff seed research conducted in the Yaoqing, is selling like hotcakes in the cosmos. They have earned a handsome amount of foreign currencies for the alliance. The life of a flower can be full of surprises.
它看起来是一盏灯，但其实是一朵花。使它发光的并非电力、湮灭效应、或者其他高深莫测的仙舟科技，而是水、阳光和一点点爱。

It might have an appearance of a lamp, but it is actually a flower. Its glow has nothing to do with electricity, the effects of annihilation, or other complicated Xianzhou technologies. Instead, it is the combination of water, sunlight, and a splash of love that does the magic.
这种花每隔约一千年便会结一次果。其果实味道鲜美，零糖零脂，广受健身人士好评。
The plant of the flower bears fruits once every thousand years or so. The fruit is delicious, sugar-free, and fat-free, making it well-loved by gym-goers.
博识学会认为这种花卉很可能有某种意义上的「情绪」，原因是其毫无缘由的明暗变化——毕竟心情不好的时候，谁都不想发光。

The Intelligentsia Guild believes that the flower is very likely to have different moods. It is because the brightness of its glow will change for no reason. After all, no one wants to glow when they are in a foul mood.
「通关入境——请配合司辰宫入港检查并办理相关手续。」
"Custom clearance. Please cooperate with the Palace of Astrum for the entry inspection and other related procedures."
一幅旨在提醒入境旅客配合通关检查的宣传画。
It is a poster designed to remind incoming passengers to cooperate with customs clearance.
一幅绘有天舶司标志的宣传画，出自谁人之手已不言而喻。
It is a poster with the logo of the Sky-Faring Commission. It is obvious who is its issuer.
宣传画中语气十分客气，应该不会有正常人抗拒检查吧。
The sentence on the poster is written in a courteous tone. In normal circumstances, there shouldn't be anyone resisting the inspection.
通常用于运输各种货物，但有时也会载着奇妙的人和事出现。
It is usually used to deliver goods, but it will sometimes carry special people and appear along with special events.
一艘小型货运星槎，看起来要比通常的星槎笨重许多。
A small freight starskiff that looks way bulkier than a normal starskiff.
据说是货运星槎，但似乎运力有限。
It is said to be a freight starskiff, but with a limited capacity.
货运星槎的保险装置紧锁，并不存在「随意开走」这种选项。
With the safety device of the freight starskiff tightly locked, the possibility of it being driven off by unauthorized personnel can be ruled out.
位于边角的小字提示你，此画描绘了星槎龙骨培育的全部过程。
The words in the corner inform you that the painting depicts the entire cultivation process of the starskiff's keel.
画面中充斥着异样的生物材料和数不清的术语，专业性简直要溢出画面了。
The screen is filled with unusual biological materials and lots of technical terms. That is a lot of knowledge to take in.
玉兆竟能经由生物科技生长成为可供驾驶的星槎——这是不是意味着玉兆也可以长成人形？
Surprisingly, a jade abacus can be cultivated into a fully functional starskiff through biological technologies. Does that mean a jade abacus can grow into a human form?
星槎的培育过程似乎与胚胎发育过程几乎无异。那么，星槎是否也是一种生物呢？
The cultivation process of a starskiff is similar to the one of a fetus. So, is starskiff a kind of creature?
「谨防泄漏——请注意操作规程，避免息壤过量增殖。」
"Leakage Precaution: Please follow the operating procedures to prevent the excessive proliferation of the Fallow Earth."
这幅宣传画充斥着刺眼的黄色，具有强烈的警告意味。
The poster uses bright yellow as its background to make sure people notice the warning.
画面中央的图案似乎描绘了某种怪异的生物组织突破收容的画面。星槎培育竟然如此恐怖吗？
The image in the center of the screen seems to illustrate the process of a bizarre biological tissue breaching its containment. Is the cultivation of a skarskiff such a terrifying process?
这是被称为「玦轮台」的充能装置，你几乎在每一个停靠星槎的港口见过它。
This is a charging device called a "jade wheel base." You can find it at almost every dock with starskiffs.
只要有星槎停靠在玦轮台旁边，它就会缓缓启动，保障星槎续航——如果没有，那么一定是因为星槎主人没有支付费用。
Once a starskiff is docked next to a jade wheel base, it will slowly start operating to charge the starskiff. If it doesn't, it must be because the owner has not paid for the service.
你不是星槎，你应该换个地方补充能量。
Since you aren't a starskiff, you cannot charge your energy here.
尽管迴星港的工人们称其为「失效的种子」，但它内部的玉兆和生物材料「息壤」早已被尽数回收。或许「失效的种皮」会更适合它。
Although the workers at the Stargazer Navalia refer to it as a "failed seed," the jade abacus and Fallow Earth inside it have been recollected. Perhaps, we should call it a "failed seed coat" now.
工匠们植入玉兆的生长信息有误、或是生物材料繁殖失控才导致了星槎种子生长失败——这枚可怜的金属壳并没有做错什么，它很无辜。

It was either the wrong jade abacus info entered by the craftsmen or the uncontrolled reproduction of the biological materials that led to the growth failure of the starskiff seed. The metal shell has done nothing wrong; it is innocent.
失效的种子不声不响，它只是等待着命运的降临。
The failed seed does nothing but waits for its destiny quietly.
迴星港里到处都是这种金属外壳——这星槎培养失败率是不是有点高？
Such metal shells can be found everywhere at the Stargazer Navalia. It seems like the failure rate of starskiff cultivation is quite high.
这曾经是被称为「培养液注射器」的生产装置，能够给培养舱补充营养。
This is a production device once called the "culture medium injector." It can provide the incubators with nutrients.
除了碳水化物和无机盐，培养液里肯定存在着神秘配方。但这恐怕涉及仙舟生物技术的核心机密，不应深究。

Other than carbohydrates and inorganic salts, there must be a secret ingredient in the culture medium. As it involves a highly classified the Xianzhou biological technology, you should not dig deeper.
迴星港里一定还存在着专门配制营养液的功能区，可惜你并不知道它究竟在哪里。
There must be a special region in charge of producing the culture medium in Stargazer Navalia. Unfortunately, you don't know where it is.
容器中装有星槎培养液。如果把它给帕姆照料的植物用会如何？
The vessel contains starskiff culture medium. What will happen if you use it on Pom-Pom's plants?
星槎种子野蛮生长，终于还是冲破了培养舱。
The starskiff seed sprouts in all directions and grows beyond the incubator.
种子内的生物材料渴望自由，终于摆脱了玉兆的「遗传信息」控制，才没有活成别人想要它成为的样子。
The biological materials in the seed yearn for freedom. Finally, it breaks free from the control of the jade abacus' genetic data and deviates from what others expect from it.
星槎种子脱离控制的姿态充满野性，极具美感。
The way the starskiff seed breaks free from the control is wild and beautiful.
也许可以将它拿去假装是根雕作品——就叫它「怒放的生命」吧。
Perhaps, you can treat it as a sculpture and name it the "Blossoming Life."
这是被称为「星槎种子」的复合构造体。
This is a composite named "starskiff seed."
星槎种子浸泡在富含营养的培养液中，如同一颗真正的种子——虽然有点像绕口令，但这实际上意味着星槎种子并非真正的种子。
Like a real seed, the starskiff seed is immersed in a culture medium full of nutrients. The concept might be confusing, but the starskiff seed isn't a real seed.
星槎种子内容物包括金属材料、生物材料，以及携带遗传信息的玉兆。遗传信息会确保种子顺利长成美观的星槎，而不是某种装置艺术。

A starskiff seed contains metal materials, biological materials, and a jade abacus that carries genetic data. The genetic data will ensure the seed grows into a visually-appealing starskiff instead of a piece of installation art.
以上知识点每年都会在廻星港工人年度考核试题中出现，请你务必记准记牢。虽然你在通常情况下不需要参与考核，但万一呢？

Please pay attention to the fact above, as it is often included in the annual examination of the Stargazer Navalia workers. Under normal circumstances, you are not required to take part in the exam, but it is better to prepare for the unexpected.
处在雏形阶段的星槎种子已颇具通常星槎的规模了。哇哦。
Wow! A starskiff seed in the embryonic phase is already the size of a fully-grown starskiff.
或许可以将已具雏形的星槎种子称作「星槎幼苗」？不，星槎种子并不是真的种子，它不可能长成幼苗。
Can we call a starskiff seed in the embryonic phase a starskiff seedling? We can't. As a starskiff seed isn't a real seed, it can't possibly grow into a seedling.
形似枝条的生物材料就像鸟巢。它轻轻托起星槎种子，后者仿若亟待孵化的雏卵。
The biological materials in the shape of branches work like a nest which gently supports the starskiff seed; the latter looks like an egg waiting to hatch.
如果你急需一台座驾，处在这一阶段的星槎安装玦轮后即可自由移动——当然，廻星港的工人和天舶司可不会同意的。

If you desperately need a vehicle, you can use the starskiff in the current phase to travel around after fixing it with a jade wheel. Unfortunately, the Stargazer Navalia workers and the Sky-Faring Commission will not approve the practice.
星槎种子演化出了船身、龙骨、甚至船蓬——生物材料根据功能需要，演变成不同的结构。工人们通常将这一阶段称作「育成阶段」。

A hull, a keel, and even a canopy have evolved from the starskiff seed, as the biological materials will grow into different structural parts according to the needs. The workers refer to this phase as the "nutritive phase."
就目前的完成度来看，让星槎飞上天恐怕还有些难度——但是将它放在水里应该是能漂起来的。
It is unlikely that the starskiff can fly in its current condition. Still, it should be able to float if placed in the water.
与成型的星槎作比较，它的面貌反倒显得更加苍老，非常适合那些喜欢坐在船头举杯邀月的文学家。
Compared to a completed starskiff, it has an even more worn-out appearance. It is perfect for scholars who like to enjoy the view of the moon while having a drink on the deck.
你注意到它在船尾留下了安转玦轮的圆孔。如果就在这里装上电扇或者轮胎会怎样呢？
You notice some round holes left on the stern for the installation of a jade wheel. What will happen if an electric fan or a tire is fixed on the spot instead?
完成组装的星槎停靠在迴星港港口，等待着它的是驶向未来的旅程。
The fully assembled starskiff is docked at Stargazer Navalia. A journey to the future is awaiting it.
如果各种星槎配件不用组装上去，而是同样由星槎种子演化形成，效率是否会更高呢？星槎工程师真该好好考虑这个想法的。
Will the process be more efficient if the components are evolved from the starskiff seed instead of being fixed on it at a later time? It is something the starskiff engineers should ponder about.
回顾整个制造星槎的过程，你的脑中不禁蹦出了「工业化」三个字。那么，「工业化」到底是什么呢？
Looking back on the manufacturing process of starskiffs, the term "industrialization" pops up in your mind. So, what does it mean?
这些精美的星槎静静停靠在出港口。未来，它们可能因为醉驾、追尾、路怒等各种交通意外报废——你不禁为星槎未知的命运捏了一把汗。

These exquisite starskiffs parked by the dock might be reduced into a pile of metal scraps in the future due to accidents caused by drunk driving, tailgating, and road rage. At that thought, you can't help feeling apprehensive about their destiny.
这座香炉没有任何气味，大概只是装饰品。
This incense burner has no smell. It is probably just a decoration.
据说能够营造出适合卜者们专心推演的沉静氛围，但你不清楚它是如何工作的。
It is said to be able to create a calming atmosphere that helps the diviners to focus on their work. Yet, you are not sure how it works.
比起香炉更像是落地灯，但绝大多数卜者坚称它是一尊香炉。
It looks more like a floor lamp than an incense burner, but most diviners insist that it is the latter.
一尊造型古典的香炉。
It is an incense burner with a traditional design.
有棱有角的玉兆晶石，是大衍穷观阵的重要组分。
The angular jade abacus crystal is a key component of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.
这块方形玉兆还没有录入任何信息，因此并未装入算机当中。
As no data has been entered into the square jade abacus, it is not fixed on the calculation device.
一尊方方正正的玉兆晶石。最好不要把它当作板凳——这可是精密仪器。
It is a square jade abacus crystal. Please bear in mind that it is a precise instrument, not a stool.
据称，篆刻于玉石晶格中的符篆和原理全都来自司「智识」命途的博识尊——那么，是否可以将这枚玉兆晶石视作星神的一部分呢？

The symbols and knowledge engraved on the jade abacus crystal are said to originate from the Nous, which is in charge of the Path of Erudition. So, is it safe to regard the jade abacus crystal as part of the Aeon?
此阵名为「宙合」，是大衍穷观阵的阵基之一，与其他阵基一同演绎着大衍万化之道。
This matrix is called the "temporal plane," and it is one of the base terminals of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Along with other base terminals, it carries out the way of all change.
检索「时间」的阵基，可以从变幻莫测的时间洪流中标定出与检索对象相关的时刻。
This is a base terminal of time. It can filter the moments relating to your target by searching from the unpredictable flow of time.
阵基如同从宇宙万事万物中接受信号的接受器，只有通过特定的阵型才能锁定特定的信息阵列。
The base terminal functions as a receiver that detects signals from everything in the universe. Only through the use of specific matrices can you locate the strings of information you need.
只有能量石的排列与大衍万象的昭示协同一致，阵基才能检索出对应的消息。
The relevant information can only be obtained when the energy stones are arranged in a pattern similar to the shape shown in the Mutare Magnus.
此阵名为「界寰」，是大衍穷观阵的阵基之一，与其他阵基一同演绎着大衍万化之道。
This matrix is called the "Spatial Terminal," and it is one of the base terminals of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Along with other base terminals, it carries out the way of all change.
检索「空间」的阵基，可以从寰宇诸界已知的全部地理信息中筛选出与检索对象相关的经纬。
This is a base terminal of space. It can filter the coordinates relating to your target by searching from all the known geographical information in the universe.

此阵名为「业成」，是大衍穷观阵的阵基之一，与其他阵基一同演绎着大衍万化之道。
This matrix is called the "Karma Terminal," and it is one of the base terminals of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Along with other base terminals, it carries out the way of all change.
检索「因果」的阵基，可以从古往今来无数事件中勾连出与检索对象相关的因果。
This is a base terminal of karma. It can filter the karma relating to your target by searching from all the events that have taken place in the past and present.
阵基如同从宇宙万事万物中接受信号的接受器，只有通过特定的阵型才能锁定特定的信息阵列。
The base terminal functions as a receiver that detects signals from everything in the universe. Only through the use of specific matrices can you locate the strings of information you need.

The relevant information can only be obtained when the energy stones are arranged in a pattern similar to the shape shown in the Mutare Magnus.
存放展阅的立柜，空间利用率属实不高。
A cabinet used for storing flexible displays with a poor space utilization rate.
储存了太卜司机要的诸多展阅，若想阅读必须获得太卜许可。
It stores many classified flexible displays of the Divination Commission. You must have permission from the master diviner to read them.
存放展阅的立柜，看起来倒像是某种热兵器。凭你对仙舟科技的了解，这种想法很可能是真的。
A cabinet used for storing flexible displays that look like some sort of thermal weapon. Based on your understanding of Xianzhou technology, you know your suspicion might be true.
收纳齐整的展阅，还是不要乱动为好。
It's best not to touch the neat array of flexible displays.
工造司能源之本「造化洪炉」，驱动着整个司部的正常运转。
The Creation Furnace provides energy to the Artisanship Commission and ensures its normal operation.
传闻中，造化洪炉中封存的能源是元素生命「岁阳」——它们在千年前进犯仙舟未果，由此被判令永世为仙舟联盟供应能源。

Rumor has it that the energy stored in the Creation Furnace is heliobus, an elemental being. A thousand years ago, the heliobi unsuccessfully attacked Xianzhou and was thus ordered to supply energy to the Xianzhou Alliance forever.
建木根须渴求着能量，因此破土而出，侵入了可怜的洪炉。
The roots of Ambrosial Arbor, which desperately need energy, rise from the soil and invade the poor furnace.
建木根须深入熔炉内部，贪婪地汲取「岁阳」的岁精能量，如同不知疲倦的抽水泵。
The roots of Ambrosial Arbor creep into the inside of the furnace where they absorb the heliobi's energy tirelessly like a water pump.
「内有金人守卫——请勿擅闯，后果自负。」
"This place is guarded by the aurumatons. Keep off at your peril."
工造司曾经指定谛听负责工造司重地守备，但它实在是过于可爱，便很快被凶恶的金人淘汰掉了。
The Artisanship Commission once appointed Diting to be in charge of the defense of the commission. However, it was soon replaced by the intimidating-looking aurumatons for looking too adorable.
「精密仪器，请勿触摸。」
"This is a precision instrument. Please do not touch."
旨在防止无关人员随意触摸精密仪器的宣传画。这种做法很有道理，毕竟谁也不能保证自己能打得过工造司制造的精密仪器。

The poster is designed to deter unauthorized personnel from touching the precision instrument. It is a reasonable measure, as no one can be sure that they can overcome the precision instruments made by the Artisanship Commission.
曾有人因随意触动穹仪导致洞天重力失常，令一半罗浮人罹患航天综合征——人们都说那是一场医学奇迹。

Someone once touched the Meridian Pin and caused a gravity anomaly in the delve. Because of that, half of the Luofu population suffered from spaceflight syndrome — a situation regarded by many as a miracle in the medical field.
不要随意触碰精密仪器。如果你执意如此，那么最好先给自己买好保险。
Do not touch the precision instruments. If you insist on doing so, you'd better get yourself insured first.
「金人偃偶，匠人赋魂——金人蓝图设计大赛招募中。」
"Bring your aurumaton puppet to life! The Aurumaton Design Competition is looking for contestants."
金人设计大赛包括了蓝图设计、胶板制作、零件组装、渗线喷涂、特效绘制、地台搭建等多个环节。如果你囊中羞涩，那最好别碰这个。

The Aurumaton Design Competition consists of various phases such as blueprint design, glue board making, parts assembly, hollow lines inking, special effects design, platform construction, etc. Do not be a part of this if you are not loaded.
金人设计大赛的宣传画。看来工造司的工作时间一定不饱和。
It is the poster for the Aurumaton Design Competition. It seems like those working at the Artisanship Commission have quite a lot of free time.
状如巨大卷轴的蓝图——仙舟民能把任何东西设计成卷轴的样子。
The blueprint is in the shape of a gigantic scroll. The Xianzhou citizens are capable of turning anything into a scroll.
工造司格物院设计的巨大蓝图，可能会在不久的将来变成金人偃偶找你切磋。
The gigantic blueprint is the brainchild of the Artisanship Commission's Sapientia Academe. It might turn into a giant aurumaton puppet that spars with you soon.
蓝图上绘制着各式各样的金人零件，颇具工业美感。
The wide array of aurumaton parts drawn on the blueprint is beautiful in the industrial sense.
在工造司，你甚至能看到正在疯狂内卷的蓝图。
At the Artisanship Commission, you can even gaze in wonder at the impossibly coiled blueprints.
不会动的金人就是好金人。
An aurumaton that doesn't move is a good aurumaton.
这台金人比你亲手粉碎的那些要稳重些——至少它们不会随意招惹你。
This aurumaton is more sensible than the one you destroyed; at least it won't mess with you for no reason.
这台金人正在享受它难得的美梦，还是不要去打扰它了。
Let's not wake the aurumaton up from its nice dream.
你很少见到如此安分守己的金人，且看且珍惜。
Such a well-behaved aurumaton is a rare find. You should appreciate it.
案牍库上的铭牌显示：「大敌名录」。
The plate on the file repository reads, "List of Archenemies."
你尝试触碰卷轴，手指碰到了无形的阻碍。看来你需要获得许可。
You reach out to the scroll, but your fingers are stopped by an invisible barrier. It seems like you need to get permission to touch it.
这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 孽物」。
The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Abomination."
你信手抽出了其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.
「步离人，灵长目 • 人科 • 犬亚种。丰饶之民中最强盛的一支，也是仙舟联盟长久以来的大敌。」
"Borisin: Primate, hominid, canine subspecies. They are the most powerful race of the Denizens of Abundance and have long been the arch nemeses of the Xianzhou Alliance."
「步离人具有部分犬类的解剖学特征。能征善战，擅以生物科技制造武器、铠甲甚至飞船，奴役并改造其他智慧种族在诸多星球间进行劫掠。」

"Borisin have some anatomical features of canines. Besides being valiant fighters, they excel at making weapons, armor, and even spaceships using biological technologies. They enslave and modify other intelligent races to attack and plunder other planets."
「至目前为止，步离人为首的丰饶之民联军至少与仙舟发生过三次大规模战争。随着前任战首被云骑拘囚，其势力大不如前……」

"The coalition of the Denizens of Abundance led by the borisin has had at least three large-scale wars with Xianzhou. Now, the coalition has become a shadow of its former self, following the capture and imprisonment of its former Warhead by the Cloud Knights..."

You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.
「造翼者，灵长目 • 人科 • 有羽亚种。丰饶之民中的一支。其记录上可追溯至仙舟启航前的『古国时代』。」
"Wingweavers: Primates, hominid, winged subspecies. They are one of the races of the Denizens of Abundance. Their history can be traced back to the Primeval Imperium Age before Xianzhou set sail."
「造翼者栖居于被称为『穹桑』的树状人工世界中，以其探出的『枝梢』跃迁至其他星球，夺取其上的资源。」
"Wingweavers live in a tree-like artificial world called 'Muldrasil.' From the protruding branches, they can warp to other planets and plunder the resources there."
「在造翼者文化中，不具备飞行能力的陆行生物均被称为『尘民』，而他们则自诩『云君』，奴役其他智慧种族为其生产、修葺穹桑。」

"In the culture of wingweavers, terrestrial animals that cannot fly are called 'Residents of Dirt,' while they call themselves the 'Cloudlords.' They enslave other intelligent races and make them produce resources and work on Muldrasil."
「随着反物质军团在宇宙中的肆虐，造翼者的根据地一度遭受极其惨重的破坏。穹桑被伐倒，而造翼者也成了丰饶之民中少见的雇佣兵种族……」

"After the Antimatter Legion took over the universe, the wingweavers' base of operations suffered severe damage. Muldrasil was cut down, and the wingweavers became a minority mercenary race among the Denizens of Abundance..."

「慧骃，灵长目 • 人科 • 有蹄亚种。丰饶之民中的一支。」
"Houyhnhnms: Primate, hominid, ungulate subspecies. They are one of the races of the Denizens of Abundance."
「慧骃一族为六肢动物，保有类似马匹的健硕躯干，后四肢着地，极善奔驰。」
"Houyhnhnms are six-legged animals with a muscular torso that looks like one of a horse. Their four hind limbs on the ground make them fast runners."
「受步离人的蛊惑，慧骃族常常担任其冲锋时的先驱，身着生物外骨骼装甲，能在冲撞间轻易击杀敌人。」
"Houyhnhnms are often induced by the borisin into acting as the forerunners at the frontline. They can kill enemies easily by ramming into them with their exoskeleton armor."
「有观点认为，反物质军团中『践踏者』的出现，意味着慧骃原有的文明遭受了反物质军团的打击和奴役……」
"Some view the emergence of Tramplers in the Antimatter Legion signifies the erosion and enslavement of the Houyhnhnm civilization by the Antimatter Legion..."

「岁阳，无形目 • 魂精科 • 岁阳亚种。世外妖魔族类的一支。」
"Heliobi: Shapeless, spirit essence, heliobi subspecies. They are one of the races of the Extraneous Demons."
「岁阳一族为不定形的纯能量生物，充满恶意，极为致命。其记录上可追溯至仙舟漂泊的『孤航时代』。岁阳降临仙舟，引发了『夺舍之祸』的一系列灾难。」

"Heliobi are shapeless creatures formed of pure energy. The history of this hostile and deadly creature can be traced back to the 'Lone Voyage Era' when Xianzhou was still wandering around. The arrival of heliobi in Xianzhou has triggered the 'Possession Tragedy.'"
「岁阳喜好寄生于有形身躯（通常为泛人类智慧种族），感应神经系统随情感而生的诸多变化。这种吃掉七情六欲的行为，会令不具形体的岁阳感到满足。」

"Heliobi like to parasitize physical bodies (usually those of the pan-human intelligent races) to experience the changes in the nervous system following different emotions. The shapeless heliobi take pleasure in feeding on emotions."
「在火劫大战尾声，岁阳一族已遭彻底禁绝。即便仅有极少数尚存于朱明仙舟之上……」
"Heliobi were wiped out toward the end of the Flaming Catastrophe. A small number of them could still be found on the Xianzhou Zhuming."

「视肉，原质目 • 原虫科 • 胶状原虫亚种。世外妖魔族类的一支。」
"Viscorpus: Eukaryote, protozoan, colloidal protozoan subspecies. They are one of the races of the Extraneous Demons."
「视肉是具有变形和增生能力的胶状原虫，智慧虽低，但极为致命。其行动模式与其说是敌人，不如说是一种病原体。」

"Viscorpi are a colloidal protozoan with the ability to change into different shapes and reproduce. Despite their low intelligence, they are extremely deadly. They attack like a pathogen instead of an enemy."
「关于视肉的最早记录上可追溯至仙舟漂泊的『孤航时代』。岱舆与圆峤两座仙舟均曾受视肉侵蚀，人口锐减。」

"The earliest record of viscorpi can be traced back to the Lone Voyage Era when Xianzhou was wandering around. The population of the Daiyu and the Yuanqiao once declined drastically due to the corrosion of viscorpi."
「联盟与步离人交战过程中发现，视肉本是步离人所控制的畜牧产物。但在变异失控后，步离人放任其成为肆虐星间的灾害。云骑军经年铲除，视肉这一大患已逐渐绝迹……」

"Amid a war against the borisin, the alliance discovered that viscorpi were once a kind of livestock controlled by the borisin. After the mutation went out of control, the borisin did nothing to stop the dangerous creatures from ravaging the planets. It took the Cloud Knights years to eliminate them. Now, viscorpi have gradually become eradicated..."

「绝灭大君，是『烬灭祸祖』纳努克所擢选的令使，「反物质军团」众多部队的领军者。他们受赐毁灭之力，为诸世界带去死亡和破灭。」

"The Lord Ravagers are the Emanators chosen by Nanook, the Ruin Author, and are the leaders of the Antimatter Legion troops. They are given the power of Destruction to bring death and havoc to worlds."
「相传纳努克座下共有七位大君，分别代表『毁灭』命途的七种极致倾向。」
"Rumor has it that Nanook has seven Lord Ravagers, each representing one of the seven extremes of Destruction."
「但有效情报甚少，其中至少仍有四位不知其名。太卜司仅能从各种观测记录与情报中推知其存在。」

"There is little information available about them, and the names of at least four of them are still unknown. The Divination Commission can only infer their existence from various observational records and intel."

「作为纳努克座下七位大君之一，『焚风』痴迷于事物在毁灭瞬间所爆发的力量与美感。他所拥有的力量，也足以让他取代千军万马，对一个世界下达死亡判决。」
"As one of the Seven Ravagers, Zephyro is obsessed with the power and beauty of the moment of destruction. Being as powerful as an army, he is capable of destroying worlds at will."
「曾点燃新伯利恒的太阳，以巨量辐射炙烤其地表，使之玻璃化；曾在亚甸星上掀起巨大的气旋，将其生态系统破坏殆尽……」

"He once ignited the sun of New Bethlehem, vitrifying its planetary surface with a huge amount of radiation. He once also created a gigantic vortex on Aedirn, dealing a devastating blow to its ecosystem..."
「焚风的出现预示着一颗星球即将经历最壮丽、也是最为迅速的毁灭。」
"The appearance of Zephyro signals that a planet will soon undergo its magnificent and rapid destruction."

「星啸是反物质军团的先锋将军，也是烬灭祸祖最常派遣的大君。其部队遍布银河，在群星间织出行军路径和毁灭的道路。」

"Celenova is the front-line general of the Antimatter Legion and the Lord Ravager most frequently dispatched by the Ruin Author. Her troops, scattered all over the cosmos, march to and fro among the planets as they bring about destruction."
「星啸所率部属与曜青、朱明与方壶仙舟的先遣部队均有交战记录。在云骑无畏的战斗下，她的计划并未得逞。」
"Celenova's troops have engaged in warfare with the troops of the Yaoqing, the Zhuming, and the Fanghu. Her plans were derailed by the Cloud Knights, who fought fearlessly."

「许多世界均自信于发达的科技所向无敌，尤其是公司所辖之处。但『铁墓』证明了他们的盲目乐观。」
"Many worlds, especially those under the corporation's control, believe that advanced technology has made them invincible. However, Irontomb has proven them wrong."
「在反物质军团入侵高度文明的世界时，纳努克会优先派出铁墓『静默』其科技。」
"When the Antimatter Legion is invading a highly civilized world, Nanook will first dispatch Irontomb to nullify its technology."
「所有生还者的证言都指出，用于捍卫行星的科技会陷入崩溃紊乱，最终甚至倒戈指向主人，受污染的通信频道中只回荡着几个词『智慧的溃败』」

"According to the survivors, the technology used to protect a planet will collapse and eventually even turn against its owner. In the corrupted communication channel, a voice echoes, 'The failure of knowledge.'"

Every stone lion at the Seat of Divine Foresight has a different name. Abiding by the traditional Xianzhou martial art ethics, they will greet their opponents by introducing themselves before the start of a battle. But now, few living people know their names.

宣传栏上写有大量有益于生活的小技巧，其中预防诈骗相关的内容约占八成。
Many life hacks are written on the bulletin board, eighty percent of which being related to fraud prevention.
其实宣传栏上的内容能够解决人们<unbreak>90%</unbreak>的问题，但从来没有人仔细阅读过它。
The content on the bulletin board can solve ninety percent of the problems faced by the citizens, but no one has ever taken the time to read them.
这面宣传栏似乎已经有段时间没有得到维护了。
This side of the bulletin board has fallen into disrepair.
这是「四方览镜」，每个地衡司公廨都至少有一台。执事们用它来整理信息、调取机巧鸟影像、汇总气象水文情况等，承担了公廨中绝大部分工作量。

This is a Foursquare Mirror, and every Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery owns at least one. The officers use it to sort out information, play videos taken by cycranes, and form weather forecast reports. It bears the bulk of the workload at the chancery.
每个新入行的执事都要通过「四方览镜操作测试」才能获得其使用权限。测试难度不低，有些人入职一年后才勉强通过。
Every newly-recruited officer must pass the Foursquare Mirror Operation Exam to be authorized to use it. The exam is quite tough, and it takes some officers one year to pass it.
据说玉阙的太卜司研发四方览镜的本意是用于操作瞰云镜。但后续测试结果表明这东西实在难堪大任，便将其配发给地衡司使用了。

It is said that the Foursquare Mirror was originally invented by the Divination Commission of the Yuque to control the Cloudpeer Telescope. Unfortunately, the tests showed that the device was unable to perform such a complicated function. That was why it was later sent to the Realm-Keeping Commission.
如果你仔细观察四方览镜的屏幕，会看到上面因静电附着有许多狐人的尾毛，但大家都不是很在意。可能只是一个无伤大雅的设计缺陷吧。

If you look at the screen of the Foursquare Mirror closely, you will notice the fur of foxians' tails attached on its surface due to static electricity. People generally aren't bothered by it, as it is just an insignificant flaw in its design.
在工作场所放置盆景可以有效提升工作效率。虚拟盆景会有同样的功效吗？
Placing bonsai trees in a workplace can improve work efficiency. Would a virtual one have the same effect?
你偶尔会听到司辰宫的员工称「那盆绿植如何如何」——但这玩意儿分明是蓝色的。
Occasionally, you will hear the workers at the Palace of Astrum talking about the green plants when the plants are actually blue.
据说这棵树会依外界环境变化自动生长出新的结构，所以太卜司常会派卜者定期前来修剪它的代码。
It is said that the tree will grow new parts in response to the changes in its surroundings. Hence, the Divination Commission will send diviners over regularly to trim its code.
这是蔷薇科李属的苍城梅，是仙舟苍城的本土物种。它随着苍城的毁灭一同灭绝，变成了如今发蓝光的样子。

The Cangcheng Plum Blossom, which belongs to the genus of Prunus and the family of Rosaceae, is a native species of the Xianzhou Cangcheng. It has become extinct following the destruction of the Cangcheng. Now, it has an appearance of a plant that gives out a bluish glow.
加入「歌舞社」——
Join the Song and Dance club —
可以显示罗浮各处环境的全息沙盘。在罗浮遭遇紧急情况时，它可以协助天舶司做出快速响应和精准决策。
The Holographic Sandpit displays the environment of every part of the Luofu. When there is an emergency, the Sky-Faring Commission can rely on it to make a prompt response and wise decision.
用于沙盘推演的全息投影。天舶司凭此物研究敌我双方动向，判断当前局势下的最优解。

It is the holographic projection used to display the sandpit simulations. The Sky-Faring Commission uses it to study the movement of allies and enemies and formulate the best plan for the current situation.
司辰宫员工会在下班后利用沙盘进行战棋游戏。驭空是其中一等一的高手，总能让其他员工失去游戏体验。
The workers at the Palace of Astrum use the sandpit to play warchess after work, and Yukong is the most excellent player among them. The game will lose all its fun when your opponent is Yukong.
司辰宫员工会在下班后利用沙盘进行战棋游戏。目前，司辰宫全体公认的最强玩家是一名清洁工——此人曾经三次击败驭空，被誉为「扫地军神」。

The workers at the Palace of Astrum use the sandpit to play warchess after work. Now, the best player hailed by the entire Palace of Astrum is a cleaner, who has defeated Yukong thrice and gained the title of "Broom Sage."
想去更刺激的社团…
I want to go to a more exciting Club...
同学，你一定不懂吧？
Oh, you don't get it, do you?
你，有家人吗？
Do you have family?
这和开赛车有关系吗？
What's this gotta do with racing?
折纸大学！我来啦——
Paperfold University! Here I come...
你是我们的骄傲！
You are our pride and joy!
咱家总算出了个大学生！
We finally have a college student in our family!
要不要转来财富学院？
Do you want to transfer to Fortune Academy?
有早八的课吗？
Are there eight AM classes?
毕业后包分配吗？
Does it include job placement after graduation?
…你还好吗？
...Are you okay?
就跟你说别喝那玩意…
I told you not to drink that stuff...
谁在苏乐达里掺豆汁啊！
Who mixed mung bean juice into SoulGlad?
完了，论文查重没通过。
Oh no, my thesis failed the plagiarism check.
查重率百分之八十…
The plagiarism rate is eighty percent...
你就不能稍微改改啊！
Can't you tweak it a little?
戏剧社首席非我莫属~
I'm the only choice for the Drama Club's president!
该…说实话吗？
Should... I be honest?
给她留点面子吧…
Save her some dignity...
我爱死这首歌了！
I love this song!
每首你都这么说…
You say that for every song...
我对这所学校失望至极。
I'm utterly disappointed in this school.
呃…这是现场采访哦？
Er... You know this is a live interview.
咳咳，我爱我的母校！
Ahem, I love my alma mater!
我跳得怎么样？
How were my moves?
像是在做广播体操。
It feels like doing radio calisthenics.
我的手机呢？
Where's my phone?
是不是落在后台了。
Did you leave it backstage?
您就通融通融吧…
Could you please make an exception...
不行，规矩就是规矩！
No, rules are rules!
演出太精彩了！
This show is so exciting!
简直就是专业乐队！
It's exactly like a professional band!
演奏水平也太高了吧。
The level of this performance is off the chain!
音乐派对正火热进行中。
The music party is in full swing.
本台记者为您报道。
This is a report from our station.
太好听了，简直是天籁！
It sounds like a bop. It's music from the heavens!
优雅、太优雅了！
Elegant. It's too elegant!
音乐使我升华！
Music elevates me!
摇摆，沉沦——
Fight it or rock with it!!!
我是乐队的粉丝！
I'm a fan of the band!
单推你们有十年了！
I've been a fan for ten years!
摇摆起来吧朋友们！
Let's rock on my friends!
加油！我会为你们应援！
Keep it up! I'm cheering you on!
我家的猫会后空翻！
My pet cat can do backflips!
这个段子过时啦！
This joke is so outdated!
…你真幽默。
...You're so funny.
假期打算怎么过？
What are your plans for the holidays?
在家睡觉。
Sleeping at home.
…要不还是去我那玩吧。
...Why not come over and play?
…到底落在哪了？
...Where did I lose it?
我珍藏的游戏卡带啊！
My precious game cartridge!
为什么要带来学校…
Why did you bring it to school...
我要提前毕业了！
I'm gonna graduate early!
你才一年级！
You're only in the first year!
学分已经修够了吗？
Have you completed enough credits?
这份外卖是你的？
Is this your takeout?
明明写着别人的名字！
It clearly has someone else's name on it!
你、你们听我解释——
Guys, guys, please hear me out —
要不我俩官宣得了！
Why don't we just make an official announcement?
这…能行吗？
Will... this work?
赶紧回去卖冰淇淋！
Come on! Let's go back and sell some ice cream!
可我想看音乐喷泉…
But I want to see the musical fountain...
老板人呢？
Where's the shopkeeper?
要不去吃点别的…
Let's go eat something else...
这是我的游戏奖品啊。
But this was my reward from the game!
买苏乐达送门票啦~
Buy a SoulGlad and get a free ticket!
违规倒卖，我要举报你！
I'm going to report your scalping!
这是在践踏粉丝的爱！
This is trampling on the passion of the fans!
看演出也好累啊…
It's tiring to watch performances too...
我才刚嗨起来呢！
I'm just getting started!
演出现场就涨价是吧？
Hiking up prices just because there's a show, eh?
…你怎么不去抢啊！
This is no better than daylight robbery!
没人比我更懂折纸大学。
No one understands Paperfold University more than me.
好困…呼…呼……
So tired... Zzz... Zzz...
那两个人在吵什么？
What are those two fighting about?
哎，竞选社团部长呢！
Oh, the run for the club president.
迎接玫瑰色的校园生活！
Embrace a rosy school life!
车窗外，这夜色~
I want you, to show me, your fantasy~
流光溢彩，流光溢彩~
your fantasy~
「文学部」了解一下？
Interested in the Literature Club?
快递箱，备注一栏填写着：「拜托，千万别把货物名称写在上面」。
There is a remark written on the label of the courier package: "Please do not put the name of the goods on this."
你把目光上移，在信息栏里看到了「机巧人偶，陪伴型」。箱子上坑坑洼洼的砸痕证明了收货人的愤怒。

You move your eyes up at the information column and see a phrase that reads, "Ingenium Puppet, designed for companionship" The battered condition of the package indicates that it has been smashed repeatedly by its angry recipient.
「租赁——全新鸢型商舸租赁，市舶备案文件齐全，随租随用，价格优惠。」
"Lease: A brand-new kite commercial fly ship is now available to be leased. The Maritime Trade Officer has all the necessary documents, so it is ready to be leased anytime at an affordable price."
一只快递箱，以不太体面的方式出现在了地面上。原本尖尖的边角瘪了进去。
There is a courier package in a pathetic state on the ground. The edges of the package are all indented.
你永远不知道租来的飞舸里藏着怎样的惊喜。或许还是驾驶自己的飞舸更省心些——如果你真的有。
You never know what to expect from a leased fly ship. Perhaps, it will be easier to use your own fly ship, if you have one.
它没有伤到谁吧？如果它太坚固，那么受伤的也许会是某人；如果它不太坚固，那么受伤的也许会是货物…唉，做快递盒真难。
It didn't hurt anyone, did it? If it's too sturdy, it might injure someone, but if it's too fragile, the goods inside might be damaged... Alas, it's not easy to be a courier package.
这是一只崭新的快递箱，表面没有任何纸质或数字单据能够表明它的身份。
This is an all-new courier package, with no stickers or other labels attached that could indicate its identity.
不久前，一位鬼鬼祟祟的、头戴蓝色鸭舌帽的人出于某种原因将它遗弃在了这里，随后便扬长而去。
Not long before, a shifty guy with a blue cap abandoned it here for some reason and just walked away without even a glance back.
不得不说，这件事从头到尾都充满了可疑的气息。或许你应该仔细调查一番……
It goes without saying that the whole incident is suspicious from start to finish. Perhaps you should look into things more carefully...
确实可疑，调查看看吧。
It really is suspicious. Check it out.
你蹲下来，想要仔细辨认快递单上的文字，却听到包裹中传来一阵冷漠的机械提示音：
You stoop down to try and carefully read the text on the courier slip, but hear a soulless mechanical security system say from within:
「生物信息已认证，注册者为{NICKNAME}。」
"Biometric data verified. Registered to {NICKNAME}."
「『小型中子辐射炸弹』已绑定，请勿离开本机感应范围——爆炸倒数计时将在无法感应到注册者生物信息时立即启动。」
"Mini-neutron bomb has been linked. Please do not leave the vicinity of our sensors. Countdown to detonation will start immediately if registrant's biometric data cannot be sensed."
这是什么玩意？！
What the heck is this thing?
老实说——不知道。
To be honest — I have no idea.
好像在哪里见过这个套路…
I think I've seen how this plays out before...
真的吗？那你的人生非常丰富多彩了。
Really? Then you must have a rich and wonderful life indeed.
无论如何，这或许意味着你得时时揣着它了——前提是它确实是一颗炸弹。
In any case, this means that you'll probably have to carry it around with you everywhere — that is, if it's really an actual bomb.
毕竟…你也不想看着它在自己面前爆炸，对吧？
After all... You wouldn't want to see it blow up in your face, would you?
还是算了吧。
Never mind.
不错的决定。过分的好奇心通常会将你置于危险的境地，你很明白这点。
A good decision. Excess curiosity often places you in dangerous situations — as you well know.
但你也可以*随时*回到这里——这是你不可剥夺的权利！
But you can come back here any time — that's your unalienable right! Nobody can take that away from you.
「并蒂姻缘，祝您寻得佳偶归。」
"We wish you good luck in the search for your better half."
罗浮上似乎还有名为「红梅佳缘」的同类型公司。长生种社会竟也有如此庞大的婚恋交友市场吗？
There seems to be a similar dating agency named "Bonds of Love" in the Luofu. Is there such a high demand for matchmaking in the long-life species?
一只严丝合缝的快递盒。密封数字单据的货品名称一栏声明，其中的货物将被用于放生。
A courier package that's a perfect fit. The digital label clearly states that the item inside will be used for a controlled release.
这行冰冷的仙舟文字会令任何拥有同理心的生命感到不安。说真的，你最好把它打开来确认一下状况。
This line of callous Xianzhou letters would disturb any being capable of empathy. Seriously, you'd better rip it open to check up on things.
我必须得打开它看看。
I have to open this up and see.
出于朴素的道德观念与人道主义精神，你将密封数字单据拆毁，打开了快递盒……
Out of simple moral obligation and the human spirit, you tear off the digital label and open the courier package...
…随后在其中看到了一只物流机巧鸟，似乎已经因能源耗尽陷入了沉睡。在这只可怜机巧鸟的身边还有一张纸条：
...Only to find an express cycrane, seemingly in Sleep mode due to over-exertion. A note has been placed beside this poor cycrane's body:
「机巧鸟不应该被鹤运物流奴役！它们应该在天空中自由飞翔！——放生帮。」
"Cycranes aren't slaves for the Heron Express! They should soar freely in the sky! — The Unshackled."
看来这群自称「放生帮」的人是懂一点幽默的。
Seems like this group called The Unshackled has a sense of humor.
这是私人物品，我不能动。
This is a personal item. I can't interfere with it.
那么你以不可撼动的强力论据将自己说服了。
You convince yourself with unshakably strong logic.
「昔年旧物，岁月重塑。」
"Restoration of the things in the past."
素雅的宣传画，若不仔细看会以为是某种新式瓷器的宣传广告。
The poster is simple yet tasteful. If you don't look at it closely, you will assume it to be an advertisement for the launch of a new type of porcelain.
一只快递盒，有部分已被不明液体浸湿。密封数字单据的货品名称表示该货物将被用于放生。
A courier package that is partially saturated by an unknown liquid. The digital label clearly states that the item inside will be used for a controlled release.
尽管你非常在意包裹里那可能存在的小生命的状况如何，但它已经是你发现的第三个「放生」包裹了——第三个！
Despite truly caring about the condition of that little life inside the parcel, this is already the third controlled release package that you've seen — the third!
直觉告诉你，它很可能又是一个幽默（或者不那么幽默）的小把戏。但如果不打开它，你就无从求证。
Intuition tells you that it's likely to be a prank from another funny guy (or not-so-funny). But without opening it, you have no way of knowing.
打开看看吧…
Open it up for a look...
出于朴素的道德观念与人道主义精神，可能还带有一定程度的好胜心，你将密封数字单据拆毁，打开了快递盒……
Out of simple moral obligation and the human spirit — and perhaps starting to feel a little competitive — you tear off the digital label and open the courier package...
…随后在其中发现了半打罗浮特产矿泉水——「鳞渊冰泉」。大部分瓶盖已因颠簸松脱，溢出的冷水也蒸发殆尽，但你还是获得了两瓶完好无损的矿泉水。

...Only to find half a dozen bottles of the Luofu's famous mineral water export: Scalegorge Spring Water. Most of the bottle caps have been knocked loose and the water has mostly evaporated by now, but you still manage to salvage two bottles in good condition.
当然，照例地，你发现了一张纸条：「一瓶水有八万四千微生物，放生功德无量！——放生帮。」
Of course, there's a note as usual: "One bottle contains over <unbreak>84,000</unbreak> microorganisms inside. Controlled releases are a virtue! — The Unshackled."
你可能得好好考虑一下，自己从出生至今已欠下多少命债了。
You may have to think hard about how all the life debt you've racked up since you were born.
它不值得我浪费时间。
It is not worth my time.
你摇了摇头，任这只快递盒孤零零地留在原地，望着你远去的背影。
You shake your head, leaving the package in place as you turn and leave.
一只被塞得满满当当的快递盒，光从盒子被撑圆的纸盖，你就猜出里面装了不少东西。
This courier package is stuffed to the brim. Judging from the bulging of the box, you surmise there must be lots of things inside.
数字单据上既没有写明寄件人和地址，也未标注收件人的信息。你要打开它吗？
Neither the sender's address nor the recipient's info is on the digital label. Should you open it up?
打开看一下吧！
Open it up!
从仙舟法律有关财产所有权的条目出发，任何寂寞无主的小快递箱都应归属于发现它的第一个人。
The Xianzhou property law places the right to ownership of any unowned courier package on the first person to find it.
首先是成打的玩具模型。这些人像造型各异，唯一的共同点是从未被拆封把玩；包装盒被细细裹上了保护膜，以及穿得比较清凉。

First of all, there're dozens of toy figurines. Each has a different shape, and the only thing they share is that they're all unopened and in pristine condition. A protective film covers the whole of this section, and they're dressed pretty skimpily.
接下来是成摞的画册。从书页卷角的状态可知，主人或许曾无数次在灯下翻阅，不忍释卷。其中的内容不必翻开也能让你羞的满面赤红。

Next up, there's a stacked photo album. Judging by the worn edges, the owner must have spent countless hours poring over these by candlelight, unable to turn away. The content of the images is enough to turn you red as a beetroot.
往下是一只只手掌大小的小盒子，里面塞满小小的画片儿。多半是某种游戏卡牌。
Below this, are small palm-sized boxes stuffed with small pictures. Probably some kind of card game.
再往下则是一台游戏机，和几盘游戏卡带。
Further on down, there's a gaming console plus several game disks.
再往下…没了。只有一封信，信上写着一行令人心碎的字眼：
And even further down... Nothing. Just a letter that opens with a heartbreaking line:
「婚姻是爱情的坟墓，这我不确定，但它一定是爱好的坟墓。请拣到这些宝藏的好心人善待我这些年的收藏，谢谢。」
"Marriage is the tomb of love. I'm not sure about that, but it's the tomb of hobbies. Please, can the kindhearted soul who finds this take care of my earnest collection of treasures? Thank you."
猝不及防，你经历了一堂严肃的人生通识教育课，眼角微微湿润。
Blindsided, you feel as though you've learned a valuable life lesson. Your eyes are glistening.
我收下了！
I accept!
这箱子沉甸甸的，它装着一个成年人破碎的梦。你决定给它们一个家。
This box is heavy. It contains the broken dreams of an adult. You decide to give them a home.
留给真爱吧！
Leave it to true love!
这箱子沉甸甸的，它装着一个成年人破碎的梦。还是留给真爱这些玩意儿的人吧。你默默合上了箱盖。
This box is heavy. It contains the broken dreams of an adult. Let's leave it to those who really love this kind of stuff. You silently close the box lid.
别了吧，这可不好。
Don't do that. It's bad.
你皱了皱眉，随意打开路边的箱子，从自我道德准则的层面是你所无法接受的——
You frown. Opening any unclaimed box on the side of the road is unacceptable to you based on your own moral standards —
尽管有些时候，你会像移动卡尺的游标一样灵活挪动这条准则所在的高度…但绝不是今天！
Despite sometimes placing your fingers on the scale to adjust your morals... Today is not that day!
一只被打开的快递盒，就这么搁在路边，半掩的箱盖下银光闪闪。谁会把贵金属就这么丢在街上？真阔气。
There is a courier package left open on the roadside. A silvery light sparkles out from under the half-opened lid. Who would have just left precious metals like this out on the street? Such opulence.
翻箱子。
Check the package.
你迫不及待地拨开箱盖，把手伸了进去，但一股冷锐的寒意让你的手指触电般收回。
Frantic to open it up, you reach under the lid only for a sharp chill like an electric shock to cause you to pull your hand back.
——竟然有人在这箱子里塞满了成打成打散装的刀片！它们差点割伤了你的手。你又发现，箱子的一侧还有一封信：
Someone has actually stuffed this box with dozens of loose razors! They almost cut your hand. You also find a letter stuck to the side of the package:
「米糕没幻戏社的诸位编剧：我很喜欢贵社近期更新的大作《仙舟折剑录》……」
"Dear Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club Writers: I love the latest update to your masterpiece Xianzhou Sword Tale..."
「但我无法接受你们写死静流这个角色。这是送给各位的蛋糕和礼物，聊表心意。」
"But I simply cannot accept that you've killed off the character Jimlieu. Here is a cake and a gift for everyone, to show how I feel."
蛋糕呢？想必是被编剧们吃了。但刀片则被这些人原封不动丢了出去。真是一群毫无良知可言的冷血动物。
A cake? The writers must've eaten that already. But these razors have been thrown out by these guys untouched. What a bunch of heartless animals. Have they no conscience?
想办法处理刀片。
Find a way to handle the razors.
不能将这些危险的东西留在原地。你打定主意，将箱盖合上，把危险带走。
You can't just leave something so dangerous lying around like this. You decide to close the lid and carry the danger away.
把箱子寄回去。
Return it to the recipient.
尘归尘，土归土，冤有头，债有主。哪有甜头吃了，苦头不想要的道理？你决定按照寄件地址，将这箱刀片送往它该去的地方。
Ashes to ashes, dust to dust. Let's not let anyone else get harmed. Who only eats sweet food, without any bitterness? You decide to send the box and the razors inside it to the designated recipient.
转身离开。
Turn around and leave.
不管里面装了什么，毫无疑问它都不是你的财产。你守住了你心中的道德准则，可喜可贺。
No matter what's inside, it's undoubtedly not yours. Congratulations on holding fast to your moral code.
一只被打开的快递盒，就这么搁在路边。半掩的箱盖下有一叠厚厚的纸在风里微微晃动。
There is a courier package left open on the roadside. Under the half-opened lid is a thick stack of papers that flips gently in the breeze.
翻箱子。
Check the package.
你拨开箱盖，把手伸了进去，掏出一大蓬稿纸。字迹飞扬跋扈，难以辨认，充满了不可遏抑的激情。你努力辨读了起来。
You open the lid and reach inside, fishing out a large stack of manuscripts. The handwriting is illegible, bossy, and full of unrestrained emotion. You try your best to read it.
「米糕没幻戏社的各位：我有一个绝妙的技术点子，现打算作价二十万信用点卖给各位。它的代价和它的市场前景相比，划算到不可思议！」

"Dear Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club: I have a wonderful piece of tech that I'd like to sell to you all for the sum of <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> credits. Compared to its market potential, this price is an absolute bargain!"
之后便是长篇大论、天马行空的技术构想和市场前景分析报告——可只看了数百字，你便被「赋能」、「跨赛道」、「生态激活」等商业术语催的昏昏欲睡。

After that, there are rambling paragraphs, bold technical concepts, and market analyses — but after making your way through a few hundred words, you're soon hypnotized into a state of drowsiness by such bizspeak terms as "energize," "cross-channel," and "activated ecosystem."
最终，你决定放下这份近二十万字的巨作，将它和箱子一起留在了街边。
In the end, you decide to put down this forty-page magnum opus and leave it behind on the side of the road alongside the box.
它不值得我浪费时间。
It is not worth my time.
你想了想，决心把时间浪费在更有趣的事情上，转身离开了箱子。
Having decided to spend your time on more interesting stuff, you turn around and walk away from the package.
一只被打开的快递盒，就这么搁在路边。半掩的箱盖下有一叠厚厚的纸在风里微微晃动。
There is a courier package left open on the roadside. Under the half-opened lid is a thick stack of papers that flips gently in the breeze.
翻箱子。
Check the package.
你拨开箱盖，把手伸了进去，掏出一大蓬稿纸。字迹娟秀可人，犹如端丽仕女行于纸上。
You lift the lid, reach into the package, and take out a large pile of manuscripts. The handwriting is pretty, as though a beautiful lady were dancing on the page.
「米糕没幻戏社的各位：我很喜欢诸位在《仙舟折剑录》里塑造的众多群像，特别靖渊和耽风两位男性角色，喜欢到睡不着觉的那种……」

"Dear Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club: I love the group portraits that you build into Xianzhou Sword Tale, especially when they include those two male characters Jim Yan and Denn Fang — they keep me up at night..."
「…所以连夜写下这篇同人作《凤求凤》，望编剧老师们不吝点评！」
"...So I've been writing my own fan fiction during the nights, "Untouchable Lovers" — and I hope you'll leave your comments on it!"
之后是将近二十万字情节曲折爱恨生杀的大戏，末了，两位男主角凄美地在彼此怀中溘然长逝。
After that, a dramatic tale of love, hate, life, and death twists and turns over the next forty pages. In the end, the two male protagonists die poetically yet tragically in each other's embrace.
你看不懂，但你大受震撼，犹如被人夺走了初恋。你将稿子放回原处，将它和箱子一起留在了街边。
You don't understand why, but feel shocked as though your first love has been stolen away from you. You put back this manuscript and leave it with the box on the side of the road.
它不值得我浪费时间。
It is not worth my time.
你想了想，决心把时间浪费在更有趣的事情上，转身离开了箱子。
Having decided to spend your time on more interesting stuff, you turn around and walk away from the package.
一只被打开的快递盒，就这么搁在路边。半掩的箱盖下有一叠厚厚的纸在风里微微晃动。
There is a courier package left open on the roadside. Under the half-opened lid is a thick stack of papers that flips gently in the breeze.
翻箱子。
Check the package.
你拨开箱盖，把手伸了进去，掏出一大蓬稿纸。
You lift the lid, reach into the package, and take out a large pile of manuscripts.
「米糕没幻戏社的各位：我很希望成为贵社的一员，但今年已是我应聘失败第三年——这一次请务必对我的答卷进行点评！」
