"Dear Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club: I am very interested in becoming a member of your club, but this is the third year in a row now that I've failed — please can you leave some comments behind on my quiz entry?"
接下来是幻戏社为应聘者准备的测试考卷。试卷上只有几题被零星作答，关键的部分一片空白——想必阅卷人恐怕很难对白卷作出点评吧。

After that was a quiz prepared by the club to test its applicants. Only a few scattered questions were actually filled out, and the main part was left blank — presumably, it would be difficult for the marker to leave any comments on a blank submission.
它不值得我浪费时间。
It is not worth my time.
你想了想，决心把时间浪费在更有趣的事情上，转身离开了箱子。
Having decided to spend your time on more interesting stuff, you turn around and walk away from the package.
一只被打开的快递盒，就这么搁在路边。半掩的箱盖下有一叠厚厚的纸在风里微微晃动。
There is a courier package left open on the roadside. Under the half-opened lid is a thick stack of papers that flips gently in the breeze.
翻箱子。
Check the package.
你拨开箱盖，把手伸了进去，掏出一大蓬稿纸。
You lift the cover, reach into the package, and take out a large pile of manuscripts.
「米糕没幻戏社的各位：《仙舟折剑录》最新回『最初一战』非常棒！按照我的设想，接下来应是步离人与联盟血战在即，几位主角的人生也会天翻地覆……」

"Dear Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club, "The First Battle," which is the latest chapter of "Xianzhou Sword Tale" is amazing! In my opinion, the war between the borisin and the alliance should be next, causing drastic changes in the life of the protagonists..."
「因此，我希望能看到剧情向如下方向发展——」
"I hope the story will progress in this way..."
之后是将近二十万字的剧情畅想，情节诡谲，跌宕起伏，末了主角们一个个阵亡，又受命途感召得以擢升……

What follows is a long essay of the predicted plot that consists of almost two hundred thousand words, full of twists and turns and surprises. At the end of the story, the protagonists are expected to die one after another and then be brought back to life by the Paths...
你不知道这家幻戏社是否采用了这一足以斩获星际和平影视年度大奖的鸿篇巨著。
You have no idea whether the immersia club adopted the ideas in the essay that is worthy of winning the Interastral Peace Media annual award.
它不值得我浪费时间。
It is not worth my time.
你想了想，决心把时间浪费在更有趣的事情上，转身离开了箱子。
Having decided to spend your time on more interesting stuff, you turn around and walk away from the package.
残破的快递箱被随意丢弃在地上，单据上猩红色的「退件」电子戳昭示着的命运。货品名称一栏写着「九百九十九朵朱明紫月季」。

A tattered courier package is left abandoned on the ground. The bright-red stamp of "RETURNED" on the bill signifies its fate. "<unbreak>999</unbreak> Zhuming Mauve Roses" is written in the "Goods" column.
这些昂贵的花卉如今静静躺在残破的快递箱中——像极了寄件人的爱情。
The expensive flowers lying quietly in the tattered courier package reflect the love life of their sender.
打开看看。
Open it.
你拆开了这个可悲的包裹。见一封书信飘摇着落到了你的指间，信纸上散发出清朗的香气。你不由得读了起来。
You open the pitiful package, and a letter falls out and slips in between your fingers. A refreshing and pleasant scent wafts from the paper. You can't help reading it.
算了。
Forget it.
你刚打算离开，就看到风吹开了包裹将合未合的顶盖。一封书信飘摇着落到了你的指间，信纸上散发出清朗的香气。你不由得读了起来。

Just as you're ready to leave, the cover of the package is blown open by the wind. A letter drifts in the air and slips in between your fingers. A refreshing and pleasant scent wafts from the paper. You can't help reading it.
「阿辰，展信佳！你不在我身边时，我也时时感受到你！」
"Chen, I hope everything goes well on your side. Although you aren't around, I can always feel your presence by my side!"
「如我感受到溪流穿过山谷在洞天之间穿行，带来永狩原的秋风拂面而过！我感受到你！」很有诗意。
"I can feel your presence like the breeze blowing against my face when the streams flow along the valley and run across the delves!" How poetic.
「你在我身边时，我试图背诵你！像学宫里的学童背诵最动人的诗！我阅读着你，一字一句地试着记住你！」天啊，这人真的爱用感叹号。

"I try to memorize you when you're around, like I'm learning to admire the most romantic poem as a student at the academy! I scrutinize the sentences that represent you and try to remember every single one of them!" The writer must be a fan of the exclamation point.
「请容许我怀着十万份的真情，再一次问你！你是否愿意接受我的爱意？我会始终等待你的答复！」信中言语近乎恳求。
"Once again, please allow me to ask you with all my sincerity: Would you be my lover? I'll wait for your answer forever!" The question almost sounds like an imploration.
你合上信，耳边的清风此刻竟仿佛也带上了感叹号，显得如此喧闹。然而，寄件人得到的答复，却只有那猩红色的「退件」。
You fold up the letter, and it seems like the breeze has an exclamation mark too, as it starts gaining intensity. Sadly, what the writer receives in reply is the bright red "RETURNED" stamp.
又是一阵风，信纸从你的指间飞走了。它飘摇着飞向了它的终末——像极了寄件人的爱情。
Another gust of wind comes, taking the letter away from your fingers. It drifts to its demise, like the love life of the sender.
一只被打开的快递盒，数字单据备注着「用于救助建木灾害中需要帮助的朋友」，然而旁边却又有手写大字「过期变质，已经处理」。

The digital bill on the opened courier package writes, "Donation for the victims of the disaster in Ambrosial Arbor." There is another handwritten phrase next to it that reads, "Expired and spoiled, disposed."
那似乎是一袋包装完好的蛋白米。也许…它并没有过期变质？
It looks like an intact bag of protein rice. Perhaps... it is not expired and spoiled?
仔细确认一下。
Check the rice.
你上下打量着这包精美的蛋白米，随即得出结论——它包装完好，确实是没有过期。到底是谁做了这种浪费食物的事？
You examine the bag of protein rice and conclude — it is nicely packaged and has not expired. Who's thrown it away?
带走它。
Bring it with you.
至少这些善意没有被浪费。
At least the donation won't go to waste.
将它留下来。
Leave it there.
就这样离开。
Walk away.
不看，就不用平添烦恼。
Out of sight, out of mind.
快递盒中传来腐败的食物气息。运单上的备注写着「求求店家早点送过来，我已经饿了三天了」。
The smell of rotten food comes from the courier package. The bill writes, "Please ship my purchase as soon as possible. I have starved for three days."
可惜，这些食物显然因为某种意外滞留于此——不知道那位饿了三天的可怜人现在如何了。
Unfortunately, the food is stuck here because of some accident. You wonder how the poor guy who has starved for three days is faring.
我得帮帮这位陌生人。
I must help this stranger.
单从外观来看，盒内装着的食物或许曾经是一碗炒饭——如果愿意，你可以装一碗新的进去。
From the looks of it, the package might have once contained a bowl of fried rice. You can replace it with another bowl if you wish.
你将收货地址抄写下来，找来一个干净的快递箱，将崭新的食物放了进去，随手预约了物流机巧鸟前来取件。希望这一餐能够帮到那位可怜的陌生人。

You write down the recipient's address and find a clean courier package to put fresh food into it. Then, you book a random courier cycrane to collect it. Hopefully, the meal will be able to help the poor stranger.
转身离开。
Turn around and leave.
命运自会安排好一切——现在还不到你出手的时候。
Everything is destined. Now isn't the time for you to meddle with the affairs.
一只被打开的快递箱，快递箱的发件地来自星际和平影视。盒内装着各式办公文件和私人物品，还有被揉成一团的信纸孤零零地躺在快递箱里。
The opened courier package is sent from Interastral Peace Media. Inside the package are some documents, personal effects, and a crumpled letter.
这团可怜的信纸显然承受了太多的愤怒。
Obviously, the crumpled letter was the victim of someone's fury.
打开看看。
Open it.
你将蜷缩的纸团展开，却见其中的话语简直称得上是触目惊心——
You unfold the curled-up paper only to find a piece of devastating news...
「恭喜你，从星际和平公司影视部毕业啦！感谢你的一路相伴，我们江湖再见！」这是你第一次知道，人进入社会参加工作之后，还能有机会毕业。

"Congratulations on graduating from Interastral Peace Corporation! Thanks for your company so far, and I wish our paths will cross again in the future!" You just realize that the idea of graduating from a company actually exists.
信纸末尾还附有友情提示，内容是离职手续的办理程序，语气十分欢快。看来裁员也可以令人感到身心愉悦——但收件人显然还没有理解到这一层。

A friendly reminder that touches on the dismissal procedure is included toward the end of the letter. The cheerful tone used makes the layoff sound like an uplifting event. However, it is apparent that the recipient doesn't feel that way.
转身离开。
Turn around and leave.
大概是某个可怜鬼在出差中途被辞退了吧，你不需要在意这个。
Some poor guy might have been fired during a business trip. It's not something you should be concerned about.
典当铺「赎珠阁」的广告。店主瀚典掌柜阅历无算，说书的本领与西衍先生不相上下。
It is an advertisement for Jeweler's Pagoda, a pawnshop. Its owner, Handian, has been to a lot of places and is a storyteller as good as Mr. Xiyan.
这台售卖机长时间未得到维护，已经不能正常使用了。
This vending machine has fallen into disrepair and can no longer function properly.
占卜店「鉴爻轩」的广告。据说店主若月前不久才被太卜司开除，被迫在此地接过家族事业。
An advertisement for the Looking Bronze divination shop. Rumor has it, the owner Ruoyue was fired from the Divination Commission and was forced to take over the family business.
这本书封面上写着《来自远古的回声•仙舟传统曲艺大观》，似乎出自西衍先生之手。
The cover of this book reads "Echoes of Antiquity: A Grand Overview of Traditional Xianzhou Folk Culture," it seems to come from the hand of Mr. Xiyan.
翻开书，你见这页的内容似乎是序言。
Opening the book, you see what appears to be the preface.
阅读。
Read.
下一页。
Next page.
合上书籍。
Close book.
这页的内容似乎与评书有关。
The content of this page seems to be related to storytelling.
上一页。
Previous page.
这页介绍了名为仙舟坠子的曲艺形式。
This page introduces the folk art called Xianzhou Chordophone.
这页的内容与狐人大鼓有关。
The contents of this page are related to Foxian Drum Chant.
这一页介绍了持明时调。
This page introduces Vidyadhara Elegies.
这页记载了名为相声的曲艺形式。
This page documents the folk art called crosstalk.
这页介绍了杂技。
This page introduces acrobatics.
丹鼎司行医市集中最著名的地标，是如同神龙蜿蜒盘踞的古树。
The most well-known landmark of the Alchemy Commission Healer's Market is an ancient tree with dragon-like intertwining roots.
你曾听说过，某些世界的树都是能言能思考的古灵，它们会在危急时刻苏醒过来，展现自然的伟力——这棵树是否也是这样呢？
You have heard of the myth about trees in some worlds being ancient spirits that can talk and think. They will awaken when there is a crisis and unleash nature's might. Could this tree be like that?
古树粗壮的树干宛如黑龙蜿蜒而上，抬头望去，耳畔隐隐有风雷声呼呼作响——随后你迅速意识到，那只是你用力抬头后的耳鸣而已。

The sturdy and thick trunk of the ancient tree rises upward like a black dragon. When you look up at the tree, you hear a faint sound of wind and lightning. Soon, you realize that you are just having tinnitus after lifting your head too quickly.
粗壮的古树，被某些化外民视为沉默的「神明」。但你仔细观察，发现传闻所说的种种异处都不存在。树枝上，龙不吟虎不啸，一棵古树，可笑可笑。

Some outworlders see the strong ancient tree as a silent god. After taking a closer look, you find none of the extraordinary features mentioned in the stories. Nothing miraculous happens on the branches, and there is nothing special about the ancient tree. How hilarious.
无数怀抱着一丝寻求长生希冀的化外民曾从它身边经过，但没人注意到，行医市集中这个著名地标，是真正天然无公害的长生种。

Countless outworlders who long to become a long-life species have walked past the tree, but none of them noticed that the famous landmark of the Healer's Market is a truly natural and harmless long-life species itself.
此处是太真丹室，古时候丹士们曾在这里阐演仙道，汲取「建木」之力，将无数奇想化为现实。
This is the Aureate Elixir Furnace. In ancient times, the alchemists practiced the way of immortality here. They absorbed the power of the Ambrosial Arbor and turned countless fantasies into reality.
气势磅礴的巨大丹炉，让人不禁遐想炼制丹药的尺寸，以及服用方法。
At the sight of the majestic massive elixir crucible, one can't help imagining the size of the pellet created and how would it be consumed.
海上悬浮的巨大丹炉，没有找到能够烧火的地方，亦没有看炉子的小童。看来千年之前，仙舟丹士们就掌握了新能源技术，不需要燃料和人工，效果挺好。

The huge elixir crucible floats in the sea. There is no place to make a fire, and there is no one watching the crucible. It seems like thousands of years ago, the Xianzhou alchemists already mastered a new energy technology that does not require fuel and labor. Most impressive.
丹鼎司附近出现了形似猿猴的邪恶孽物。要是这孽物不小心落进丹炉里，炼制七七四十九日，不定会闹出怎样的医疗事故。

An evil abomination that resembles an ape has been spotted near the Alchemy Commission lately. It would be a major medical mishap if the abomination fell into the elixir crucible by accident and went through the refining process for <unbreak>49</unbreak> days.
永不熄灭的丹炉屹立于此，炉心里微蓝的微光，是丹士们在加班时不变的信仰。
The elixir crucible with everlasting fire is erected here. The bluish glow in the furnace core motivates the alchemists when they are working overtime.
棱角分明的新鲜水果，牙口不好的吃不得。
Fresh fruit with distinct edges. Those with weak teeth should stay away from it.
曾经有闹事者来到水果摊前质疑水果价格昂贵、尚未成熟…随即，闹事者掏出锐器刺向摊主腹部——幸好这里是丹鼎司，摊主得到及时的抢救。

Once, a troublemaker came to the fruit stand and complained about the fruits being overpriced and unripe... Then, the troublemaker stabbed the stand owner's abdomen with something sharp. Fortunately, it happened in the Alchemy Commission, and the stand owner was able to receive timely treatment.
棱角分明的新鲜水果，显然摊主对自家水果有严格的面数要求。
Fresh fruit with distinct edges. It is obvious the stand owner has strict requirements for the number of sides for the fruits sold.
棱角分明的新鲜水果，可惜，摊主没有卖葡萄，那才是多边形灾难。
Fresh fruit with distinct edges. Unfortunately, the stand owner doesn't sell grapes. That would be a polygonal disaster.
在某位无聊人士将「一天一个果，医士远离我」的招徕改成「一天十个果，医士来找我」后，仙舟的水果摊里再也看不到任何广告了。

Ever since some person with too much time to spend changed the slogan "a fruit a day keeps the doctor away" to "ten fruits a day makes the doctor come your way," no one has seen any advertisements around the fruit stand on Xianzhou again.
持明一族世代供奉的龙尊造像，曾有化外民自称在此聆听到某位星神的低语：「爬上去试试」。
The high elder statue worshiped by the Vidyadhara for generations. An outworlder once claimed to have heard the whisper of an Aeon here, saying: "Climb up and have a look."
持明一族世代供奉的龙尊雕像，看上去很像一位你熟悉的朋友。你什么时候也有机会被人造像崇拜呢？
The high elder statue worshiped by the Vidyadhara for generations. It looks a lot like a friend of yours. When will it be your turn to have a statue made and worshiped to?
龙尊手执长枪，脚踏沧浪，看上去威风凛凛。殊不知，此造型方案迭代过无数次，仅一票之差战胜了「普通地站在原地」。

The high elder looks dashing while holding a spear and riding on waves. Surprisingly, this design has gone through countless iterations and only prevailed over the mediocre "standing straight" design by one vote.
持明工正淙衍监修，龙尊造像系列，龙尊雨别素模<敕令古海造型><unbreak>001</unbreak>，价格待定，发售日待定。
Supervised by the Vidyadhara artisan, Congyan. High elder statue series, Yubie prototype "Royal Decree Ancient Sea Design" <unbreak>001</unbreak>. Price and launch date to be determined.
在亲眼见到龙尊雕像后，你意识到「在古海干涸时，雨燕啄下龙尊雕像的眼睛扔入海眼中，海水再度奔涌起来」的传言，显然只是无稽之谈。

After seeing the high elder statue yourself, you realize there is no truth in the rumor saying that "A swallow once bit off the eyes of the high elder statue and threw them into the ancient sea to revitalize the waters when they were on the verge of drying up."
这是持明族在一次生命尽头所形成的持明卵。持明在卵中褪去所有记忆，修复前生所有的伤痕，再世为人。

This is a Vidyadhara egg formed from a dying Vidyadhara. Inside the egg, all of the Vidyadhara's memory will fade away, and all wounds suffered in their previous life will be healed before being reincarnated again.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
一只带蹼的小手轻轻压在珍珠质地、半透明的晶壳上，若隐若现。你略带好奇地将手指放在这只小手上，隔着晶壳，彼此相对。

A small webbed hand can be faintly seen inside, lightly pressing against its pearlescent and translucent shell. You press your fingers up against the outline of the small hand, your touch only separated by the crystal shell.
古海波涛声摇晃，与某人立下的誓言在耳畔呢喃，星空彼端的光芒眨了眨眼，你沉入目眩神醉的温暖爱河里……
The ancient sea's waves sway. Someone whispers their vows to you in your ear. The light at the end of the starry sky shimmers, and you sink into the warm and intoxicating river of love...
那是某个持明前世的记忆，很快它就将随逝水流去。
That is the memory of a Vidyadhara's past life, soon to flow away as does water down a river.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
它被一朵巨大的珊瑚承托着，宛若婴儿在摇篮里渴睡。
The egg is nestled atop a hulking shelf of coral, like a child dozing in its cradle.
你轻轻将手放在晶壳上，一个梦泡泡在你耳旁绽开。你瞬间明白，珍珠里的孩子渴望成为一名绘制瑰丽丹青的画师。

You gently place your hand on the crystal shell, and a dream bubble blooms near your ear. In a moment, you understand that the child in the pearl desires to become a painter who creates brilliant paintings.
这是蜕生前的旧梦，还是未出世的宏愿？你不清楚。也许很快，这个梦将随逝水流去。
Is this an old dream from before its rebirth, or an as-yet unfulfilled aspiration? You are unsure. Perhaps soon, this dream will fade away with the flowing water.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵下，一点闪光抓住了你的眼睛。
Beneath this crystal clear and luminous egg, a glimmer catches your eye.
你伸手，那是一颗沙砾般细小的珠子。与持明卵相较，它如此渺小，像是伤心人梦中眼角垂下的泪。
You reach out your hand and see a tiny pearl, so small and minuscule compared to the shimmering egg. The pearl reminds one of a tear shed from the eye of a heartbroken dreamer.
不知这位持明蜕生前有什么舍不下的心结？无论如何，它最终都成了磨灭不去的悲伤，被你握在掌心。
Perhaps this Vidyadhara once had something they couldn't bear to part with prior to their rebirth. But now it has become an eternal sadness, held in the palm of your hand.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你贴近珍珠般的外壳，梦见自己曾是一位护珠人，与挚爱驭浪而行，穿梭古海波涛间。
You edge closer to the pearlescent shell and have a dream in which you are a Pearlkeeper who rides the waves, and travels across the ancient sea with your true love.
你和他在一起如此快乐，但蜕生之期由天定命。你只得偷偷将一枚玉佩含在口中，作为转世相见的凭证。

The time you have spent with your lover is full of happiness, but the time of hatching rebirth is determined by destiny. You secretly put a jade pendant in your mouth so that you and your lover can recognize each other in the next life.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你轻抚晶光灿然的外壳，恍惚间成了一位手执长枪的勇武云骑。你潜心武艺，在队中演练从无败绩。教习师父欣赏你的天赋，举荐你接替他的职务。

You stroke the shimmering shell gently. While in a trance, you transform into a valiant Cloud Knight wielding a spear. You train hard and never lose a match in training. Impressed by your talent, your instructor recommends you as his successor.
然而比武时的一招疏忽，如一记毒辣的枪刺终结了这份期许。师弟技高一筹，将你击败。那柄演练用的枪头竟洞穿了你的胸口。
Nevertheless, one careless move in a match changes everything. Your junior outshines and defeats you in the match. Surprisingly, the spear used for training pierces through your chest.
你痛苦、你怀疑、你挫败…但你很快释然，因为你眼下成了一位随列车遨游星海的年轻人，到处旅行的感觉多么美妙。

You sink in misery, self-doubt, and dejection... Yet, it doesn't take too long for you to move on, as you find yourself turning into a youngster riding aboard the Express on a journey through the cosmos. It is nice to be able to travel around.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你抚摸持明卵，聆听它微不可查的细语。它借你之口低声轻叹，故土不在此处，故土不在此处…你生于遥距罗浮千万光年外的方壶仙舟。

You softly touch the Vidyadhara egg, listening to its barely audible whisper. Borrowing your voice, it laments about being away from its homeland. This is not home. This is not home... It was born on the Xianzhou Fanghu, ten million light-years away from the Luofu.
身为方壶龙尊「冱渊君」的龙师，你以耿介自守，犯颜直谏，劝那位大人施雷霆震怒，降罚于掀起罗浮饮月之乱的同袍。

As a Preceptor of Glaciator Marum, high elder of the Fanghu, you are one of integrity, unafraid of pointing out wrongdoings directly. You advise the high elder to unleash her wrath, and impose punishment on your peers who instructed the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae on the Luofu.
「既如此，就派你去宣读判罚，只你一人，如何？」龙尊的声音一如她的冰山龙座，没有丝毫温度。
"In that case, how about I send you to read out the sentence? Just you. Alone." The high elder's voice is as cold as her icy throne.
你就此被贬斥他乡，孤苦如异类，唯有丹鼎司中一个女孩在你蜕生前给了你一丝温暖的安慰。

Just like that, you are banished to a faraway land, left alone and shunned by others. Only a girl from the Alchemy Commission warms your heart with her comforting words before you go through hatching rebirth.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你将手点在蚌珠色泽的卵壳上，听到一个又一个音阶波动。宫、商、角、徵、羽…流水般的乐声涌入你心头……
You tap on the pearl-colored eggshell and hear the sounds of different notes. Do, re, mi, fa, so... Music, like flowing water, pours into your heart...
你突然回忆起自己谱下的曲子，你为它起名「饮月垂虹」。那是你目睹龙尊丹枫唤得鳞渊潮动的奇景，以此为灵感写下的曲子。

Suddenly, you recall the song you composed and called "Lunae Arcus." You were inspired to write this song after witnessing the high elder Dan Feng being able to command the waves in Scalegorge Waterscape.
但你未能献奏此曲。你耳闻惊才绝艳的饮月君沦为叛逆，你愤怒地掷琴在地，任由它发出碎玉之音。你发誓此生再不作曲。

However, you did not get to perform this song in public. After hearing about the talented and brilliant Imbibitor Lunae becoming a rebel, you flung your lute to the ground and left it broken. You vowed to never write another song in your life.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你听到持明卵中传来声声怒吼喧哗如潮，你凑耳静听。动雷般的巨响自一头孽物口中荡开，仿佛一千柄剑交击，传遍鳞渊境的洞天。你全身的骨头都为之打颤。

You hear furious roars coming from the Vidyadhara egg and move your ears closer to hear better. A thunderous sound explodes from the mouth of an abomination, and fills up the Scalegorge Waterscape delve as if a thousand swords had clashed together. Every one of your bones rattle from the deafening sound.
那孽物重重坠地，你勉力定住惊魂，才能仔细打量：它半似龙首的头颅上，有长髯与兽毛飘扬。你直直看向它水银般的眼眸，惊觉其中有一丝惶恐。

The abomination falls to the ground with a loud thud. You try your best to steady yourself before examining the abomination. Its semi-draconic head bears long whiskers and flowing beastly fur. You stare directly into its mercury-like eyes, sensing a hint of fear within them.
你想逃，可你无处遁逃。空气骤然变冷，一道身影飘过，速度快到在空中留下匹练般的残像。
You think of running away, but there is nowhere to go. The temperature in the air drops all of a sudden, as a shadow drifts past at a speed so fast that it only leaves a misty trail.
一个女人落在孽龙额顶，一线冰冷的光辉握在她掌中，刺下。间不容发的瞬息，你瞧见遮住女人双眼的黑纱飘落。她嘴唇微微翕动，你仿佛听见了她说「对不起」。

A woman lands on top of the abominable dragon's head. Her palms hold a ray of frosty light that she stabs downward. In a split second, you see the black veil covering her eyes falling off. Her lips move slightly, and you can faintly hear her utter the word "Sorry."
你没听错，因为这也是对你的道歉。下一秒，刀锋般的冰浪如昙花般凌空绽开，将触及的一切牢牢冻结，也包括你。

That is not your imagination, as she is also apologizing to you. The next second, ice waves as sharp as knives start spreading like transient flowers in the air, freezing everything they come into contact with, including you.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你轻轻碰上持明卵的外壳，一阵可称心碎的感觉传遍你的全身。他抗拒着你的接触。卵中的持明不愿抛下这些回忆，不愿相信自己尊崇的主人犯下了叛乱大罪。

You touch the shell of the Vidyadhara egg lightly and experience a heartbreaking sensation. Resistant to your touch, the Vidyadhara in the egg is reluctant to leave his memory behind and refuses to believe that his highly respected master has committed the grave sin of rebellion.
他怒啸着，高举手中的剑，向云骑们反复冲杀。那些他曾经信赖的同僚，那些他礼敬有加的龙师长老，每一张面目都如此清晰，如此可恨。他不想忘记。

Roaring, he holds his sword high and charges at the Cloud Knights again and again. He can see his peers whom he used to trust, and the Preceptors whom he used to respect clearly. Their despicable faces are etched in his mind forever. He does not wish to forget
「我等…誓不背叛丹枫大人！」他与最后的龙尊近卫们迎向弩矢和扑面而来的黑暗。
"We... will never betray Master Dan Feng!" Together with the last remaining high elder guards, he braces himself to face the incoming arrows and darkness.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你缓缓抚摸持明卵的外壳，一种母性的温柔如暖水般裹住全身。你记得自己奉命看护鳞渊境中的持明卵，你是护珠人队伍的一员。

You caress the shell of the Vidyadhara egg slowly, as a motherly affection envelops you like warm water. You remember that you are responsible for watching the Vidyadhara egg in Scalegorge Waterscape as a member of the Pearlkeeper team.
尽管你不擅云吟，不谙武事，但你仍然秉获这份荣誉。因为你总在游弋巡逻时为这些摇篮般的持明卵清理水垢和藤壶。队员们都认同你那母亲般的爱意。

Although you are not well-versed in cloudhymn and not physically trained in combat, you are still entrusted with this honorable task. It is because you always remove the limescale and barnacles on the Vidyadhara egg when you are on patrol. Your teammates recognize your motherly love toward the eggs.
但你的职责到此为止了，浑身枝叶的怪物闯入鳞渊境时，你挥舞长矛笨拙地与之交战。你为破碎的卵壳而哭泣，你的血一如你的泪，涌流不止。

Yet, your job comes to an end when a monster covered in leaves barges into Scalegorge Waterscape. Clumsily, you wield a spear to fight the monster. You cry over the broken eggshells, and your blood pours out non-stop like your tears.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你碰了碰这颗持明卵，发现它似乎毫无反应。仔细聆听，里头却有一线极细微的咕哝声，如烬中星火，明明灭灭。它在絮叨着，它不喜欢水体。

You nudge the Vidyadhara egg, but it does not respond. As you listen to it carefully, you catch a faint mumbling from inside that goes on and off like an ember in the ashes. It is rambling on about its dislike for water.
它想要烈火，想要热砂，想要锻炉的高温和锤砧的歌唱。它向你断断续续讲述云骑军器的研造之法，向你反复低诵辨认矿石的歌诀。

It yearns for ferocious fire and burning sand. It desires the heat of the forge and the singing of the anvil. Intermittently, it tells you about the research and production method of Cloud Knight weapons and repeatedly recites a song about how to recognize ores.
它宣称自己来自朱明仙舟。在那里，不朽的龙尊穿行于烈火炎庭中，信手挥洒灵感的星辉。而它受尊主之令，前来传授罗浮工造司诸位大师匠艺。

It claims to have come from the Xianzhou Zhuming, where the high elder of Permanence moves around in a courtyard of blazing fire, and distributes the sparks of inspiration without care. It was sent here by the high elder to teach the masters of the Luofu Artisanship Commission about craftsmanship.
假以时日，它将自壳中重获新生，成为他或她。届时，罗浮的匠人们技艺已有精进，必可再传于他，令她不负使命，返乡授艺。

One day, it will be reborn in the egg and become a male or female Vidyadhara. When the time comes, the Luofu craftsmen will have improved their skills and be able to pass back what they have learned to it. It will then be able to fulfill its mission and share its knowledge with the people in its homeland.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你轻轻敲了敲持明的卵壳，它焦急地震动，卵壳上的鳞片微微翕张，向你示警，想让你离开此处。
You gently tap on the shell of the Vidyadhara egg. It shakes nervously, and the scales on the shell open and close slightly to warn and drive you away.
它是鳞渊境中负责戍守「建木」的卫士之一，数百年来，古木寂静无声，恍如沉睡。它与战友们日日测算，百无聊赖。但谁又能想到建木会在那一日醒来呢？

It used to be one of the guards in charge of watching the Ambrosial Arbor in Scalegorge Waterscape. For centuries, the ancient tree had been quiet as though it was in a deep slumber. Taking measurements of the tree every day with its comrades bored it to death. Who would have thought that the Ambrosial Arbor would wake up on that fateful day?
巨大的波涛卷走了它和战友，他们还安好吗？它焦急地向你发问，你却无法回答。
Gigantic waves have swept it and its comrades away. In an urgent voice, it asks you about its comrades, but you have no answer.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你伸手触摸眼前这颗持明卵，光滑表面上隐隐有水珠滑落的痕迹，又像是某种泪痕。
You extend your arm to touch the Vidyadhara egg in front of you. There are faint traces of water droplets that resemble tear stains on its smooth surface.
冰凉的触感令你心神恍惚，浓雾逼近，将你慢慢包裹，直至吞没…你努力地逃跑，却总也找不到尽头，耳畔涌入许多尖利伤人的话。

The icy sensation leaves you in a daze. A dense fog inches closer and slowly engulfs you... You try hard to escape, but you can't find the way out. Meanwhile, you can hear scathing comments next to your ears.
你听见了女子的哭声，那是她被迫离开相爱的人时声嘶力竭的呐喊，夹杂着某位胜利者孤寂的笑声。
You hear a woman crying. It is a heart-wrenching scream she lets out when forced to part ways with the person she loves. In the background, the winner's desolate laughter can be heard.
爱在成为爱之前叫什么呢？你下意识地思考起这个问题。就在你沉思时，浓雾被一双温暖的手拨开，透进来的光芒驱散了所有阴霾，纤纤玉指点在你的额头，你如梦初醒。

You start to wonder: What is love called before it was love? While you are absorbed in your thoughts, a pair of gentle arms brush away the dense fog, allowing light to come through and dispel the gloom. A slender finger taps on your forehead and awakens you.
那道声音里有一股难以言喻地嫌弃——「少看点垃圾小说，这玩意看多了对脑子不好。」
There is a tinge of disdain in the voice. "Stop reading those novels. It won't do your mind any good."
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你指尖轻触卵壳…机巧鸟、机巧鸟、机巧鸟、机巧鸟…你看到不可胜数的物流机巧鸟在空中飞行，像一张致密的罗网。
You brush the eggshell with your fingertip... One cycrane here, one cycrane there... Numerous express cycranes are flying around, making the sky look like a dense net.
你竟能辨认出每只机巧鸟来自何处又去向何方…这没什么值得惊讶的，做了七百年物流专员，这些事你早就烂熟于心了。

You find yourself being able to tell the origin and destination of each cycrane... It is not a surprise. After all, you know these things like the back of your hand, having worked as an Express Specialist for seven centuries.
长乐天很大，很繁华，足足十万只物流机巧鸟在不间断地飞行，维系着城市的脉搏。你辨认得出长乐天的每一只物流机巧鸟，只要看一眼，你就背得出它的编号。

The Exalting Sanctum is large and bustling. About one hundred thousand express cycranes are always out and about to meet the needs of the city. You can recognize every single express cycrane. Just one look and you would be able to recall its serial number.
你不禁有些担心…你走之后，接替你的新人能否胜任这项工作？她或者他能否像你一样在那个用编号与地址构成的迷宫中游刃有余地维系长乐天的运转？

You can't help worrying whether your successor can handle the job well after you leave. Can the newcomer find their way through the maze of serial numbers and addresses, and keep the Exalting Sanctum running like a well-oiled machine?
但其实也不必担心，你很清楚，鹤运物流的专员们都是好样的。那位新人总有一天也会像你一样，背得出十万只机巧鸟的编号。

In fact, there is no need to worry. You know very well that everyone who works for Heron Express is competent. One day, the newcomer will be able to remember the serial number of one hundred thousand cycranes, just like you.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你轻轻敲了敲持明的卵壳，久违地感觉到了虚无，它似乎空无一物，对你的探知毫无反应…也许卵中持明早已离去？

You gently tap on the Vidyadhara eggshell and experience an emptiness you have not felt for a long time. The egg seems empty, as it does not respond to your contact... Perhaps, the Vidyadhara inside has long gone.
不对，持明离去留下的空缺，与持明留在此处的空缺是不同的。她经历了彻底的背叛与绝望，留在眼前的空洞就像无穷远方的叹息之墙。

Wait a minute. The emptiness caused by the Vidyadhara's departure is different from the emptiness exuded when they are still here. After going through betrayal and abject despair, the emptiness left before this Vidyadhara is akin to a wall of lamentation in a faraway land.
也许她早就应该离开这枚持明卵，但是显然还没有准备好——她伤痕累累地回到了古海，并非是为了再次出发，她应当休憩。

Perhaps, she had already left the egg earlier, but she was obviously not ready for the departure yet. She dragged her battered self back to the ancient sea not to set off to a new destination, but to take a break.
她迟早会离开持明卵，但不是现在，你明白仅仅是褪去痛苦的记忆，不能完全消弭深入骨髓的痛苦，就让她继续休憩吧。
Sooner or later, she will go, but not now. You understand that the mere loss of memory is not enough to eliminate the pain that has seeped deeply and completely into her bones. Just let her rest.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你抚摸着卵壳表面，炽热强烈的冲击感喷涌而出，顺着你的指尖瞬间抵达天灵盖，有道嘶哑低沉的嗓音在你耳边徘徊不去。
You gently touch the surface of the eggshell, and a searing and intense impact bursts out and surges right to your head through your fingertips. A hoarse and deep voice lingers by your ears.
你看见了一颗心，表面有着古怪的灼痕，干涸而枯竭，远处的火光正张牙舞爪试图吞噬一切。有道身影不顾一切地抱住了另一道影子。混乱中，你听见了几句含糊不清的呐喊，又像是情人的呢喃。

You see a heart with odd burn marks on its dry and withered surface. The fire in the distance is burning ferociously in an attempt to devour everything. A figure pulls another figure into their arms despite the danger. In the chaos, you hear some indistinct cries that also sound like the whispering between lovers.
你想起燃烧殆尽的丹炉，曾将黑暗撕开一道口子，但此刻连发亮的痕迹也无处可寻。你低头望去，这才看清这颗持明卵壳上沾染的并非什么炉灰，只是一些露水，却莫名灼热。

You think about the burnt elixir crucible that once tore the darkness apart. But now, not a single trace of light is in sight. You look down at the egg and finally notice it is not stained by the ash from the crucible, but just some dew that is somehow scorching hot.
在你的指尖下，薄薄一层卵壳之隔，你听见了一阵稳健的心跳声，那颗干枯的心又跳动了起来。
Under your fingertips and through the thin eggshell, you hear a steady heartbeat. The wilted heart has started beating again.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你抬手敲了敲卵壳，里面传来了一阵奇异的味道。你仔细分辨，感觉到里面似乎夹杂着泥土的芬芳、高温油炸的香气、铁锈味…种种味道混杂，实在难以言喻。

You raise your hand and tap on the eggshell, and a weird smell emanates from inside. You evaluate the smell and detect the scent of soil, frying oil, and rusted iron... It is hard to describe the smell as it is a mixture of various scents.
挑剔的食客正在翻阅菜单，你看见菜品下写着一行字：素食、生酮友好、有机、不含麸质、不含谷物、不含蛋白、不含乳制品、不含无机物、不含金属元素、不使用化合调味料。

The discerning diner is perusing the menu, and you notice a line of text beneath each dish: Vegetarian, keto-friendly, organic, gluten-free, grain-free, egg-free, dairy-free, free of inorganic substances, free of metallic elements, and made without artificial seasonings.
「这真的是人吃的东西吗？」你不禁认真分析起来，与此同时脑海中似乎传来一道强烈的认同感，声音朦胧而有力，回答了你的疑问：「所以我尝了尝。」
"Is this really edible?" You can't help analyzing the dish. At the same time, you hear a faint yet firm voice in your head affirming your opinion and answering your doubt. "So I tasted it."
「那这道菜好吃吗？」你急切地想知道答案，但等了很久也不再有声音响起。你愣了愣，看了看眼前的持明卵，你忽然明白了什么。

"Does this dish taste good?" You are eager to know the answer, but the voice does not come after a long wait. Feeling confused, you check the Vidyadhara egg in front of you and suddenly feel enlightened.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你轻抚卵壳，看到了一面巨大的镜子，倒映出你身后数千名观众，但却没有你的身影。
You stroke the eggshell gently and see a huge mirror that reflects the thousands of audiences behind you, but there is no trace of your own figure.
它当然倒映不出你的身影，因为你是罗浮最好的魔术师，而这正是你最得意的把戏。在镜子前使自己的倒影隐形——全银河只有你能做到这件事。

Of course, the mirror cannot show your reflection, because you are the greatest magician on the Luofu. This is the trick on which you pride. You are the only one in the cosmos who can make your reflection invisible in a mirror.
不，这不是光学迷彩，也没有用到什么云吟术创造的光学折射…那些试图拆解你魔术的人远不如你高明，他们想破头也想不出你是如何做到的。

No, it does not involve optical camouflage, or optical refraction created by cloudhymn magic... Those who attempt to expose your magic are far less clever than you. They can never figure out how the magic works no matter how hard they try.
如今你的这一世走到了尽头，即将开始新的轮回。你的一生很幸福，没留下任何遗憾，但你在众人的心中留下了一个永远的遗憾——

Now, your current life has come to an end, and it is time for you to begin a new cycle. You have lived a happy life with no regrets, but your departure will leave an eternal regret for everyone else...
——他们永远也不会知道你是怎么做到的了。
They will never know how you pulled off your magic trick.
这很好。你想到，「魔术」就是要给人留下惊诧、困惑和遗憾，这才算得上是「舞台上的奇迹」。
Wonderful. You believe that a magic trick is only fit to be called a "miracle on stage" when it leaves its audiences shocked, bewildered, and with a sense of regret.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你轻抚卵壳，看清了那一夜的奇遇，已经去世百年的短生种再次出现在你的面前，牵起你的手，呼唤着你的名字，你对时间的感受开始变得陌生。

You stroke the eggshell gently and see the strange encounter that night. The short-life species that have passed away for a hundred years shows up before you again. As she holds your hands and calls your name, the concept of time feels foreign to you.
你跟随着短生种的脚步，来到你们初次见面的地方，她根本不顾及你的疑惑开始自说自话，你也决定将疑惑抛之脑后——你似乎很懂得看气氛。

You follow the short-life species to the place where you met each other for the first time. She starts talking without addressing your confusion. Seeing that, you set aside your doubts, as you can read the room.
她的活泼、可爱、大方将你百年来的阴翳一扫而空，你们相遇相识的时光似乎要再度上演…突然你开始紧张了起来，事情不能再继续下去了。

Her vivacious, lovely, and elegant personality cheers you up after being depressed for a hundred years. You seem to be reliving the time you got to know her... Suddenly, you feel anxious, knowing that you should stop things from going any further.
你开始拒绝回复、尝试借机逃走，你想要中断这奇妙的回光返照，你不必再重温那一刻——你狠心地痛下杀手的那一瞬间。
You stop responding and try to run away. You want to stop this bizarre flashback of your memory so that you need not experience the moment you ruthlessly killed her again.
然而事不如愿，愧疚感随着逼近终点的紧张感不断交替，你的呼吸变得困难…随即，你意识到这不过是眼前的一枚持明卵，你不必扮演那个疯子。

Yet, things do not pan out as you wish. You feel guilty and nervous as the end approaches. You are having a hard time breathing... Then it occurs to you that it is nothing more than a Vidyadhara egg before you, and you do not have to be the lunatic.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你轻触卵壳，看到了某处洞天中车水马龙、熙熙攘攘的景象。真是普通而又平凡的一天。
You gently touch the eggshell and see a busy and crowded delve. It is just a normal day, and nothing out of the ordinary happens.
穹顶的人造天空闪烁着舒缓的流光，行人带着不同的表情在街上匆匆走过。星槎、机巧鸟、阴晴伞，天空中飞着各式各样的人造物，你看得出来，它们也很忙碌。

Streams of light shimmer soothingly in the artificial sky on the dome. The pedestrians, with different expressions, hustle to and fro on the streets. All kinds of artificial things, like starskiffs, cycranes, and Baroumbrellas are flying in the sky. You can tell they, too, are having a busy day.
紧接着，你倒在了地上。你看到身边有一只坠毁的机巧鸟——你猜自己大概是被它砸中了。
The next second, you collapse on the ground and see a crashed cycrane next to you. You think you probably got hit by it.
人们聚在你身边试图帮助你，但你很清楚，受了这么重的伤，自己应该是要蜕生了。
People gather around you, trying to offer help. However, you know you are destined for a hatching rebirth after sustaining such a serious injury.
尽管有很多人聚在你身边，但大部分人还是匆匆走过，去忙他们自己的事。星槎依旧在穹顶之下川流不息，就像平常那样。
Although there is a crowd around you, most of the people choose to walk past you to attend to their affairs. As always, there is still an unceasing stream of starskiffs under the dome.
啊，真是普通而又平凡的一天。你不禁如是想。
"Oh, this is just like any other day," you muse.
这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.
你轻触这颗珍珠般的持明卵，恐惧如一只巨掌捏紧了你的心脏。「将这些枝条送去丹鼎司？」你很清楚，你手中器皿里封存的乃是仙舟绝对禁忌之物。

You gently touch the Vidyadhara egg that looks like a pearl. Fear squeezes your heart like a giant hand. "Send these branches to the Alchemy Commission?" It is clear to you that the vessel you are holding contains a strictly forbidden object on the Xianzhou.
「若是被十王司的人察觉…我…」手中之物如有千斤，你艰难喘息，才不致摔了器皿。
"If I get caught by the Ten-Lords Commission... I..." The vessel in your hand feels heavy. You breathe carefully to avoid dropping the vessel.
耳畔的声音不容拒绝。「我族传承因罪人而断绝，眼下有个万载难逢的好机会。」长老的声音虽然年轻，却带着难以负荷的沧桑和麻木。

An authoritative voice comes by your ears. "Our line of succession has been broken because of a sinner. Now, here is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity." The elder's voice is youthful, but it sounds weary and emotionless.
「你完成此事，便是我族英雄，我保举你加入龙师议会。如何？」你摇头，然后点头。长老长笑一声，如鸱鸮怪叫。

"If you can complete this mission, you'll become a hero, and I'll guarantee you a seat in the council of Preceptors. What do you think?" You nod, then shake your head. The elder laughs eerily like a screeching owl.
你见过许多快递盒，但从没一只像眼前这样，它在微微颤抖，犹如雨巷里被遗弃的小狗。
You have come across many courier packages, but none of them is like the one before you. It trembles slightly like an abandoned puppy on a rainy day.
你为什么在颤抖？
Why are you shivering?
「你吃了什么不干净的东西？你为什么在不停打颤？」你无声发问。
"Did you eat things that had gone bad? Why are you trembling?" You ask in your mind.
「没、没什么。」纸盒竭力装作一副若无其事地样子。但剧烈的颤抖出卖了它内里的恐慌。
"I—I'm okay." The package tries its best to look fine, but its violent trembling reveals its anxiety.
「一只手机罢了…」快递盒细声解释，向后微微退却。但你能感觉到它似乎在掩饰什么。
"It's just a phone..." The package explains in a feeble voice while backing away slightly. You can feel that it is hiding something.
好吧，我不会靠近你。
Fine. I won't come any closer.
「好吧，我不会靠近你。」你向快递盒发誓——尽管你不知道自己是否能够兑现这个诺言。
"Fine. I won't come any closer." You make a promise to the courier package, though you are not sure whether you can keep it.
「谢、谢谢你…」快递盒细声道谢，向后微微退却。
"Th—Thank you," the package responds feebly while backing away.
可它究竟装着些什么？也许是炸弹上的钟表，也许是被不幸封进箱子的小动物，也许…某种更隐秘的东西。
What could be inside? Perhaps it contains the clock on a bomb, a poor animal, or something even more mysterious.
然而，正当你思忖时，它突然爆发出一阵更剧烈的晃动，随后便再也没有任何反应。
While you are engrossed in your thoughts, the package starts shaking vigorously before it stops moving.
你被吓了一跳，难熬的心痒瞬间烟消云散。无论里面原本装着什么，它都再也动弹不得了——还是别再动打开它的念头比较好。
Horrified, your heightened curiosity dissipates all at once. No matter what's inside, it's best that you stay away from the package and stop thinking about opening it.
「别、别过来！」它好像在对你说话。它在发颤。
"D—Don't come closer!" It seems to be talking to you while shivering.
完好无损的快递箱，贴在其表面的密封数字单据显示它尚未被正确签收。
A courier package in good condition. The digital label affixed to its surface shows that it has not been signed for receipt.
显然它没能抵达自己本该前往的地点——或许你可以行个方便，将它交还至正迫切期待它归来的签收人手中。
Obviously, it is not where it is supposed to be. Perhaps you can do it a favor and deliver it to its recipient, who is no doubt looking forward to it.
开拓客向来助人为乐！
Trailblazers are always happy to help those in need!
不错的选择。于是，你俯下身去，想要仔细看看那数字单据上的签收地址究竟指向何方，以便履行你身为开拓客的崇高职责。
Good choice. You crouch down to check the recipient's address on the digital label so that you can fulfill your noble duty as a Trailblazer.
可还没等读出那行仙舟文字的具体内容，你便被突如其来的电子提示音吓了一跳：
Before you can read out the content written in the Xianzhou language, you are taken aback by a sudden beep.
「警告！警告！侦测到可能的盗窃行为——快递箱<unbreak>81010274</unbreak>已为您联系距您最近的地衡司公廨职员，请积极配合公廨调查，请勿擅自离开现场！」

"Warning! Warning! Possible theft detected! Package <unbreak>81010274</unbreak> has contacted the nearest Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery. Please cooperate with the investigation. Do not leave the scene without permission!"
啊哦，看来你这下可是好心办坏事了。趁没人发现——快逃吧，别让开拓客的名誉毁于一旦！
Oh no, your act of kindness has backfired. You should take off before anyone notices. Don't tarnish the Trailblazing name!
会有人来处理它的。
Someone will take care of it.
你决定不再理睬这只快递箱，转身离去。
You decide to leave the courier package alone.
一只被打开的快递盒，腐败的食物气息从箱子里飘了出来。
An opened courier package. The smell of rotten food wafts out from inside.
任何保有理智的生物都会选择避开它；但如果你的勇气甚于理智，那么也可以打开它看看——毕竟，它或许还没过保质期，对吧？

Anyone with a sane mind would stay away from it. However, if your courage prevails over your sanity, you may open it further and take a look. Perhaps the food hasn't gone passed its expiry date yet, right?
我非得尝尝！
I have to taste it!
你的勇气令人钦佩，但它却害了你。虽然你只想浅尝一口，但它的味道给你留下的印象实在太过深刻——你两眼一黑，只感觉到天旋地转，身体失去控制……

Your courage is admirable, but it has done you harm. Although you just want a small bite, its taste is so sickening that you black out right away. Your head is spinning, and you are losing control of your body...
听懂警告，置之不理。
Heed the warning and ignore it.
这根本就称不上是两难选择——正常人不会吃腐败的食物。你的理智占了上风，只希望有人能够及时清理掉它。
This is an easy choice to make. Anyone sane would stay away rotten food. Your sanity prevails, and you just hope that someone will clean it up quickly.
一只被打开的快递文件袋，包装上的奇特标志吸引了你的目光——毫无疑问，那是个榫卯结构的木锁——你在仙舟上已见过太多次了。
An opened courier package with a weird insignia draws your attention. Undoubtedly, it is a mortise and tenon wooden lock that you have come across umpteenth times on the Xianzhou.
那份纸质文件并没有完整地塞进文件袋里。你不必亲手将它拿起，便能看个七七八八了。
The document was not fully stuffed into the package, so you can make out most of its content without picking it up.
拿起来仔细端详。
Pick it up and examine it.
这似乎是一封来自名为「枘凿六合」秘密结社的调查问卷——这年头怎么还有自称「秘密结社」的组织？
This seems to be a survey from a secret society called Hexanexus. You can't believe it still calls itself a "secret society" in this day and age.
问卷中详细调查了应试者的性别、年龄、收入、职业、以及每个月为游戏投入的金钱数额及动机，可惜应试者似乎根本没打算认真填写——因为这是一张白卷。

The survey includes detailed questions about the respondent's gender, age, income, occupation, and the amount spent on video games each month and the motivation for spending. It is a shame that the respondent doesn't take the survey seriously, as it is not filled out.
哦，不…这人还是在卷子上写了些东西的。在意见和建议一栏里充斥着难登大雅之堂却十分地道的仙舟俗语，应试者的激愤之情跃然纸上。
Hold on... The respondent did write something on the survey. The suggestion column is filled with indecent yet authentic phrases in the Xianzhou language. The respondent's outrage is well-expressed.
看来「枘凿六合」并不受欢迎……
Seems like Hexanexus is not very popular...
随便瞥一眼就走。
Take a quick glance and walk away.
似乎只是一份没有填写的调查问卷罢了，没什么好看的。
It seems to be just an unfilled survey with nothing special about it.
「琼浆玉液酿余香，美馔佳肴滋味长。」
"Lustrous liquor with a fragrance that simmers, delectable delicacy with a taste that lingers."
这副广告上画着一只物流机巧鸟为美食点赞，说真的，这只机巧鸟的味觉是可信的吗？
This ad has a courier cycrane recommending a dish. Am I really supposed to trust a cycrane's taste buds?
做餐饮的店铺总是聚在一起形成美食街。究其原因，大部分人在走进美食街之前，其实是不知道自己想吃什么的，又或者是排队实在太长了，不如换一家。

Food and drink stalls always come hand-in-hand to form food streets. The reason is that most people won't know what they want to eat before setting foot in there. Also, if a queue is too long in one place, they can just find somewhere else.
美馔阁擅长传统德悦菜式——老主顾们对菜品原材料要求较高，主打「食本味」的风格。

The Delicacy Pavilion excels at the traditional style of cuisine known as the Deyue Bliss. Regulars are highly critical of the quality of the raw ingredients, with the main selling point being "authentic flavors."
「杜氏茶庄的烈焰浓茶，是可以被点燃的茶。」
"The Flaming Potent Tea in Du's Teahouse is a tea that can actually be set on fire."
换言之，杜氏茶庄的烈焰浓茶是*新*概念茶饮料。
In other words, the Flaming Potent Tea from Du's Teahouse is a completely cutting-edge type of tea.
聪明的金人巷游客应该是明白的，有的茶能让人醒神明目，有的茶能让人沉沉酣眠。
I'm sure wise Aurum Valley travelers are aware that some teas can make you alert and perky, while others can make you dozy and sleepy.
曾经有客人来到杜氏茶庄，连饮数杯烈焰浓茶，美其名曰「干大事前必须喝点」。
We once had a guest come to Du's Teahouse and drank many cups of Flaming Potent Tea, before mysteriously stating: "I always need this before doing great things."
杜老板提起过，很多烈焰浓茶是以传奇顾客的名字来命名的。也许有一天，你的名字也可以——「喝了这杯『{NICKNAME}』，敬金人巷。」
Boss Du has said that many Flaming Potent Teas are named after legendary patrons. Perhaps this could be you one day, too. "Here, have a cup of '{NICKNAME}'! For Aurum Alley!"
「鹤运物流，啥都能寄。」
"Heron Express — We Mail Anything."
鹤运物流的金人巷分部，这里集中处理金人巷地区物流分发运输的工作。
This is the Heron Express Aurum Alley branch. Here they mainly deal with distribution and transportation logistics for the Aurum Alley area.
罗浮仙舟随处可见摆放在地上的快递箱——鹤运物流到底是知道，还是假装不知道。
Courier packages are everywhere on the Xianzhou Luofu... Does Heron Express know about this or not?
无机生命保护协会（简称「无机会」）一直持之以恒地试图为机巧鸟争取其应有的权益——即便仙舟官方不厌其烦地复函解释，机巧鸟并没有严格定义的自我知觉。

The Non-organic Entity Emancipation Trust (NEET for short) has been tirelessly fighting for the cycranes' rights... Although Xianzhou officials have repeatedly sent letters explaining that cycranes do not possess true self-awareness.
仔细看看广告上的图片，物流机巧鸟与快递箱之间没有真正的物理连接…等等，这真的不会有任何问题吗？
Looking closely at the advertisement, you see that there is no actual physical contact between the courier cycrane and the package... Wait, are they sure this is really okay?
「翻炒煸炸饕餮宴，功夫尽在尚滋味。」
"Stir-fried, fire-grilled, a veritable feast. Martial arts, culinary skills, all at Spices Supreme."
这副广告画看起来似乎是在描绘「进餐前拍照」这种古老神圣的仪式，但也不禁让人担心右下角的那位朋友是否吃上了美食。
This ad seems to show the ancient, sacred ritual of "taking a picture of the food before one eats it." However, one can't help but worry whether the person in the bottom right got to eat any food.
据说「尚滋味」燕翠师傅是以拳法闻名的厨师，以自己击败的星际猛兽入菜肴——但从广告上看，「尚滋味」也卖普通餐品嘛。又也许看似普通的包子里塞了飞天水螅肉馅。

Chef Yancui of Spices Supreme is supposedly famous for her fighting techniques, and she uses intergalactic beasts she has defeated in her food. Although, the ad looks like they do normal dishes, too. Either that, or those normal-looking dumplings are filled with flying polyp meat!
据说「尚滋味」燕翠师傅是以拳法闻名的厨师，以自己击败的星际猛兽入菜肴——你很好奇，是否该送她一张车票，让她登上列车与你同行。

Chef Yancui of Spices Supreme is supposedly famous for her fighting techniques, and she uses intergalactic beasts she has defeated in her food. You wonder whether you should get her a pass and let her join you on the Express.
曾有人说过「在尚滋味吃饭就像被一记重拳击中面部」，结合燕翠师傅的拳法，这个说法的可信度上升了。
Someone once said that eating at Spices Supreme is like being punched in the face. Taking into account chef Yancui's fighting skills, this review is suddenly a lot more trustworthy!
「天不生无用之人，地不造无用之物。」小小陈机铺，就是想给人心和旧物的一点自留地。
"Nothing is truly worthless in the world." This little store, Oldies Depot, is a place reserved for old things and weary hearts.
时间会将崭新的物件变得陈旧，同时也会赋予它独一无二的故事，有些人就喜欢这些故事。
Time will transform the new into old, but it will also gift them a unique story. Some people simply enjoy these stories.
对仙舟人来说，没什么器物能与他们同寿。因此所谓古董，在他们眼中也不过是些旧物罢了。
No physical item can match the Xianzhou people's lifespan. Therefore, these so-called "antiques" are nothing more than old junk for them.
对仙舟人来说，回收损坏器物，将它们修好往往得不偿失。但偏偏有人热爱生残补缺，在这个一切快速生成快速消费快速遗弃的年代里，这些人坚持不受迷惑。

The people of Xianzhou see collecting and repairing broken things as a waste of time, but there are those that find joy in replacing what has been lost. These people refuse to be led astray by this generation of rapid consumption.
「每天拳法一小时，健康工作几百年，幸福生活一辈子。」
"Martial arts for an hour a day, get centuries of happiness even when you're gray."
形虎拳馆总是派出很多人在街头宣传拳法健身，逢人便说「健身武术了解一下」，这样的宣传究竟效果几何，没人知道。

Tiger Boxing Gym always sends loads of people out on the streets to promote boxing and fitness. No one is quite sure how effective their "come and learn about martial arts and fitness" slogan actually is.
形虎拳馆将「延年益寿」作为卖点吸引化外民，这是否有一些欺诈的成分？
Tiger Boxing Gym uses "promoting longevity" as a selling point to attract outworlders. Is there a hint of fraud in this?
形虎拳馆的套餐中存在「师徒一对一」的教学方式。师傅会为学徒管理食物摄入、以及个性化拳法课程，还附带声援鼓励——这肯定不便宜。

There is a teaching method in the Tiger Boxing Gym's training package known as "1-on-1 mentorship." A mentor will manage their student's food intake, create a personalized martial arts curriculum, and even cheer them on. This cannot be cheap.
杜氏茶庄的「茶罐」。你也许不信它装着「茶」，路人也不信它装着「茶」。
A "Tea Canister" from Du's Teahouse. You may not believe that there is tea inside, and neither will anyone who passes by.
抛去那些陈旧的观点吧，你得在脑中植入一个新的概念——它是「茶罐」。
Discard your outdated thinking and plant the new concept of the "Tea Canister" in your mind.
当我们喝「茶」时，我们喝的是「茶叶」在液体中的萃取物。杜氏茶庄的每一款饮品中都放了茶叶，完全符合以上定义。
When we drink "tea," what we are drinking is the extract from "tea leaves" in a liquid. Every drink from Du's Teahouse contains tea leaves, so they completely fit this definition.
盛装不同茶叶的瓷罐在材质、体量、形态、工艺上各有严格的规矩。许多人认为这不过是故作姿态，但有人说这就叫文化。

The porcelain canisters that hold the various tea leaves are strictly regulated in terms of material, volume, shape, and design. Many people believe this to be mere posturing, but others call it "culture."
「寿考堂」门前的药箱来自一种古老的形式——对于不良于行的病人，铃医会身负药箱，手摇铜铃，上门行医。时代变迁之后，药箱作为一种文化形式保留了下来。

The medicine box outside of Longevity Hall comes from an ancient tradition. Healers used to carry a medicine box and a bronze bell to do home visits for patients who could not travel to seek treatment. As times changed, this box was kept as a cultural heritage.
「寿考堂」售卖各种颜色相近、但药性不同的药丸。假使你闯入店内将不同药丸倾倒一处，模仿翻洗帝垣琼玉牌的架势将其混合，店主又该如何分辨？你不敢想。

Longevity Hall sells a variety of pills that are similar in color but have different pharmaceutical properties. If you were to storm into the shop and mix these pills together as if you're shuffling tiles in a game of celestial jade, how would the owner be able to tell the pills apart afterwards? You dare not imagine the outcome.
有没有一种可能，也许有人已经悄悄调换了药丸和包装，但是至今无人发现？
Could it be possible that someone has already switched the pills and their packaging, but no one has ever noticed?
在仙舟的幻戏中，有太多大侠吃下药丸脱胎换骨，力大无穷。「药丸」拯救的并不是病人，是无计可施的编剧。

There are way too many heroes in Xianzhou's immersia who end up taking miracle medicine to gain incomparable power and strength. These "miracle pills" are not saving any patients - They're more likely to heal playwrights with a writer's block.
以防你没有注意，「寿考堂」特地将一副担架放在店外，你记得刚到长乐天的时候见过它——悬浮担架，原理不明，只能说是「仙舟科技」。

Longevity Hall has specifically placed a stretcher outside the store to make sure no one overlooks their shop. You remember seeing it the first time you arrived in Exalting Sanctum. The mechanism behind this floating stretcher is completely unknown and could only be explained as "Xianzhou technology."
堆满快递箱的货架，上面摆放着因各种理由没能发货的快递箱。
Shelves stacked full of courier parcels that could not be delivered for diverse reasons.
分拣摆放快递始终是个费力的工作，幸好后来被万能的机巧鸟淘汰了。
Sorting and placing courier parcels has always been an exhausting job. Thankfully, that tedious task has been completely replaced by the omnipotent cycranes.
这只是临时堆放快递件的架子，鹤运物流总不能把快递放在地上吧…等等，他们好像真的将快递放在地上，还不少。
This is just a temporary storage shelf for courier parcels. Heron Express can't just leave parcels on the floor, after all... Wait, they actually do leave parcels on the floor. Loads of them, too.
如果需要机巧鸟温柔地将货箱放在对应的取货架上，你得额外支付一笔存物费，不然你就只能在满地一模一样的箱子中寻找属于你的快递。

If you want the cycrane to gently place your parcel on the corresponding shelf, you will have to pay an extra storage fee. Otherwise, you will have to search on the floor for your package in an ocean of others that look exactly the same.
这是金人巷的码头工人日夜不停分拣的到港货物，他们会按照货运订单需求装箱发货。
These are the incoming goods that are tirelessly sorted day and night by the Aurum Alley port workers. They will pack and deliver goods according to order requests.
随着领头的工人高呼一声「开摆——」，码头的工人便开始码放货物。
When the team leader shouts "Lay'em out," the port workers get to arranging the goods.
码头上堆放着各种各样的货物，让人不禁好奇究竟是谁需要街边的长凳、路灯以及石狮子。
There are all kinds of things piled up along the docks. One can't help but wonder who needs a streetside bench, a streetlamp, or a stone lion.
也许货运码头能给金人巷带来改变，但是改变终究还是需要人来实现。
Perhaps the goods dock will bring changes to Aurum Alley. However, it is humans that must implement and realize these changes.
你担心有人顺手牵羊从这堆无人看守的货品里捞走些什么，不远处一只瞪着你的物流鸟也是这么想的。

You're concerned that someone could easily walk past and steal something from this unguarded pile of goods. The cycrane posted nearby that has been staring at you this whole time is thinking the same.
这是一只崭新的快递箱，看得出来纸箱上被人划开过，塞进箱子的书册露出了一角。
This is a brand-new parcel. The cardboard has been slashed opened already, and the corner of a notebook is protruding out.
看得出，这本崭新的册子并非是快递箱原本所有，而是有人强行放进去的，就像是垃圾掉进了垃圾桶。你岂能坐视不理？

It's obvious that this brand-new notebook was not originally inside the parcel, but was forcibly stuffed inside, as if it was a piece of garbage being squashed into a trashcan. Can you really sit by and ignore this?
不得不说，这本册子从头到尾都充满了熟悉的气息。或许你应该仔细调查一番……
You can't help but notice that this notebook seems extremely familiar. Perhaps you should take a closer look...
有些熟悉，调查看看吧。
This seems familiar. Go take a closer look.
你假装无意翻看了快递箱内的书册，这是一本黉学中使用的习题册，看起来像是*假期作业*，习题部分一点进展都没有。
You pretend to idly flip through the notebook in the parcel. It is a lyceum practice notebook for "holiday homework." Not a single question was answered.
简单的线索在你脑海内形成了一种叙事——有黉学的学生*不小心*将假期作业遗落在无人问津的纸箱里，要是假期结束，他（或许是她）会遇上麻烦。

Simple clues begin to form a narrative in your head: A lyceum student "accidentally" misplaced their holiday homework in an unattended cardboard box. Once the holidays are over, he (or maybe she) could be in big trouble.
好巧不巧，你发现了作业前面写着名字和班级，这说明事态还有救——
Fortunately, you notice that the student's name and homeroom is written at the start of their homework. There is still hope...
我要把它送回孩子手里！
I must return this to the child!
崇高的道德果然没有看错你，你是如此心地善良。
The High Morals clearly made the right choice with you. You have such a kind heart.
你在快递箱的信息戳上标注了寄件地址，并且预约了鹤运物流的寄件服务。
You marked the delivery address on the package and booked for a Heron Express delivery service.
想必丢失假期作业的小孩看见册子失而复得，一定会流下激动的泪水吧。
No doubt this child will weep tears of joy after being reunited with their lost homework!
我要试试黉学的练习题！
I wanna give the lyceum's questions a go!
当然你可以做题，你甚至可以全部写完。不过，你总得证明一下自己*有实力*完成所有的习题。请听题——
Of course. You can try to answer the questions. You could even answer all of them. However, you need to prove that you have the CAPACITY to complete all the questions. Question one...
工造司的工师傅将一根钢管切成4段，报酬为9镝。最后工师傅拿到了<unbreak>24</unbreak>镝，请问最后他将一根钢管切成了多少段？

An Artisanship Commission craftsmaster receives 9 strale when he cuts one whole steel pipe into 4 pieces. If he receives <unbreak>24</unbreak> strale for cutting a different pipe, then how many pieces did he cut this new pipe into?
怎么又是这种题？
Another one of these questions!?
你现在明白，为什么这本习题册没有在桌子上，而是在废弃的箱子里。
You now understand why this notebook has been tossed into a crate instead of sitting on the student's desk.
<unbreak>11</unbreak>段。
<unbreak>11</unbreak> pieces.
唉，你至少完成了作业，这已经很了不起了，不是吗？
Ahh. Well, at least you finished the homework. That's already very impressive, no?
<unbreak>10</unbreak>段。
<unbreak>10</unbreak> pieces.
唉，你至少完成了作业，这已经很了不起了，不是吗？
Ahh. Well, at least you finished the homework. That's already very impressive, no?
9 pieces.
天啊，没想到你是认真的，算你整本习题册全对好了。
Wow! You were serious about this. Let's count that as you got everything right!
你写完了习题册，顿觉自己神清气爽。虽然仙舟俗语说「人无再少年」，但就在刚才，你认真答题的样子，真的很青春靓仔。

You complete the exercise book and instantly feel refreshed. There is a Xianzhou saying "none can become young once more." However, when you were immersed in answering those questions, you were the very image of youth.
拿着吧，这是崇高道德的奖赏，至少你尊重了这本习题册，你值得。
Take this. This is a reward from the High Morals. You at least respected this notebook. You have earned it.
还是算了吧。
Ah, forget it.
不错的决定。自从你登上仙舟，你已经见惯了路边的快递箱，这也不稀奇。
A fair decision. You've grown accustomed to seeing packages strewn all around the streets since coming to Xianzhou.
但你也可以*随时*回到这里，再来审视一番——毕竟其他人应该是不会动它的！
However, you can come back here *any time* and investigate this again. It's not like anyone else will be touching it!
你看到箱子上赫然写着「寄件人：蓝玫瑰、收件人：红桃」。
You see a note blatantly scrawled on the package that reads: "Sender: Blue Rose. Recipient: Red Peach."
你的内心警铃大作（我猜的），因为这寄件人与收件人的名称格式，正是臭名昭著的「药王秘传」！
You suddenly feel a jolt of alarm (I guess?). Both the sender and recipient's names fit the format of the notorious Disciples of Sanctus Medicus!
那么身为仙舟人民的老朋友，面对这样一个危险的邮包，你准备怎么做呢……
So, as an old friend of the people of Xianzhou, what are you supposed to do when faced with such a dangerous package?
事关重大，立刻拆开！
The matter at hand is grave! Time to tear it open immediately!
你三下五除二拆开了这个危险的包裹，里面竟然装着……
You quickly tear into the dangerous package to find that it actually contains...
一束娇艳欲滴的蓝色玫瑰。它的花瓣比波月古海更蓝，仿佛盗取了整个鳞渊境的蓝色，凝结成了一束鲜花。

A single bouquet of delicate blue roses in bloom. Its petals are a deeper blue than the Lunarescent Depths, as if all the blue of the Scalegorge Waterscape has been stolen and condensed into this one single bouquet.
与鲜花一起的，还有一封信：
Alongside the flowers, you find a letter:
「桃儿：人类自数万年前便将培育出蓝色玫瑰视为生物学上的一项挑战。」
"Dearest Peach: For tens of thousands of years, humans have considered the cultivation of blue roses a scientific challenge."
「近几千年来，人们都认为自己穷尽了世上可能存在每一种方式，培育出了世上可能存在的每一种蓝玫瑰。」
"For millennia, people believed that they had tried every possible method and created every possible type of blue rose."
「但他们错了——你眼前这束花便是例证。我用三百年的青春，找到了几万年来未曾被发现的新方法，培育出了这束蓝玫瑰，只为了将它送给你，我的爱人。」

"But they were mistaken. These flowers before you is the proof. I spent three hundred years of my life to search for a new method that has not been discovered over these tens of thousands of years, and created this blue rose just for you, my love."
这封信到此就结束了。
That is the end of the letter.
不好意思，误会了…
Oops, my bad...
你重新封上了快递箱。幸亏你拆箱时动作比较温柔，没有损毁花朵和信件，不然…还真是有一点小尴尬。
You re-seal the package. Fortunately, you were gentle when you tore it open and did not damage the flowers or the letter. Otherwise... this could have been really awkward.
没事的，这不是你的错（当然也不是我的错）。都怪他们两口子起名不懂得避嫌，才闹出了这般乌龙。
It's fine. It's not your fault (obviously, it's not mine, either). If anything, it's this couple's fault for picking such suspicious nicknames and causing such a misunderstanding.
咱们快撤吧，别让人发现了。
Get out of here before anyone finds out about this.
他们肯定把违禁品藏花里了。
They must have hidden contraband in the flowers.
不愧是药王秘传的老对手，轻易就看透了他们的伪装。
Just as expected from the old foe of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus! You see through their facades with ease!
你将手伸进包裹之中，开始翻弄了起来。很快，蓝色的鲜花就变成了残枝败叶。
You reach into the packaging and begin to tear through the content. Quickly, the blue flowers transform into dead petals.
你摸到了一个奇怪的花苞…这束花中的每一朵都是盛开的，唯独这一朵是待放的花苞。
Inside, your fingers grasp a strange flower bud... Every flower in this bouquet is in full bloom, but this stalk alone only holds a bud.
你捏开那朵花苞，里面装着一颗小小的丹药。
You squeeze the bud open and notice a tiny pellet concealed inside.
不关我事，溜溜球咯。
This has nothing to do with me. Time to skedaddle~
你决定假装没看到。毕竟「巡猎」与「丰饶」的恩怨纠葛，又与你这个「开拓」信徒有什么关系呢？
You decide to pretend you didn't see anything. After all, what business does a disciple of Trailblaze have with the feud between The Hunt and Abundance?
也许你走之后，会发生一场围绕邮包展开的犯罪大片…但这已经与你无关了。
Perhaps this package will end up causing a huge criminal drama after you leave... But that's not your problem anymore.
报警呗，不然呢？
Call the police. What else is there to do?
你通知了地衡司。他们对此相当重视。
You inform the Realm-Keeping Commission and they take this report seriously.
地衡司执事让你离包裹远一些，他们很快就会派人来处理。看起来，又有一桩大案被扼杀在了萌芽之中。
The Realm-Keeping Commission instructs you to stay away from the package and that they will send someone to deal with it immediately. It seems you've nipped another big case in the bud.
地衡司没给我奖励？
The Realm-Keeping Commission didn't give me any rewards?
地衡司自然不会亏待你。很快，你就收到了一笔举报奖励。
The Realm-Keeping Commission would never overlook you like that. You soon receive a reward for reporting the case.
真是好人有好报，可喜可贺。
Good people will always get rewarded. All is well in this world.
这都是我应该做的。
It's the least I could do.
你接受了地衡司的感谢，但拒绝了酬劳。身为仙舟人民的老朋友，这种事只是举手之劳而已。
You accept the Realm-Keeping Commission's gratitude but decline their rewards. As an old friend of the Xianzhou people, this just comes naturally to you.
你感觉自己胸前的…呃，背后的金色飘带越发鲜亮了起来！
You feel the golden ribbons across your chest... ahem, on your back — begin to look even brighter!
拍个合照，看这边…披萨！
Time for a photo. Look over here... pizza!
我是要蹲下来吗？
Should I squat down?
据说这群人有点奇怪。
I hear this bunch is a bit weird.
让本乐队高手来品鉴下。
I will ascertain their caliber for myself.
是新组建的乐队？
They're a newly-formed band?
不过是学院的任务罢了。
They're just part of the university's mission is all.
完全没听说过这个乐队。
I've never heard of this band before.
来都来了，听听吧。
We're already here. Let's have a listen.
——缭乱！缭乱！缭乱！
...Dazzling! Dazzling! Dazzling!
缭乱！我是你们的粉丝啊！
The Dazzling! I'm your fan!
我好爱这场演出！
I love this performance!
太嗨了！让我们跳起来吧！
This slaps to the high heavens! Let's dance!
快帮我的帖子点赞！
Like my post, quickly!
怎么都是你的自拍啊。
Why're they all your selfies?
哼，这次可别让我失望啊。
Hmph, don't disappoint me this time.
等不及了，快开场吧！
There's no time. Hurry up and start!
——缭乱！缭乱！缭乱！
...Dazzling! Dazzling! Dazzling!
是不是快到时间了？
Is it almost time?
据说乐队的演出很棒！
I hear this band's performances are fire!
我专程请假过来听！
I took the day off to come here!
水平依旧很高，可惜啊…
Their sound is definitely still fantastic, but...
这个乐队出什么事了吗？
Did something happen to this band?
快查查有什么瓜。
Quick, what's the tea?
怎么只剩三个人了？
Why are there only three people?
这就是组乐队的命运吗……
Is this the fate of forming a band...
我听到了惊天大瓜！
I heard some earth-shattering news!
是不是吉他手跑路了？
Their guitarist left them high and dry?
据说她要结束这只乐队！
Apparently she wants to end this band!
…能再次给我带来惊喜吗？
...Will I be surprised again?
听说乐队的成员都跑了。
I heard all the band members left.
演出还能进行吗？
Can the show still go on?
紧张…缭乱还能出场吗？
Gosh, I'm nervous... Will The Dazzling still have a show?
不准质疑！先相信！
Cast your doubts aside! Stay strong!
好不容易挤到了前排…
And I finally managed to squeeze my way to the front row too...
要是没演出看不就亏了！
It'd be a massive loss if there's no show!
嗬，要有好戏看了。
Heh, we're about to see a big show.
这是…学院代表来赶人了？
Huh... The academy's rep is here to eject them?
演不了就换人！
Change the performers if they can't put up a show!
演出似乎出了点问题…
The show appears to have run into problems...
学院代表正在冲向舞台。
The academy's rep is rushing the stage.
让我们把镜头对准现场。
Let's aim our cameras at the scene.
喂，这段不准拍！
Hey, no filming this part!
你站哪边？
Whose side are you on?
要是把乐队赶下台…
If they evict the band from the stage...
难道他来演给我们看？
Is he going to perform for us?
学院与乐队爆发冲突…
The academy and the band are clashing...
拍下来肯定能火！
If I film this, it'll definitely go viral!
这情况还是头一次见。
It's the first time I'm seeing such a situation.
——缭乱！缭乱！缭乱！
...Dazzling! Dazzling! Dazzling!
音乐是我内心的呼喊！
Music is the outcry of my heart!
太有实力了！我爱你们！
Amazing!!! I love all of you!
跳到音乐结束！
Dance till the music stops!
乐意效劳！
I'm happy to help!
为你们鼓掌一次！
A round of applause for you!
眼前的快递箱上印着一个无情的红色邮戳，上书几个大字：「查无此地址，退件处理。」
The package before you is mercilessly stamped with a red print stating: "No such address found. Return to sender."
身为对世间万物都充满好奇的开拓者，你毫无疑问应当——
As a Trailblazer filled with curiosity for all things, naturally you must...
拆开看看！
Open it up!
快递箱盖翻开一条缝，一只谛听从里面探出头来。
The package's lid opens with a crack, and a Diting pokes its head out.
汪！它对你叫。可惜你不是三月七，听不懂它想对你说什么。随着它张嘴叫，一张纸条掉了下来。
Woof! It calls out to you. Unfortunately, you are not March 7th and you can't understand what it is trying to tell you. As it opens its mouth to bark again, you see a note fall.
念纸条上的字。
Read the note.
「自打分手后，每当饭团冲着我叫，我都会想起你冲我大喊大叫的样子，它在我的心里留下了深深的伤害。」
"Every time Riceball barked at me after you and I broke up, it just reminds me of how you used to yell at me as well. These memories have left me in deep pain."
「所以，现在，我把你分了三千多期的贷款买来的这只小东西送还给你，请你担起责任，对它的余生好好负责！」

"So, I am returning this thing to you — this thing that you bought with a loan that's to be paid over three thousand repayments. I hope you will take responsibility and look after it for the rest of its life!"
「此外，我想请你归还在这些年纪念日与节日期间我赠送给你的玉兆和衣服，如不能归还则请向我的账户支付三万一千五百二十巡镝……」

"Also, I would like you to return all the jade abacus and clothes I bought you for every anniversary and holiday over our years together. If you won't return them, then please pay <unbreak>31,520</unbreak> strales to my bank account..."
「另有餐费、房屋租赁费、星槎维修费、和心理医疗服务费……」
"There are also fees for meals, rent, starskiff maintenance, and mental counseling..."
你愕然，一张纸条上竟然能写下这么多数字。你随手掏了掏箱子，里面另有一张字条。
You are stunned to see so many figures written on a single piece of paper. You run your hand around the inside of the box to find another note.
继续念纸条上的字。
Keep reading.
「首先，我要讲清楚，是在你的强烈要求下我才贷款购入饭团的。其次，得了吧，你以为我不知道你想玩什么把戏？」
"Firstly, let's get this straight. It was you who kept telling me to take out a loan to buy Riceball. Secondly, just give up. You think I don't know what kind of games you're playing?"
「你想让我睹狗思人对吧？你以为我会在看到这条狗的时候心软得淌了一地，然后立刻抛下手头一切飞奔向你？你想让我看着你的账单愧疚的睡不着对吧？」

"You want to give this to me so it can remind me of you, don't you? You think my heart will skip a beat when I see this dog, and I'll come running back to you? You think seeing all your bills will keep me up at night, wracked with guilt? Right?"
「这一万多个日日夜夜来我们不停争吵、撕扯、冷战，然后和好；接着再争吵，这种乏味的戏码翻来覆去上演太多次！我厌倦了！我厌倦了！我厌倦了！」

"We've been fighting, arguing, ignoring each other, and reconciling just to fight again for over ten thousand days and nights now. This little drama has gone on too long! I'm tired! I'm done! I've had it!"
「也许你想说上面这些猜想全部都是我自作多情。对于这一点，我只想问一个问题：为什么你会知道我现在的住址？……」
"Perhaps you're going to say that all of this is my self-indulgent imagination, but then I'd like to ask you one thing: Why do you know my current address...?"
你仿佛站在一对情侣间，表情麻木地听他们数落生活中的对方令人厌恶的种种行为——哪怕这些行为根本微不足道。
It's as if you're trapped between a pair of lovers, paralyzed in shock as you hear them reel off the many things they have done to annoy each other — no matter how trivial these actions may be.
你掏了掏箱子，难以置信！难以置信！箱子的角落中竟然还有一张被揉成一团的字条？
You rummage through the box again and... unbelievable! Inconceivable! There's another note that's been crumpled into a ball in the corner?
念念看吧…
Read it...
我的天，你就这么爱看这些有的没的？
Wow, you're really that into such petty gossip?
这失落的第三张字条并非关于爱的心碎控诉，而是…一张谛听保修卡。抱歉，让你失望了。同功坊能修好谛听，但永远修不好破裂的关系。

This lost third note is actually not another list of heart-broken accusations. It is... a Diting warranty card. Sorry, I know you're disappointed. Artistry Hardware can repair a Diting, but we will never be able to repair a broken relationship.
但无论如何，为了鼓舞您的求知精神，您失去了生命中宝贵的几分钟，换来了一堂生动的亲密关系通识课。
Either way, in your spirited quest for knowledge, you've lost some precious few minutes of your life to learn a vivid lesson in intimate relationships.
你决定将小家伙送去地衡司，他们会为谛听找个妥善的安置之处。
You decide to send the little dog over to the Realm-Keeping Commission. They will find a fitting home for this Diting.
忘了爱吧，带小狗远走。
Love is transient, but dogs are humanity's best friend.
不管这对恋人间发生了什么样的龃龉，时将一只小狗装在狭窄逼仄的快递箱中邮来寄去，这绝不为任何有爱心的无名客所乐见。
No matter what happened between the lovers, mailing a puppy back and forth in a cramped little delivery box would upset any caring Nameless.
这些狗血的争吵与你无关。你决定将小家伙送去地衡司，他们会为谛听找个妥善的安置之处。
These petty squabbles are nothing to do with you. You decide to send the little dog over to the Realm-Keeping Commission. They will find a fitting home for this Diting.
够了，你不想看狗血感情戏。
Enough. I don't want to see any more of this cringy romance drama.
不管这对恋人间发生了什么样的龃龉，时将一只小狗装在狭窄逼仄的快递箱中邮来寄去，这绝不为任何有爱心的无名客所乐见。
No matter what happened between the lovers, mailing a puppy back and forth in a cramped little delivery box would upset any caring Nameless.
这些狗血的争吵与你无关。你决定将小家伙送去地衡司，他们会为谛听找个妥善的安置之处。
These petty squabbles are nothing to do with you. You decide to send the little dog over to the Realm-Keeping Commission. They will find a fitting home for this Diting.
将小狗送去地衡司。
Send the puppy to the Realm-Keeping Commission.
不用说，虽然谛听是机巧之物，但无论何时将一只小狗装在狭窄逼仄的快递箱中邮来寄去，这绝不为任何有爱心的无名客所乐见。
It goes without saying that even though a Diting is an ingenium device, mailing a puppy back and forth in a cramped little delivery box would upset any caring Nameless.
你决定将小家伙送去地衡司，他们会为谛听找个妥善的安置之处。
You decide to send the little dog over to the Realm-Keeping Commission. They will find a fitting home for this Diting.
默默走开！
I'm out of here!
呃…好吧，毕竟开拓者是自由的。不过如果你改变主意了，也可以回来看看。
Oh... Alright. A Trailblazer is a free spirit, after all. But you can come back and check this out again later if you change your mind.
这里堆放着不少货物。你仔细查看那些快递箱上的单据，发现它们早在很久之前就该送到收件人手中了。
There is a large pile of goods stacked up here. You look closely at the receipts and realize that these should have been delivered to the recipients long ago.
大量本该寄出的货物堆积于此，往来行人却仿佛理所当然似的熟视无睹。你检查了一番，才在旁边的货箱上看到一段铭文——

A huge pile of parcels that should have already been delivered are stacked up and passers-by ignore them as if they are nothing unusual. You inspect closely and realize there is an inscription on the cargo box to the side...
「货运飞行士凤云，沉默寡言，不善交际。曾为斗舰飞行士，从军时未立寸功，退役后默默无闻。」
"Cargo pilot Fengyun was a taciturn and unsociable man. Once a fighter pilot, he retired from the army without merit and fell into obscurity."
「后有药王贼作乱，凤云卸货于此处，乘槎迎击，吸引火力、争取时间、保护平民。不幸槎毁人亡，尸骨无存。」

"When Sanctus Medicus stirred up trouble, Fengyun unloaded his cargo here and used his starskiff to attract enemy firepower, buying time and protecting the civilians. Unfortunately, his vessel was destroyed, and his remains were never found."
「骚乱平息后，没有任何人前来认领这些货物。」
"When the chaos fell quiet, no one came forward to claim these goods."
（献上敬意）
(Salute in respect)
（默默致哀）
(Mourn in silence)
当你再次观察这些货物时，发现它们已经不再是一堆零散的货物，而是一块雄伟的丰碑。没人能从这丰碑中带走任何一块瓦砾，因为它已是支撑这座巨舰的柱石。

As you inspect these items again, you realize that they are no longer a scattered bunch of boxes but a great monument. No one can remove a single stone from this great monument, as it is now the foundations of a great ship.
墙角堆着三个快递箱。依照你的良好习惯，你决定看看它们都是来自何处、去向何方的。
There are three delivery boxes piled up in the corner. As you are a good person, you decide to take a look at where they are from and where they are going.
你凑近一看，才发现这三个破旧的箱子并非快递。箱子上赫然写着「信仰质量理论实验用具」几个大字。
As you approach, you realize that these old boxes are not actually courier parcels. There is a note on them that reads: "Items for the faith mass theory experiment" in large letters.
你隐约记得「信仰质量理论」这个概念，好像是丹恒给你科普的。简单来说，就是富集了人类信仰的物件，会在人的主观感受上更重。

You vaguely remember the concept of the "faith mass theory." You believe it was Dan Heng who taught you about it. Put simply, it states that items filled with the reverence and faith of humanity will subconsciously feel heavier.
在很多学者眼中，这不仅仅是心理作用，而是人心影响到物质世界的例证。这项研究是当世显学，相关学者每年都能获得不少研究津贴。

Many scholars believe that this is not only a psychological effect, but actually evidence that the mind can influence the physical world. This research is currently an extremely popular scientific discipline and scholars in this area receive generous grants year after year.
眼前的三个箱子上分别写着：「铁块（1斤）」、「铁块（1斤）」和「帝弓遗物（1斤）」。
The three boxes in front of you read: "Iron Block (1 kilo)," "Iron Block (1 kilo)," and "Reignbow's Relic (1 kilo)."
按照「信仰质量理论」，即使三者质量相同，「帝弓遗物」对仙舟民来说也明显更重一些。
According to the "faith mass theory," even if the three items are of the same mass, Xianzhou citizens would perceive the Reignbow's Relic to be significantly heavier.
真的吗？我试试看。
Really? Let me try.
你依次拿起三个箱子，逐一比较它们的重量。写着「帝弓遗物」的那个箱子出奇得重，重到远远超出了你理解中「主观认知带来的偏差」。

You pick up the three boxes in turn, comparing their weight. The box with "Reignbow's Relic" written on it is far heavier than expected. That's a much larger weight difference than you anticipated from a "deviation caused by subjective perception."
如果箱子上的标志没有错，那么这三个东西应该都只有1斤重。也许的确是「信仰」赋予了帝弓遗物更大的质量。
If the signs on the crates are correct, the three items should all weigh 1 kilo each. Perhaps it really is "faith" that caused the relics to have a heavier weight.
也许标志有误，拆箱看看吧。
Maybe the sign is wrong. Have a look inside the boxes.
你拆开了两个标记着「铁块（1斤）」的箱子，里面各安静地躺着一个普通的铁块。然后你拆开了标记着「帝弓遗物（1斤）」的箱子。
You opened the two boxes with "Iron Block (1 kilo)" written on them. Inside each, you find a regular iron block. Then, you open the box marked with "Reignbow's Relic (1 kilo)"...
箱子里面空无一物，只有一张字条——
You find that the box is completely empty except for a single note...
「我知道会有人格外好奇，拆箱检查。这个箱子中空无一物，但它就是比那几个铁块要重。为什么？」
"I knew that people will grow curious and open this box to check. This box is completely empty, but is still heavier than the boxes with iron blocks. Why is that?"
「因为人们相信这个箱子中装着『帝弓遗物』，而『信仰』是有质量的。」
"This is because people believe that this box contains the Reignbow's Relic. Faith has weight."
「我希望这个实验能彻底打消您的疑虑，相信这一理论的真实性——我们的心灵活动，可以广泛地影响到物质世界。」
"I hope that this experiment serves to dispel any doubt and that you will accept our theory — that the activities of our souls and minds can affect the world around us on a large scale."
世界可真奇妙啊…
The world is truly miraculous...
尽管刚才所发生的一切都有违常识，但铁一般的事实摆在你眼前，你不得不接受。
Although what just happened wildly contradicts common sense, you are faced with iron-clad proof and have no choice but to accept it.
你重新封好三个箱子，将它们摆回原处，带着对科学的敬畏转身离去了。
You seal up the three boxes and return them to their original place, and turn to leave with a new respect for science.
这箱子里肯定还有东西…
There must be something else in this box...
你无论如何都无法相信眼前的现象，索性把心一横，用球棒对着这个空箱子狠狠砸了下去。
You just cannot bring yourself to accept the phenomenon in front of you. You throw caution to the wind and whack the empty box hard with your bat.
「呛啷」一声，球棒打击到了一个硬物，将你的虎口震得生疼。你捡起箱子，撕开打击位置上覆盖着的纸壳……
With a great "twang," your bat strikes a hard object and rattles your hand painfully. You pick up the box and tear back the paper covering the area you struck...
…纸壳下面是一块又薄又重的金属板。
...You find a thin, heavy metal plate underneath the paper.
看起来「信仰质量理论」的确是当世显学，用它赚来的津贴一定不少。
It seems that this "faith mass theory" is indeed a popular scientific discipline. People must have used it to earn many a large grant...
无聊，都是些迷信。
Boring. This is all superstition.
如果一个现象只能在人的主观体验中发生，那不就是心理作用吗？你才不信这些「学者」的胡说八道，他们无非是为了骗些研究经费罢了。

If a phenomenon only works under the influence of the human subconscious, doesn't that make it no more than a psychological placebo effect? You refuse to believe these so-called scholars. They're just trying to scam grant agencies for money.
于是你留下那三个箱子，转身离去了。
So, you leave the three boxes behind, turn around, and walk away.
都是迷信，我没什么兴趣。
It's all superstition. I'm not interested.
如果一个现象只能在人的主观体验中发生，那不就是心理作用吗？你才不信这些「学者」的胡说八道，他们无非是为了骗些研究经费罢了。

If a phenomenon only works under the influence of the human subconscious, doesn't that make it no more than a psychological placebo effect? You refuse to believe these so-called scholars. They're just trying to scam grant agencies for money.
于是你留下那三个箱子，转身离去了。
So, you leave the three boxes behind, turn around, and walk away.
地上摆着一个敞开的快递箱。你打算看看这是谁遗落在这里的，却没在上面找到单据。应该贴着单据的地方贴着一张纸条，上面如是写着——
An open package lies on the ground before you. You want to see who has left it behind, but there is no receipt on it. You find a note where the receipt should be attached, stating:
「此处乃是金人巷未解之谜：午夜谜箱。」
"This is the unsolved mystery of Aurum Alley: The Midnight Mystery Boxes."
「这几个看似平平无奇的纸箱比金人巷的历史还要悠久。没人知道谁制造了它们，也没人知道它们从何而来。」
"These seemingly normal and unassuming cardboard boxes have actually been around for longer than the Aurum Alley itself. No one knows who created them, or where they came from."
「我们只知道，就算它被人盗走或损毁，第二天午夜还是会原封不动地出现在这里。而那些对纸箱下手的人，全都遭到了厄运。」
"All we know is that, even if they are stolen or destroyed, they will reappear intact here at midnight the next day. What's more, those that moved or damaged the boxes will all met their doom."
「人们惊讶地发现，只要在其中投入金银首饰或其他贵重物品，就能获得祈福，未来的人生一片顺利。」
"To people's shock, they realized that if they placed gold, silver, jewelry, or other precious items inside the boxes, their future lives will be blessed and full of good luck."
「而那些对箱中财物出手的人，也无一例外遭到了厄运。」
"Whereas those who attempt to poach the treasures inside the boxes will, without exception, meet their doom."
你又看了看箱内，发现里面已经积累了不少贵重物品。
You look inside the boxes again and realize that there are a number of precious items already piled inside.
我也祈个福吧…
I'll ask for good fortune, too...
你投入了一些财物，并虔诚祈愿「午夜谜箱」护佑你未来的开拓之路万事顺遂。
You place some money inside and make a devout prayer that the Midnight Mystery Boxes would protect you in your future Trailblaze journey.
没人知道「午夜谜箱」是否满意你的供奉，但每天趁着夜色回收箱中财物的那小子应该挺满意的。
No one knows if the Midnight Mystery Boxes are satisfied with your offerings, but the man that comes to collect all the treasures under the cover of night every day must be very satisfied.
骗人也走点心吧，这什么玩意。
What a lazy con. This is ridiculous.
你秉承着理性思考的原则，对这个莫名其妙的「午夜谜箱」视若无睹。
You stick to your principles of rational thinking and ignore these mysterious Midnight Mystery Boxes.
没人知道「午夜谜箱」是否对此感到失望，但每天趁着夜色回收箱中财物的那小子应该挺失望的。
No one knows if the Midnight Mystery Boxes are disappointed, but the man that comes to collect all the treasures under the cover of night every day must be very disappointed.
哈哈，这些宝贝都归我了！
Haha, these treasures are all mine!
你狠狠搜刮了一番，将「午夜谜箱」中的贵重物品统统收入了囊中。
You mercilessly plunder all the valuables from the Midnight Mystery Boxes and stuff them into your bag.
是夜，金人巷里又多了一个伤心的骗子。
That night, the streets of Aurum Alley saw yet another heartbroken conman.
几个箱子并不整齐地排列在地上。凭借翻别人快递箱的深厚经验，你一眼就看出，这是几个空箱子。
A few boxes lay in a messy formation on the ground before you. With your great experience of poking through other people's courier packages, you can tell immediately that they are empty.
为什么要把几个空箱子摆在路边呢？你试着拎起其中一个箱子，却发现他们竟是链接在一起的。
Why would someone leave empty boxes on the road? You try picking one of them up, and are surprised to find that they are linked together.
换言之，这并不是「几个空箱子」而是「一个奇形怪状的空箱子」。
In other words, they are not just "a few empty boxes." They are "a strangely-shaped empty box."
这时，你才看到箱子下面写着一行龙飞凤舞的毛笔字——「罗浮当代艺术双年展参展作品：『快递之龙』」。
At this moment, you notice a line of elegant calligraphy written underneath the boxes: "Biennial Exhibition of Contemporary Luofu Art: Delivery Dragon."
原来这是一件艺术品…好险，你差点就闯大祸了。还是赶紧走吧。
So, this is an art installation... That was close. You could have made a huge mess. Maybe you should get out of here.
我怎么没看出这是条龙？
How come I can't tell this is meant to be a dragon?
废话，能让你看出来，那就不叫艺术了。
Duh. If you could tell, then it would not be art.
原来这就是当代艺术啊…
So, THIS is what people call contemporary art...
怎么样？有没有感受到艺术对你灵魂的洗涤？
Well? Do you feel the power of art cleansing your soul?
这什么破玩意儿…
What garbage is this...
要是能被所有人理解，那就不叫艺术了。
It would not be art if everyone could understand it.
太美了，「快递之龙」。
It's beautiful! Delivery Dragon!
是啊，只要凝望着它，就能感受到它那超凡卓绝的艺术表达。
That's right. Just looking at it would make one feel its extraordinary artistic expression.
「快递箱」正寓意着我们的现代生活，而「龙」则寓意着我们的传统价值。
The "delivery boxes" are an expression of modern life, whereas the "dragon" is a representation of our traditional values.
也许「快递之龙」并未给出一个答案，但它却提出了一个尖锐的问题——当现代生活与传统价值碰撞时，诞生的究竟是什么呢？
Perhaps Delivery Dragon cannot give us any answers, but it poses a powerful question: What could be created when modern life collides with traditional values?
总之快离远些吧，这些当代艺术都是坐地起价的，真要不小心搞坏了，你把帕姆卖了都赔不起。
Either way, best to move away from here. These modern art pieces go for ridiculous prices. If you accidentally break it, even selling Pom-Pom won't cover it!
就在这千钧一发之际…
Just in the nick of time...
驭空屏息凝神…
Yukong held her breath...
几个云骑落了地…
A few Cloud Knights landed...
信仰帝弓司命祂老人家的…
We of the Xianzhou Alliance are not the only ones who trust in the Reignbow Arbiter...
仙人本为岁阳敌…
For millennia, the heliobi and Xianzhou fought endlessly as sworn enemy and foe...
说到咱这儿星槎海，就不能不提司辰宫，提到咱这儿司辰宫啊，就不能不提驭空大人。
You can't talk about Starskiff Haven without mentioning the Palace of Astrum, and you can't talk about the Palace of Astrum without mentioning Madam Yukong.
我以前见过驭空大人手持弯弓「云鸢铣珧」百步穿杨，那场面真是……
I once saw Madam Yukong with her Cloudkite Resplendent Longbow, shooting with tremendous accuracy from a hundred feet away. Truly a sight to —
你等等，「百步穿杨」？你说我站在离驭空大人一百零一步的地方，可以用手接住飞箭吗？
Hang on, "a hundred feet"? Are you saying if I stood <unbreak>101</unbreak> feet away, I could just pluck her arrows out of the air?
「百步穿杨」就是一个文学概念，通常来说驭空大人的箭就算飞行<unbreak>1500</unbreak>米也具有十足的威力。
It's a figure of speech. Generally speaking, Madam Yukong's arrows are a threat from even <unbreak>5000</unbreak> feet.
那我在<unbreak>1501</unbreak>米能用手接住飞箭吗？
So you're saying if I stood <unbreak>5001</unbreak> feet away, I could catch her arrows.
你为什么非要接那一箭？
Why do you *want* to catch her arrows?
我是阿往，这位是阿来，今天给大家来一段相声。
