I'm Forth, and this is Back'n, and today we're ready to tickle your funny bone with our crosstalk comedy.
列位观众可能不认识，这位阿往，可是罗浮鼎鼎大名的相声表演艺术家啊。我这次来到咱们星槎海，就是专程为了听您的相声啊！我可算是您的忠实观众。
You guys may not recognize Forth, but he's a famous crosstalk comedy performer on the Luofu. I came all the way to Starskiff Haven just to watch your performance! I'm a big fan.
哎哟，那可真是谢谢您捧场。那这样吧…您能不能请我吃顿饭？我也不挑嘴，按神策府宴请外宾那个标准就行。

Well, well, well, look at you being all supportive. My number one fan, huh? How about you treat me to dinner, then? Don't worry, I'm easy to please, but I'm not touching anything the Seat of Divine Foresight wouldn't touch.
不是…凭什么啊？您这怎么一上就骗吃骗喝的？
But of course, I... Wait, you're thinking about food already? We just started the show — shouldn't we at least finish the first act?
嗐，古人不都说了吗，「观众是演员的衣食父母」啊！衣食父母请我吃一顿饭，合情合理。
Well, "the audience is the hand that feeds" as they say — and I'm feeling pretty hungry right about now. It's only fitting that "the hand that feeds" treats me to dinner, don't you think?
那你凑过来点儿。
Hmm, well you'll need to choose, first.
怎么？
Choose what?
让爸爸抱抱你。
Left hand or right hand.
你一边待着去吧！
I'm not hungry anymore.
我是阿往，这位是阿来....
I'm Forth, and this is Back'n...
我是阿往，这位是阿来....
I'm Forth, and this is Back'n...
桌上的投影正在卖力地说着评书。它举手投足间的做派和真正的西衍先生一模一样。
A projection on the table is telling a story animatedly. Its performance style is exactly the same as the real Mr. Xiyan.

谈笑的岁阳
Chattering Heliobus
他老惦记着他那古海，天天往浴缸里倒海盐，还说什么这是「大海的味道」。我反正受不了！
He often misses the ancient sea, so he pours sea salt into his bath daily and claims that it is the "scent of the sea." I had enough!
若是从化外民的角度看，仙舟上的阵法封印几乎都来自太卜司——其实不然，太卜司占了七成，十王司占了两成，鬼画符占了一成。

From an outworlder's perspective, it almost seems like the matrix seals on Xianzhou are all from the Divination Commission, but that's not true. Only <unbreak>70%</unbreak> of the seals come from the Divination Commission, <unbreak>20%</unbreak> from the Ten-Lords Commission, and the rest are random unintelligible symbols.
你不知道束形却邪阵是否还能正常运转，但你闭上眼，幻想自己身躯膨胀至山丘大小，徒手倒拔起阵中间的柱子的身姿该有多惊人。

You're not sure if the Evil Binding Matrix is still functioning, but the moment you close your eyes, you imagine your body inflates to the size of a hill. How scary would it be to pluck out the pillar in the middle of the matrix with your bare hands?
根据十王司冥差的说法，曾经有一个岁阳为了报答救命恩人转世持明，闯入人间。却在显出原形之后，被十王司冥差镇伏在镇妖塔中——后来塔被毁掉了。

According to the spiritfarers of the Ten-Lords Commission, there was a heliobus who reincarnated as a Vidyadhara and entered the human world to repay a benefactor for saving its life. However, once it revealed its true form, a Ten-Lords Commission spiritfarer captured and sealed it in a suppression tower, which was later destroyed.
你应该珍惜这段没有意义的介绍，因为等你镇伏完岁阳之后，这个镇妖塔就不显示调查文本了…真是可惜，见到你是我的荣幸。

Cherish this meaningless introduction while you still can, because once you've subdued the heliobus, the suppression tower will no longer show you the investigation text... What a shame, it had been an honor to meet you.
不过，其实倒也不必可惜，能用来镇伏岁阳的镇妖塔才是最好的镇妖塔。
But there's no need for pity, for only the best towers can be used to subdue heliobi.
你试图推开戏台后门，但某种思维惯性掐灭了这刚萌发的念想，你想起品行高尚的人只走正门。
You try to push open the backstage door, but some kind of ingrained thought extinguishes this budding idea. You remember that a person of a noble character only enters through the front door.
你本想去后台一探究竟，但在你推门时，眼角余光瞥见里面似乎有人在很高的地方沉默眺望这里。你吓了一跳，向后退去，那道高瘦的人影也随之消失。

You want to explore backstage, but the moment you push open the door, you notice someone silently watching you from a very high place out of the corner of your eyes. Surprised, you leap back, but that slender shadow has vanished.
你本想去后台再探究竟，此时你通过了一次「历史」检定——戏台上的门不应该是这样的，应该是「出将」和「入相」，那么这里究竟是…？

You originally wanted to explore the backstage further, but at this moment, you pass a History check — doors onstage shouldn't look like this. Shouldn't they be labeled "dextral entrance" and "sinistral exit"? Then what is this place...?
曾经，绥园里有不少传统艺人登台唱戏，被称作「戏子」。时移世易，如今，绥园里星火之精四处横行，它们登上戏台，被称作「戏精」。

In the past, several traditional performers, known as "drama actors," sang and acted onstage in Fyxestroll Garden. As things change over time, the Starfire Essences are now everywhere in Fyxestroll Garden. Whenever they go on stage, they are known as "drama queens."
别再往门缝里看了，万一真的看到什么可怎么办呀。
Stop peeping through the doorway. What if you really saw something?
许多年前神秘失踪或沉海的船只，经过许多年后被发现在海上航行，而船里空无一人——它们被叫作「幽灵船」，或者它们只是单纯被认错了。

Ships that mysteriously disappeared or sank many years ago are found traveling on the sea. Since no one is found on the ship, they are known as "ghost ships," or maybe, they are simply misidentified by the people.
「飞翔的岱舆人号」——传说中永远无法返乡的幽灵船，担负着押送星海中遇难亡灵抵达冥界的使命，注定永远漂泊星海，无法靠岸。

"Flying Daiyuman" — a legendary ghost ship that can never return home. Its mission is to bring the lost spirits in the sea of stars to the underworld. It is doomed to sail the sea of stars forever, allegedly never able to make port.
在你面前的只是星槎的投影，你明白吗？你不会遇到章鱼头船长，也不会遇到受诅咒的怪物，星槎更不会从海底突然冒出来。

What's before you is merely the projection of a starskiff, do you understand? You are neither going to meet Captain Octopushead nor the cursed creatures. And the starskiff will not suddenly leap out of the ocean.
书架上弥漫着一股潮湿阴冷的腐朽气息，木纹表面的清漆业已斑驳，但书籍依旧屹立不倒，不禁令人怀疑它们会不会是用来充门面的装饰品。

A moist and eerie rotten stench from the shelves percolates the air. The varnish on the woodgrain surface has mottled, but the books remain standing on the shelves, making one wonder if they are just for decoration.
乍一看，书籍摆得满满当当，从封面上的灰尘来看，近百年来也没有人翻开过。殊不知，这是十王司带过来的文件…十王司是不是有点跟不上时代了？

At first glance, the books are packed neatly on the shelves, and judging from the dust on the covers, no one had touched them for nearly a hundred years. Unbeknownst to the others, these are documents brought by the Ten-Lords Commission... Say, aren't they a little behind times?
这也正常，爱书之人总是摆出一副全年阅读清单都排满了的焦急模样，但到最后却连书皮都忘记翻开。
That's normal. A bibliophile loves getting panicked over a fully packed annual reading list, only to forget to flip open their books at the end.
十王司收集的各类文件——其中不乏某些珍贵的特殊印本，还有特意收集而来的短生种们出版的刊物。

The Ten-Lords Commission collects various kinds of documents, including certain rare and valuable special printings, as well as journals published by the short-life species that have been deliberately collected.
你暗自揣测着书卷主人的下落，怀疑对方是否遭遇了某种不测。但知识这东西，生不带来死不带去，想到这里，你不禁松了口气。

You secretly speculate on the whereabouts of the scroll's owner, wondering if they have met with an unfortunate end. But knowledge isn't a thing that one is born or dies with. You can't help but feel relieved at the thought of it.
看来十王司的「无纸化办公」不行。
It seems like the Ten-Lords Commission's "paperless work policy" isn't working.
不过十王司要是真的「无纸化办公」了，没有这些像模像样的书架，你会觉得他们是在这里办公吗？不会的。至此，你已经理解了书架的意义。

But if the Ten-Lords Commission were to go "paperless," do the people here look like they are seriously working without these presentable shelves? Certainly not. At this moment, you suddenly realize the meaning behind the existence of these shelves.
悬浮在夜空中的灯笼，幸福的人看到这星星点点的光芒便会感到温暖。
With several lanterns floating in the night sky, such a starry view will certainly warm a happy person's heart.
悬在头顶的未必是剑，也可以是灯笼。
What's hanging above the head may not be a blade. It can also be a lantern.
浮灯微光，并不是只为你而闪耀，有传闻说它身负接引游魂的重责。
The shimmering light of the floating lanterns does not only shine for you; it is said that it carries the hefty responsibility of guiding wandering souls.
灯笼静静漂浮在夜色中，周身散发着温暖的光芒，平等地为所有人照亮回家的路——尽管并非所有人都有家可归。
The lanterns silently float in the night sky, each emitting a warm and uniform glow that lights the way home for all, even though not everyone has a home to return to.
灯笼静静漂浮在夜色中，周身散发着温暖的光芒，平等地为所有人照亮回家的路——换句话说，你要是跟着走，不一定会回自己的家。
The lanterns silently float in the night sky, each emitting a warm glow, equally lighting the way home for all. In other words, you may not necessarily return to your home if you follow the lights.
在某些星球上，曾经有一对父子在暴风雨天气中外出，利用风筝将雷电装进了储存静电的容器之中，他们获得了无数名誉——可是风筝得到了什么。

On a certain planet, a father-son duo went out on a stormy day and used a kite to contain lightning in a vessel for storing static electricity. As such, they gained a remarkable reputation — but what did the kite gain?
羽翼风筝被遗弃在此，断掉的线上似有斑驳血痕，令你想起在有翼民中曾有悲歌流传——曲中人在恋人死后掷双翼于火中，自此斩绝情爱。

A feathered kite is abandoned here, and mottled blood stains can be seen on the snapped string, reminding you of a sad song passed among the winged people. The song speaks of how they discard their wings in the fire after the death of their lover as a symbol of detaching from love.
断线的风筝和「无糖星芋啵啵」一样，被人抛弃的命运早已注定。
A kite with a broken string and a sugar-free Startaro Bubble Tea share the same fate — they are destined to be abandoned.
观察力敏锐的人早就发现了，为逝去的飞行士献上风筝，是狐族人一种不言的传统——可见，飞行早就是他们生命中的一部分了。
An observant person would have quickly realized that it is an unspoken tradition among the foxians to dedicate kites to fallen pilots — it is evident that flying has long been a part of their lives.
大部分放在这里的风筝应该是用于纪念逝者，少部分是因为风筝线断了，不小心落在绥园里了——不然，你看，树上甚至也挂着有。
Most of the kites placed here are supposed to be dedicated to the dead, and only a few landed here due to snapped strings. Look, why else do you think those kites are on the trees?
人生的不幸，在碑文中短促的生卒年月里展现得淋漓尽致。
The short period between birth and death in the inscription vividly shows the misfortunes of one's life.
墓碑上篆刻的字还算清晰可见，但周身遍布裂痕，它的来头或已腐朽。
The words carved on the tombstone are fairly visible, but the surrounding cracks reveal the poor condition it's in.
一起吃饭的未必是朋友，愿意借钱的也未必是朋友，但愿意勤来对方墓碑前祭拜的，肯定是真心朋友。
Someone who eats with you or lends you money may not be your friend, but the one who is willing to pay you a visit at your grave is certainly a true friend.
似乎有人在定期维护这块墓碑，墓碑表面虽有风化痕迹，但其余地方却很干净。
It seems like someone has been regularly maintaining this tombstone. Aside from its weathered surface, the rest of the area is clean and tidy.
在生命消失以后，爱并不会消失，只是换一种方式存在，你对此深信不疑。
Love doesn't disappear after a life is gone. It just exists in a different way, and you strongly believe in it.
你注视着这块墓碑，碑文上记录着墓主人此生的信条：「谦卑、仁爱、忍耐、节约、勤劳——」
You gaze at the tombstone, where the inscription records the life creed of the deceased: "Humility, Charity, Patience, Frugality, Diligence—"
你稍移视线，辨认出了墓碑上的最后一句话：「——以上种种我都做不到！」
You shift your gaze slightly and notice the last sentence on the tombstone: "—All of which I can never attain!"
但至少展现出墓主人的诚实，如今世道，这种品质可不多见了。
Well, at least it displays the truthfulness of the deceased. It's rare to find honest people these days.
你仔细辨认着墓碑上的字：「抱歉，这次我要断更了。」这似乎是某位小说作者的墓碑。
You carefully read the inscription on the tombstone: "Sorry, I can't update the story anymore." This seems to be the tombstone of a novel author.
仙舟小说的篇幅之长你早有耳闻，但你相信这位作者的故事并不会就此完结，故事会在读者心间继续连载下去。
You've heard about the length of Xianzhou's novel, but you believe that this author's story will not end here. The story will continue to unfold in the hearts of readers.
这块墓碑表面的碑文格外不同，原有的碑文已被毁得面目全非，你仔细辨认，只能勉强认出「爱妻」几个字。
The inscription of this tombstone looks different from the others. The original inscription is now indecipherable. On a closer look, you can only see the words, "my beloved wife."
原有的表面被新篆的碑文所覆盖，内容倒是清晰可见：「她本该有更好的人生。」
A new inscription is written over the original surface, and the content is clearly visible: "She could have a better life."
你静静地注视着眼前的墓碑，认真阅读着墓碑上篆刻的字迹：
You silently study the tombstone before you as you solemnly read the inscription carved on it:
「天舶司左侧停泊口办包年有积分，十年清空一次，记得兑换。」看得出来墓主生前是个热心人。

"The leftmost dock of the Sky-Faring Commission gives points to customers with an annual package. Points are cleared once every decade, so remember to redeem them." You can tell that the deceased was a kind-hearted person.
谢谢你，停泊侠。
Thank you, Dock Hero.
象征家族的图腾，宣示了五大家系对梦境的统治和维护。
A totem representing The Family, declaring the Five Lineages' rule and maintenance of the dreamscape.
关于这个图腾所指的家系，来宾们议论纷纷。有人说它头顶的三叶草是苜蓿草家的象征，有人则说它中心的纹路代表了橡木家系。

Guests have different views of which Family lineage this totem refers to. Some argue that the three-leaf clover at the crown is the symbol of the Alfalfa Family, while others say that the lines in the center represent the Oak Family.
外来者们无法理解的是，匹诺康尼的五大家系真能做到不分彼此，万众如一。图腾的归属于他们而言甚至不如游客的一声喷嚏紧要。

What outsiders could never understand is that the five major lineages of Penacony are actually one and the same. They represent one large group. The ownership of this totem is as important to them as a guest's sneeze.
阵阵音乐从门后传来，里面或许正在举办一场舞会。
A chorus of music resounds from behind the door. There may be a ball or something happening inside.
你听见男男女女的笑声彼此交叠…如果你也是其中之一，你会邀请谁呢？
You can hear the laughter of men and women washing over each other... If you were inside, who would you have invited along?
一对男女的争吵声从门后传来……
You hear the voices of a man and woman arguing coming from the other side of the door...
男人
Man
早就跟你说过，我们付不起这么高的房费！我们已经没有信用点了！
I've told you, we can't afford such an expensive room fee! We're out of credits!
女人
Lady
怎么会这样…我的美梦，我的美梦还没结束！你赔！
How could this happen... My dream, my dream is not complete! You have to pay!
男人
Man
别闹了，趁退房时间还没过，赶紧走吧。
Don't cause a scene. Let's skip the check-out and leave.
房间里只余一片死寂……
The room falls deadly silent...
什么声音都没有。你尝试将耳朵贴在门板上，细心去察觉。恍神间，你好像听到了枪械上膛的声响，就在房门对面。
There is no sound at all. You try pressing your ear against the door and listen closely. Suddenly, you feel like you hear the sound of a gun being loaded on the other side of the door.
...Who's there?
声音很虚弱，像是随时会断气那般。并且，你清楚记得你没有敲门。
Their voice is very weak, like they could take their last breath at any moment. You remember clearly that you never actually knocked on the door.
你好，查水表的。
Hello, I'm here to check the water meter!
走开…别多管闲事！
Get lost... This is none of your business!
声嘶力竭的呼喊过后，一切归于平静。
After the throat-shredding yells, everything fell quiet once more.
房间里没有传来任何声响。
Not a whisper comes from inside the room.
门后传来噼里啪啦的老式打字机声响，清脆而急促，随后是纸张被狠狠撕碎的声音，每次撕扯仿佛都带着无边的疯狂与恨意。

From behind the door, you hear the sound of an old-fashioned typewriter, clicking and tapping with a crisp, hurried tempo, followed by the sound of paper being furiously torn to scraps, each tear done with what feels like a frenzied hatred.
紧接着，你听见有个男人反复念叨着什么。
Shortly after, you hear a man repeating something to themselves.
只工作不玩耍，聪明的孩子也变傻~
All work and no play make the smart child stupid...
只工作不玩耍，聪明的孩子也变傻~
All work and no play make the smart child stupid...
一阵慵懒的气息从门后渗出，伴随着似有似无的怨念。
A sluggish voice resounds from behind the door, carrying a vague sense of resentment.
疲倦的男性
Tired Man
可是，组长，现在是放假期间……
But, team leader, it's the holidays...
疲倦的男性
Tired Man
不，我不是那个意思…您说的对，「一切献给琥珀王」。
No, that's not what I mean... You're right: "All for the Amber Lord."
疲倦的男性
Tired Man
是、是吗？太好了……
Oh, oh really? That's great...
电话挂断的声音传来，随后是身体栽倒在沙发上的声音。
You hear the sound of the phone being hung up, followed by someone slumping down onto a sofa.
疲倦的男性
Tired Man
呼，幸好不是真的要加班。
Phew, so glad I don't have to work overtime.
疲倦的男性
Tired Man
是时候回到梦中去了…先小睡一会儿吧。
It's time to return to my dreams... I'll take a little nap.
房门那头传来似有似无的鼾声，那是真实的睡眠。
You hear what sounds like snoring coming from behind the door. They're sleeping for real.
淋浴的水声始终响着，平稳，空洞，没有变化，没有意义，只是…有点吓人。
You have heard the sound of a running shower this whole time, steady, empty, unchanging. There is no significance. It's just a little... creepy.
——「不要开门！」不知为何，这样的声音忽然在你的脑海里响起。你很疑惑门后究竟藏着什么，所以你打算……
"Don't open the door!" You have no idea why, but this voice suddenly rings out in your head. You can't help but wonder what is hidden behind this door, so you decide to...
趴在地上偷窥门缝。
Lie on the floor and peek through the crack in the door.
轻轻握住房门把手。
Gently grasp the room door handle.
但你没有任何收获，厚重的房门像是堵无法逾越的高墙，将所有秘密全部吞噬。
Alas, to no avail. The heavy door is like an insurmountable wall, devouring all secrets within.
你听到门后传来一阵悠扬的提琴声，那动人曲调中似乎饱含思念之情；
You hear the mellifluous music of violin strings behind the door. This moving song seems to carry a sense of longing;
你听到巨大的敲击声，叮叮咚咚、断断续续，似乎暗藏着某种节律；
You hear a thunderous, percussive sound from behind the door. Stopping and starting, there seems to be some kind of hidden rhythm;
你听到几声闷响，想象的视野中，子弹正气势汹汹地嵌入昂贵的内墙；
You hear a number of muffled bangs. In your mind's eye, you imagine bullets voraciously embedding themselves into the interior walls;
…继而是死一般的静默。
...Followed by a deathly silence.
许久之后，你听见一声叹息——苍老、疲惫，怅然若失。
After some time, you hear a sigh... They sound old, tired, and dejected.
门后只有一片颓败的死寂。
You hear nothing behind the door but decadent silence.
这块巨型钟表是盛会之星的地标之一。据说最早由钟表匠制造，后被家族改进为如今的模样。
This giant clock was a landmark of the Planet of Festivities. It is said that it was originally created by the Watchmaker and later enhanced into its current form by The Family.
虽然名为钟表，但这块大家伙并不真能显示时间——只有抛弃刻度的桎梏，你才能全心全意地享受美梦。
Though called a "clock," this thing cannot actually display the time... Only by abandoning the shackles of time can one fully enjoy and embrace their dream.
堆满房间的粉红气球，象征着玫瑰般似火的热情。
Red balloons fill the entire room, symbolizing the fiery passion of roses.
你伸出手、踮起脚，试图从中摘下自己的一束幸福——但它实在太高了，而你又太矮……
You reach out and stand on your tiptoes, trying to pluck your own little bundle of happiness... But they are too high, and you are too short...
你伸出手、踮起脚，试图从中摘下自己的一束幸福——成功了，你抓住一根气球的尾巴，将它牢牢攥在手中。
You reach out and stand on your tiptoes, trying to pluck your own little bundle of happiness... Success! You grab the tip of a balloon and grasp it firmly in your hand.
反正这间房里有那么多气球，没人会介意分你一个的，对吧？
There are countless balloons in this room, after all. Who would begrudge you taking one for yourself, right?
堆满房间的粉红气球，象征着玫瑰般似火的热情。
Red balloons fill the entire room, symbolizing the fiery passion of roses.
「使用入梦池前，请勿饮用过多苏乐达。」
"Please do not drink excessive SoulGlad before entering the dreampool."
「想要品尝『元年苏乐达』的味道吗？赶快前往『黄金的时刻』吧！」
"Do you want to try the taste of Epochal SoulGlad? Hurry toward the Golden Hour!"
「想来一场梦幻般美妙的邂逅吗？『蓝调的时刻』在等着你！」
"Do you wish for a dreamlike encounter? The Blue Hour awaits!"
飞轮<unbreak>2001</unbreak>，仓鼠骑士同款球笼，通体流线型设计，百公里加速仅耗时<unbreak>2.5</unbreak>秒，助您迅速抵达酒店和梦境的每个角落。详情请咨询「奥帝购物中心」。

The Flywheel <unbreak>2001</unbreak> is the same Spheroid as the one used by the Hamster Knight. The streamlined design allows the rider to go from 0 to <unbreak>100</unbreak> km/h in <unbreak>2.5</unbreak> seconds, allowing you to reach every corner of the hotel and the dreamscape in seconds. For more information, please contact the Oti Mall.
堆叠的访客行李。即使在去往梦境的途中，有些人也想让自己拿得更多。
Guest luggage that has been stacked high. Even when visiting the dreamworld, some people want more and more.
有时候，即便是「想要做个美梦」这种事情，也需要你拥有坚实的经济基础。
Sometimes, even things like "having a beautiful dream" require a solid financial foundation.
能够自动办理入住手续的机器。但由于操作繁琐，许多访客还是更青睐人工通道。
A machine that can automatically complete the check-in process. However, as it can be a pain to operate, most guests prefer the manual approach.
前面的路被拦住了。作为一个礼貌的无名客，你应该知趣地选择掉头。
The road ahead is blocked. As a polite Nameless, you should turn back without further prompting.
这条路肯定事出有因才会被拦住…还是遵循酒店的规矩吧。
This path must be blocked for a reason... Maybe it's best to follow the rules of the hotel.
酒店公用的梦境电话，可以打给不同「时刻」。据说拨号盘上的眼睛会在通话时活过来。
A hotel public dreamphone that can make calls to different Moments. It is said that the eyes on the phone dial come alive during a call.
存放来宾贵重物品的金库，整个酒店里最安全的地方。考虑到大堂氛围不该太过严肃，设计师在它的门上额外安装了一张唱片。

The vault that stores all of the VIP guests' most valuable belongings, the safest place in the entire hotel. Considering that they did not want too stern an atmosphere in the lobby, the designer installed a record around the door.
酒店的金库门，边缘是一张巨大的唱片。倘若大堂的音乐停止，便是有人要取出极其贵重的东西。
The door to the hotel vault, bordered with a huge record. If the lobby music stops, it means that someone is going to try and remove something extremely valuable.
《在夜幕下与楼同奏》
Tower Rhapsody Under the Moonlight
《漏斗与花朵碰杯》
A Cheers of Funnel and Flower
本店不提供任何酒精饮料。
This hotel does not provide any alcoholic beverages.
元年苏乐达——一个笑话。
Epochal SoulGlad — a joke.
信用点和苜蓿币皆可支付。
Credits and Alfalfa credits accepted.
随机赠送饮品——如果店长心情好的话。
Receive a random drink — if the hotel manager is in a good mood.
高脚杯中没有一滴酒，全是苏乐达。
There's not a drop of alcohol in the goblet. It's all SoulGlad.
一杯饮品附赠一个小秘密，口味配方随您挑选。
Each glass comes with a little secret — you get to pick the flavor combination!
这台电梯通往酒店数之不尽的其他楼层，不过现在你并不想去。
This elevator goes to the endless other floors of the hotel, but you have no desire to leave right now.
你确定还要在这枯燥无味的现实里浪费时间，而不是及早投身美梦中的狂欢？
Are you sure you want to continue wasting time in this dry and flavorless reality? Why not cast yourself into the carnival within a beautiful dream?
酒店房间标配的恒温装置。其火焰可以在吸收热量和释放热量间切换，从而使房间温度下降或上升。
Thermostats are fitted into the hotel rooms as standard. Their flames can be switched to either absorb or release heat, heating or cooling the room.
人生最美妙的享受是什么？当然是一边听音乐，一边喝苏乐达。而这台设备可以让你同时做到两者。
What is the most precious moment in life? Listening to music while enjoying SoulGlad, of course! This device right here lets you enjoy both.
客房的内线电话，可以向酒店要求各种服务。
An internal hotel phone. You can request various services from the hotel staff.
据说一些高级客户能够拥有自己的专线，仅需动动指头就能召来七八位侍者。
Apparently, certain high-paying customers can receive their own personal lines, and can call up half a dozen servants with just a twitch of their finger.
《梦境的数种拟像》
Dreamscape: A Catalog of Simulacra
并未完全拆封的礼物，堆在这里等待着有资格打开它们的人。
Gifts that have not been fully opened are stacked here, waiting for those qualified to open them.
有人说所有礼物背后都已经标好了价格。对这间房而言，价格或许是「浪漫」。
People often say that there is a price behind every gift. When it comes to this room, perhaps the price is "romance."
堆了半墙的书籍和影像带，其中有不少是匹诺康尼的古早出品。
Books and tapes are stacked halfway up the wall. Among them are a considerable number of early Penacony works.
在梦境内容如此丰富的当下，书籍这样原始的载体只能起到纪念意义了。
At present, where dreams are as abundant as they are, primitive items like books serve only as commemorative objects.
比起枯燥地探索完酒店的每一层，还是回到梦中更有趣些。
Returning to dreaming would be far more entertaining than merely searching every single floor of the hotel.
你担心电梯门后钻出一对双胞胎来。
You're worried a pair of terrifying twins are going to emerge from behind the elevator doors.
人不能两次踏入一台相同的电梯，也不能一次乘坐两台电梯。
You cannot step into the same elevator twice, just as you cannot take two elevators at once.
这样的门连接着一间间侧厅——酒店的五脏六腑。但梦境显然比它们更值得开拓。
Doors like this lead to one side room after another — the heart and soul of the hotel. However, the dreamscape is clearly much more worth exploring.
紧闭的门并不会断绝探索的可能——它们终将开启，只要你耐心等待。
A firmly closed door does not mean that exploration is impossible... They have to open sometimes, you just need to be patient.
这座酒店为宾客们准备了许多现实娱乐，但它们都不如梦境有吸引力。
This hotel has prepared a lot of real-life entertainment, but they are not as attractive as entering the dreamscape.
这处花坛里种的是三日卷柏——闻名宇宙的复苏植物。
This flower bed has three-day spikemosses, known across the universe as the plant of resurrection.
据说在非自然死亡时，它只需阳光照射三天就能起死回生，因此也被戏称作「宇宙中最好养活的盆栽」。

Legend has it that in the case of unnatural death, it only requires three days of sunshine to be able to bring the dead back to life. That is why it has been nicknamed: "The easiest plant to raise in the universe."
不过由于缺少阳光，这一坛的长势只能算凑合。
However, due to the lack of sunlight, the growth of this pot can only be considered passable.
这是一台自助苏乐达机，在匹诺康尼随处可见。
This is an automatic SoulGlad dispenser machine, common in Penacony.
当你靠近时，这台机器上的加液枪突然掉落，喷出的苏乐达溅了你一身。
As you approach, the dispenser on the machine suddenly falls, spraying SoulGlad all over you.
一个令人恼怒的恶作剧——也可能单纯是一场意外，没人知道。
An infuriating prank — or it could simply be an accident. Who knows.
你四下张望，却找不到一个可以抱怨的对象……
You look around, but can't find anyone to vent to...
这是…一个垃圾桶。梦中居然也存在垃圾桶？！
This is... a trashcan. There are even trashcans in the dream!?
这一发现化作巨大的喜悦，转瞬就冲上了你的脑壳，仿佛一记重拳。
This discovery turns into overwhelming joy, and it rushes to your head like a punch.
等回过神来时，你整个人都已经包裹在了糖色的情绪之中，带着些许回甘。
When you return to your senses, you've been enveloped in a sugary mood, with a lingering sweet aftertaste.
你把眼睛凑到望远镜前，凝视其中的景象——只看到一片深渊般的漆黑。
You peer into the binoculars, but all that meets your gaze is an abyssal darkness.
突然，深渊中睁开了一只眼睛，也开始凝视着你……
Suddenly, an eye opens in the abyss and begins to stare at you...
继续凝视它。
Continue to meet its gaze.
凝视深渊之人，必将被深渊凝视。而你选择与深渊对视……
If you gaze into the abyss, the abyss gazes also into you. And if you choose to meet the abyss' gaze...
不知过了多久，那只眼睛羞涩地合上了。望远镜中只留一片黑暗。
After some time, the eye closes shyly. Only darkness remains in the telescope.
移开视线。
Avert your gaze.
你移开视线，不再与望远镜大眼瞪小眼。
You avert your gaze, no longer meeting the stare of the telescope.
靠近这扇门时，你听到里面传来了女人的尖锐嗓音。
As you approach the door, you hear a woman's shrill voice coming from within.
刻薄的女人
Acerbic Lady
你一开始怎么不告诉我？出了事你担得起责任吗！
Why didn't you tell me from the start? Can you take the blame if something happens?
挨骂的女人
Berated Lady
可梦境的宣传语不是说，「做你想做的任何人」吗？
But isn't the slogan of the Dreamscape "Be whoever you want to be"?
刻薄的女人
Acerbic Lady
那也不代表你可以在偶像直播中搓脚皮！
But that doesn't mean you're free to rub the skin from your feet during the live stream!
斯坦威游隼，加长型豪华飞车。运行平稳，乘坐舒适，在梦境中使用苏乐达动力。成功人士的品质之选。
The Steinway Falcon is a sleek and luxurious speedster. Smooth and comfortable, it's powered by SoulGlad in the Dreamscape. It is a choice of quality for the successful.
即便在群星云集的匹诺康尼，一辆斯坦威游隼也会是彰显您高贵品位的最好标识。
Even amidst the star-studded Penacony, a Steinway Falcon is the epitome of showcasing your class.
斯坦威游隼，原产地匹诺康尼，以「美丽」之称闻名遐迩——既包括它美丽的外形，也包括它美丽的售价。
The Steinway Falcon, originating from Penacony, is renowned for its beauty — both in terms of its appearance and price.
随处可见的自助苏乐达机，拔管即饮。也可以为交通工具添加动力。
Self-service SoulGlad machines are seen anywhere. Simply pull out the tube and drink. It can also be used to power your vehicles.
对于苏乐达而言，经典的永远是最好的。
For SoulGlad, classics are always the best.
本机新上「梦境蓝环乌贼与草木灰」口味苏乐达，限时八折优惠，欲购从速！
The new SoulGlad flavor, "Dreamscape Blue Ring Squid & Plant Ash," is now available from this machine at a <unbreak>20%</unbreak> discount for a limited time only!
黄金时刻随处可见的文化杆，化用了匹诺康尼第一人气IP钟表小子的形象。没有指路和报时功能。
The cultural poles that are all over the Golden Hour are made after the image of Penacony's top intellectual property, Clockie. It does not provide directions or tell the time.
据说在漆黑环境下，这些装饰牌也会发出光芒——但「黄金的时刻」总是灯火通明，根本没机会用到它们。
They are said to glow in the dark — but the Golden Hour is always well-lit, so there's no chance of using them.
「我在匹诺康尼很想你」——最下方的牌子上刻着这样一行小字。
"I am missing you in Penacony." A small line is inscribed at the bottom of the plaque.
右转：艾迪恩公园；后退：格拉克斯大道。
Turn right: Aideen Park; Go back: Glaux Avenue.
左转：艾迪恩公园；后退：钟表小子广场。
Turn left: Aideen Park; Go back: Clockie Plaza.
直行：奥帝购物中心；后退：钟表小子广场。
Go straight: Oti Mall; Go back: Clockie Plaza.
直行：奥帝购物中心；后退：格拉克斯大道。
Go straight: Oti Mall; Go back: Glaux Avenue.
「黄金的时刻」随处可见的电话亭，据说可以和梦境之外联络。但眼前这座暂时无法使用。
A telephone booth that is commonly found in the Golden Hour. They're said to be able to communicate with people outside the Dreamscape, but this one is currently out of order.
据说梦境中的许多物品都有自己的心智，眼前这座电话亭或许是不想让你进去。
It's rumored that many objects in the Dreamscape possess minds of their own. Perhaps this particular phone booth before you does not want you to enter it.
或许你需要满足一些条件才能使用这座电话亭，比如装一条机械臂、纹个纹身、或者养几只宠物什么的。
Maybe you need to fulfill certain criteria to use this phone booth. Try installing a robotic arm, getting a tattoo, or raising a few pets.
梦境中的垃圾桶。除了常规垃圾外，这里还存放着人们废弃的情绪。
A trashcan in the Dreamscape. Other than the usual trash, it is also a location for people's discarded emotions.
就像开盲盒——你永远也不会知道，在打开一个垃圾桶时，里面的房客此时究竟是何种心情。
It's like opening a loot box. You'll never know how the tenant inside is feeling when you open the trashcan.
据说在梦里就连垃圾都有喜怒哀乐，这让你不由得开始思考，我们同这些垃圾之间，究竟有何区别。
It's rumored that even trash in the Dreamscape has feelings. It makes you wonder: How are we different from mere trash?
打包好的垃圾，会在来宾看不到的角落统一销毁。
Packaged trash will be disposed of, out of sight of the guests.
这袋子里不知装着多少人的精神垃圾。
Who knows how many people's mental trash is in this bag.
梦境特制的灭火设施——里面装的可不是苏乐达。
The Dreamscape's specialized fire extinguisher. It's not filled with SoulGlad.
据传某男子曾蓄意破坏消防栓，只为喝到「更猛烈」的苏乐达。他离开梦境的姿势不算体面。
Rumor has it that a man deliberately destroyed a fire hydrant just to get his hands on a "stronger" SoulGlad. He didn't leave the Dreamscape with his dignity intact.
消防栓，内无垃圾。
Fire hydrant. No trash inside.
你不知道这些杂物箱里究竟装着什么，但肯定不会是爱和希望。
You don't know what exactly is within the box, but it definitely won't be love and hope.
即便是在梦里，这堆箱子之间也绝不可能藏着一只宝箱怪…大概吧？
Even in a dream, there's no way a treasure chest monster can be hiding between these boxes... or is there?
供游客欣赏梦境时刻壮丽景象的望远镜。不过这架望远镜的视线十分模糊，让你感觉像是在顶着一个桶看东西。
A telescope for tourists to enjoy the splendid views of the Dreamscape. However, the view is blurry, and it feels like you're looking through a barrel.
供游客欣赏梦境时刻壮丽景象的望远镜。不过这架望远镜里面被堵住了，你只能看见一片漆黑。
A telescope for tourists to enjoy the splendid views of the Dreamscape. However, the view is blocked, so all you can see is darkness.
…不知道为什么，这个望远镜里面正在放映「钟表小子」的系列动画。
...For some reason, this telescope is showing a Clockie serial animation.
在这个望远镜里，你看见了浩渺群星，过去、现在与未来正交织为壮丽的图景——唯独没有对面的高楼。
In this telescope, you can see the stars, the past, the present, and the future — all weaved into a magnificent picture. You can see everything but the skyscrapers on the other side.
你凑近望远镜，未曾想城市的灯火昏花了你的眼睛，你感到心神缭乱、头晕目眩…你终于明白——这叫光污染。
You get close to the binoculars, not expecting the city lights to be so blinding. You feel dizzy and lightheaded... You finally understand — this is light pollution.
「海珍达兹冰淇淋——梦境的味道，就是这么鲜明。」
"Hygen Daaz Ice Cream — This is how distinct the taste of the Dreamscape is."
「最美味的美梦脆筒，就在海珍达兹。」
"The most delectable Dreamy Cone is here at Hygen Daaz."
「苏乐达好处都有啥，谁说中了就送他。」
"What are the benefits of SoulGlad? Whoever gets it right wins this!"
「苏乐达——欢乐的源泉、美梦的精华！」
"SoulGlad — the source of joy, the quintessence of dreams!"
金黄色的饮料如火山般喷发——苏乐达似乎非常喜欢这个宣传设计，就连它们的工厂也是这幅造型。
The golden drink erupts like a volcano. SoulGlad seems to love this advertising design, and even their factory is designed this way.
「乌通蓬自动车，成功人士的豪华尊享。」
"Utopon Motion Maverick, luxury indulgence for the successful."
你无法想象这块广告牌多么渴望像球笼一般自由。
You can't imagine how much this billboard wants to be free as a spheroid.
「柠檬汁、红鱼子，酸甜可口、老少皆宜。」
"Lemon juice, fish roe, sweet and sour for all ages."
曾几何时，「绯鱼先生」柠檬挞里真的有过鲱鱼。
Once upon a time, Mr. Herring's lemon tarts really did contain herrings.
「零卡圣代，美味无负担。」
"Zero-calorie sundaes. Delicious and guilt-free."
飞碟堡，匹诺康尼颇负盛名的美食之一。据说某些酒馆里正在举办「不用手吃飞碟堡」的比赛。
Floatdisc Burger, one of Penacony's most famous delicacies. Rumor has it that some taverns are hosting a "Hands-free Floatdisc Burger Eating Contest."
「衣装是邂逅浪漫的武器，而你值得最好的。」
"Clothing is the best weapon for encountering romance, and you're worth the best clothes."
「我们不只妆点您的外貌，还能修饰您的灵魂。」
"We don't just beautify your face, but also rejuvenate your soul."
「今天的美好梦境，明天的难忘回忆。」
"Today's Dreamscape, tomorrow's memories."
「潮流时尚，精品典藏——尽在于此！」
"Chic, trendy, and a fine collection — it's all here."
「钟表披萨，钟表小子都爱吃的聚会美食。」
"Clockie Pizza. A party food that even Clockie loves."
「条条大路织美梦，往来交通有球笼。」
"All roads lead to dreams, all travels use Spheroids."
对于苏乐达而言，经典的永远是最好的。
For SoulGlad, classics are always the best.
匹诺康尼常见的自助推车，主打一个方便快捷、数量繁多。
A self-serve goods trolley. It is a common sight in Penacony with its convenience, speed of service, and ubiquitousness.
苏乐达是梦境中最为常见的饮料——当然，还是得花钱购买。
SoulGlad is the most common dream in the Dreamscape — you still have to pay for it though.
这辆推车的主人不知去哪里享受了，只留冰淇淋孤零零地立在架子上——好在梦中的冰淇淋不会融化。
You're not sure where the owner of this cart ran off to relax, leaving the ice cream on the shelves all sad and alone. Luckily, ice cream doesn't melt in dreams.
匹诺康尼常见的自助推车，主打一个方便快捷、数量繁多。
A self-serve goods trolley. It is a common sight in Penacony with its convenience, speed of service, and ubiquitousness.
这辆推车上摆放着成捆的报纸，任游客们自行拿取——当心别挑中那些过期的。
This cart is filled with newspapers, free for grabs for tourists. Be careful not to pick the outdated ones.
匹诺康尼常见的自助推车，主打一个方便快捷、数量繁多。
A self-serve goods trolley. It is a common sight in Penacony with its convenience, speed of service, and ubiquitousness.
啪砰——那是快乐绽放的声响。
Pop — this is the sound of happiness.
